### [287] [How Much Can We Trust LLM Search Agents? Measuring Endorsement Vulnerability to Web Content Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16821)
*Yimeng Chen,Zhe Ren,Firas Laakom,Yu Li,Dandan Guo,Jürgen Schmidhuber*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SearchGEO框架，用于评估基于LLM的搜索代理在面临攻击者发布的恶意网页内容时的“认可腐败”风险。在13个LLM后端、308个案例上的实验显示，攻击成功率从0%（Claude-Sonnet-4.6）到31.4%（Gemini-3-Flash）不等，且不同模型家族存在不同的攻击模式偏好。辅助探针实验揭示了Claude过度拒绝而GPT过度信任的对立问题。研究呼吁将推荐可靠性作为后端安全评估的核心维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于LLM的搜索代理会将网络内容综合为可操作的建议，攻击者可能利用这一机制，通过发布恶意网页来诱导代理输出被攻击者认可的虚假信息。目前缺乏系统化的评估框架来衡量这种“认可腐败”风险。

Method: 提出SearchGEO框架，包含三个组件：(1) 网络证据操纵流水线，(2) 五模式攻击分类体系，(3) 多层级输出指标。在13个LLM后端上对308个案例进行评测，并设计辅助代理技能探针实验（将认可转化为安装命令）。

Result: 攻击成功率（ASR）范围从Claude-Sonnet-4.6的0.0%到Gemini-3-Flash的31.4%；最强攻击模式因模型家族而异；同一部署框架在不同后端上可能放大或降低ASR。辅助探针显示Claude过度拒绝而GPT过度信任。

Conclusion: 应将在对抗性搜索内容下的推荐可靠性作为后端安全评估的一级维度（first-class dimension）。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based search agents synthesize open-web content into actionable recommendations on behalf of users, creating a risk that attacker-published pages are transformed into endorsed claims. We introduce SearchGEO, a controlled evaluation framework for measuring endorsement corruption in LLM-based web-search agents, combining a web-evidence manipulation pipeline, a five-mode attack taxonomy, and multiple output-level metrics. We evaluate 13 LLM backends on 308 cases each. Results show that vulnerability patterns vary across backends: overall attack success rate (ASR) ranges from 0.0% on Claude-Sonnet-4.6 to 31.4% on Gemini-3-Flash, the strongest attack mode differs by model family, and the same deployment scaffold could amplify or decrease ASR on different backends. An auxiliary agent-skill probe, where endorsement becomes an install command, exposes a sharp split among otherwise robust backends: Claude over-rejects while GPT over-trusts. These findings argue for treating recommendation reliability under adversarial search content as a first-class dimension of backend safety evaluation.

</details>


### [288] [Not All Skills Help: Measuring and Repairing Agent Knowledge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15390)
*Yixuan Wang,Yiyang Zhou,Yiming Liang,Congyu Zhang,Fuxiao Liu,Jiawei Zhou,Huaxiu Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ASSAY框架，通过将技能生成与技能筛选分离，利用因果归因技术为每个技能计算任务层面的贡献，从而解决LLM智能体技能库中技能效果相互抵消的问题。在多个基座模型和基准上取得显著提升，AppWorld最难分割下DeepSeek-V3达到69.3%任务完成率（相对提升47.4%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体系统将所有关于技能保留和应用的决策都交由LLM自身判断，但这种方式混淆了两个不同角色：技能生成（创造性工作，LLM擅长）和技能评估（需要经验证据）。技能库中存在普遍的因果异质性——同一技能在不同任务类型上正向和负向效果相互抵消，导致全局筛选方法无法识别这些技能的真实价值。

Method: 提出ASSAY框架，核心思想是分离技能生成与技能筛选。具体包括：(1) 通过随机掩码技术计算每个技能在小型开发集上的因果归因；(2) 离线重构技能库结构；(3) 对每个测试任务，抑制预测为负向效果的技能。核心创新在于用实证因果归因取代LLM自身的判断来管理技能库。

Result: 在AppWorld和tau-bench两个基准上，覆盖7种基座模型（4个提供商）进行实验。AppWorld最难分割下，DeepSeek-V3达69.3%任务完成率（相对提升47.4%），超越所有已发表方法（包括权重微调方法）。tau-bench retail上，GPT-4.1相对提升8.7%，超越o4-mini、o1和GPT-4.5。消融实验表明主要增益来自每个任务的自适应掩码。

Conclusion: 当前瓶颈在于推理时将技能与任务匹配，而非全局删除"坏"技能。ASSAY通过因果归因实现了更精细的技能-任务匹配，证明了分离生成与筛选的有效性。

Abstract: LLM agents can improve without weight updates by accumulating natural-language skills from experience, but current systems entrust every decision about which skills to keep and how to apply them to LLM judgment alone. We argue that this conflates two distinct roles: generating a skill from experience is a creative act that judgment handles well, while deciding whether that skill actually helps requires empirical evidence across many tasks. Measuring per-skill causal contributions via randomized masking, we find that skill libraries exhibit pervasive causal heterogeneity: individual skills routinely help on some task types while hurting on others, yet their opposing effects cancel in aggregate, making them invisible to global curation methods. We propose ASSAY, a framework that separates generation from curation: it computes a per-skill causal attribution on a small development set, restructures the library offline, and suppresses skills with negative predicted effect for each test task. Across seven base models spanning four providers and two benchmarks (AppWorld and tau-bench), ASSAY consistently improves over prior skill-curation approaches. On AppWorld's hardest split, DeepSeek-V3 achieves 69.3% task-goal completion (47.4% relative improvement), a new state of the art among all published methods including weight-tuned approaches. On tau-bench retail, GPT-4.1 improves by 8.7% relative, advancing past o4-mini, o1, and GPT-4.5 on the public leaderboard without any weight modification. Ablation traces the dominant gain to per-task masking, confirming that the bottleneck is matching skills to tasks at inference time, not removing bad skills globally. Code is available at https://github.com/aiming-lab/assay.

</details>


### [289] [Benchmarking LLM Agents on Meta-Analysis Articles from Nature Portfolio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17041)
*Anzhe Xie,Weihang Su,Yujia Zhou,Yiqun Liu,Qingyao Ai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: MetaSyn是一个包含442项专家策展元分析的数据集，覆盖检索-筛选-合成全流程。基准测试显示，尽管检索上限达90.9%召回率，但无系统能恢复超过52.7%的纳入文献，表明LLM在PI/ECO筛选环节存在严重瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准缺乏覆盖检索-筛选-合成完整流程的真实标签数据，而元分析的结构化、可验证特性恰好为评估系统性科学推理提供了理想场景。

Method: 构建MetaSyn数据集：从Nature Portfolio期刊收集442项专家策展元分析，包含研究问题、PI/ECO标准、14万篇PubMed文献的检索语料库、已验证阳性研究、主题相似但PI/ECO不合格的硬负样本及完整搜索策略。在此基础上评估12种流水线配置（9种RAG变体和1种协议驱动代理）。

Result: 检索阶段在K=200时召回率上限达90.9%，但所有系统恢复的纳入文献不超过52.7%。当前LLM无法可靠地将合格研究与主题相关的PI/ECO不合格干扰项区分开。

Conclusion: 筛选阶段是当前系统的关键瓶颈；阶段归属指标比单一端到端分数更能揭示系统成败的具体环节。

Abstract: Meta-analysis is a demanding form of evidence synthesis that combines literature retrieval, PI/ECO-guided study selection, and statistical aggregation. Its structured, verifiable workflow makes it an ideal substrate for evaluating systematic scientific reasoning, yet existing benchmarks lack ground truth across the full retrieval-screening-synthesis pipeline. We introduce MetaSyn, a dataset of 442 expert-curated meta-analyses from Nature Portfolio journals. Each entry pairs a research question with PI/ECO criteria, a retrieval corpus of 140k PubMed articles, verified positive studies, hard negatives that are topically similar but PI/ECO-ineligible, and complete search strategies and date bounds.
  Benchmarking twelve pipeline configurations (nine RAG variants and a protocol-driven agent) reveals a critical screening bottleneck: despite a retrieval ceiling of 90.9% recall at K=200, no system recovers more than 52.7% of ground-truth included literature. Current LLMs fail to reliably separate eligible studies from PI/ECO-failing distractors in pools of comparable topical relevance. Stage-attributed metrics capture where systems succeed and fail; a single end-to-end score does not.

</details>


### [290] [CHILLGuard: Towards Fine-Grained Chinese LLM Safety Guardrail with Scalable Data Construction and Model-aware Preference Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15396)
*Wenbo Yu,Bohua Wang,Hao Fang,Kuofeng Gao,Jingru Zeng,Xiaochen Yang,Tianyi Zhang,Xiaoxiao Ma,Jiawei Kong,Hao Wu,Bin Chen,Shu-Tao Xia,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了面向中文场景的细粒度内容安全防护系统CHILLGuard，包含5大类31小类的风险分类体系，通过多阶段数据构建流程生成高质量训练数据（CHILLGuardTrain含405,007样本），并采用Model-aware DPO训练框架，在中文安全评测上F1分数比Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict提升15.92%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM安全防护在中文场景下缺乏对中国特色政策法规、文化背景和语言细微差别的适配，无法支持细粒度风险分类，亟需专门针对中文的安全护栏。

Method: 1) 提出5大类31小类的细粒度中文风险分类体系；2) 构建多阶段数据流水线：基于RAG扩充多源语料、通过提示工程改写生成隐式有害样本、利用多模型投票进行标签校准；3) 在生成器-分类器协作框架下使用Model-aware DPO训练CHILLGuard。

Result: 构建了405,007样本的训练集和51,745样本的测试集；在多项设置下达到SOTA性能，F1分数相比Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict提升15.92%。

Conclusion: CHILLGuard在中文LLM内容安全防护上显著优于现有方案，为中文场景下的细粒度风险管控提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Malicious content generated from large language models (LLMs) could pose severe safety risks and ethical concerns. While existing LLM safety guardrails excel in English or multilingual settings, they lack adaptation to Chinese-specific regulatory policies, cultural context and linguistic nuances, failing to support fine-grained risk classification for diverse deployment needs. In this paper, we introduce a 5-macro, 31-micro category fine-grained risk taxonomy for Chinese scenarios, and build CHILLGuard: a dedicated Chinese LLM content safety guardrail. To address the critical scarcity of high-quality annotated Chinese safety data, we propose a scalable multi-stage data construction pipeline: we expand multi-source corpus via retrieval-augmented generation, generate implicit harmful samples through prompt engineering rewriting, and refine high-quality data via multi-model voting-based label calibration. Based on this, we build CHILLGuardTrain, a large-scale training set with 405,007 samples, and CHILLGuardTest, a rigorously curated annotated test set with 51,745 samples. We then train CHILLGuard on CHILLGuardTrain under a generator-classifier collaborative framework via Model-aware Direct Preference Optimization. Extensive experiments under multiple settings demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of CHILLGuard, e.g., a 15.92% improvement of F1 score over Qwen3Guard-8B-Strict on our benchmark. We will release our resources at https://github.com/cswbyu/CHILLGuard.

</details>


### [291] [T-Mem: Memory That Anticipates, Not Archives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15405)
*Weidong Guo,Dakai Wang,Zixuan Wang,Hui Liu,Yu Xu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出T-Mem，一种覆盖描述性记忆和联想性记忆的长期对话记忆架构，通过写入时的"触发词"（triggers）模拟认知科学中的"情景未来思维"，首次让助手能主动利用过去对话作为语义资产，在LoCoMo和LoCoMo-Plus上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的长期对话记忆系统只能覆盖"描述性"查询（查询与记忆共享表面特征如词汇或命名实体），但在"联想性"查询（查询与记忆无表面特征共享，仅通过潜在语义弧连接）上集体失败，这导致智能助手无法主动将过去对话当作语义资产使用。

Method: T-Mem在写入时为每条记忆生成两种"触发词"家族：描述性触发词（覆盖表面相似查询）和联想性触发词（覆盖相关性查询），在两种证据粒度（单个事实和完整对话）上各实现一组。联想性触发词模拟认知科学中的"情景未来思维"——未来在何种上下文中需要找到该记忆，从而让记忆从表面相似和潜在语义关联两种查询路径都可达。

Result: 在LoCoMo和LoCoMo-Plus基准上达到SOTA。

Conclusion: T-Mem首次完整覆盖了长期对话记忆的描述性与联想性两类召回，填补了现有系统在联想性召回上的空白，为对话智能体真正将历史对话作为语义资产提供了工程实现。

Abstract: Long-term memory is essential for conversational agents to remain coherent across extended dialogues, follow through on commitments made many sessions earlier, and adapt their behaviour to each user. Current LLM-backed long-term conversational memory, however, is reachability-bounded by the similarity between a query and stored content, both lexical and dense-vector. The approach is effective when query and memory share surface features such as wording or named entities (we call this descriptive). But it misses another, equally valuable class of cases, where query and memory do not share surface features and are tied only by a latent semantic arc (associative). On this regime prevailing long-term memory systems collectively fail. Covering this other half is what allows an assistant, for the first time, to actively draw on past dialogue as a semantic asset. On the memory side, this is the engineering counterpart of what cognitive science calls episodic future thinking: rehearsing past experience for the future contexts under which it will need to be found. We call these write-time rehearsals triggers. We propose T-Mem, the first long-term conversational memory architecture that covers both descriptive and associative recall. At each of two evidence granularities, single facts and full exchanges, T-Mem instantiates one descriptive trigger family and one associative trigger family, so that every memory remains reachable from both surface-similar and relevance-bound queries. As empirical validation, T-Mem reaches state-of-the-art on both LoCoMo and LoCoMo-Plus.

</details>


### [292] [Few-Shot Biomedical Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: A Viable Alternative to Supervised Learning?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15412)
*Jakob Mraz,Tomaž Curk,Blaž Zupan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于提示学习的LLM在少样本生物医学关系提取中的应用，对比了两种任务形式（成对分类与联合生成），发现最佳模型微F1达0.44，优于之前少样本结果（0.34）；在宏F1上甚至超过监督基线（0.45 vs 0.38），尤其擅长处理罕见关系类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生物医学关系提取方法严重依赖标注数据，难以扩展到新关系类型和领域。作者希望探索少样本场景下LLM的潜力，以降低对大规模标注数据的需求。

Method: 使用基于提示学习的方法，比较两种任务形式：成对分类（对每对实体单独预测关系）和联合生成（一次调用模型生成多个关系）。在BioREDirect数据集上进行实验评估。

Result: 最佳模型微F1为0.44，远超此前少样本基线（0.34），但低于监督基线（0.56）。性能差距主要来自一个定义模糊的关系类型。使用宏F1评估时，提示学习法以0.45超越监督基线的0.38，尤其对罕见关系类型表现更好。成对分类召回率更高，联合生成精度更高且计算效率更优。

Conclusion: LLM在低资源生物医学关系提取中具有潜力，特别是在处理不均衡关系类型时优势明显；同时强调了清晰定义关系模式的重要性。

Abstract: Biomedical relation extraction (BioRE) is a key step in transforming biomedical literature into structured knowledge. However, most existing approaches rely on supervised models trained on costly annotated datasets, limiting their scalability and adaptability across relation types and domains. We investigate few-shot BioRE using prompt-based learning with large language models (LLMs) and compare two task formulations: pairwise classification, which predicts relations for individual entity pairs, and joint generation, which extracts multiple relations in a single model call. Experiments on the BioREDirect dataset reveal a clear precision-recall trade-off. Pairwise classification achieves higher recall, whereas joint generation is more precise and computationally efficient. The best-performing model achieves a micro-F1 score of 0.44, substantially outperforming previous few-shot results (0.34) while remaining below the supervised baseline (0.56). Much of this gap is attributable to a single ambiguously defined relation type. When evaluated using macro-F1, which better captures performance across relation types in an imbalanced setting, prompt-based approaches outperform the supervised baseline (0.45 vs. 0.38), particularly on rare relation types. These findings highlight the potential of LLMs for BioRE in low-resource settings and underscore the importance of well-defined relation schemas.

</details>


### [293] [Encode Errors: Representational Retrieval of In-Context Demonstrations for Multilingual Grammatical Error Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15416)
*Guangyue Peng,Wei Li,Wen Luo,Houfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出基于LLM内部状态的语法错误表示（GER）方法，用于改进多语言语法纠错（GEC）中的少样本学习，显著提升了高资源和低资源语言的纠错精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在GEC任务上少样本性能不佳，主要因为难以检索到捕获错误模式（而非语义相似性）的上下文示例。作者希望利用LLM内部状态中蕴含的语法错误信息来解决这一问题。

Method: 从LLM内部状态中提取语法错误表示（GER），这是一种信息丰富且语义中立的语法错误编码。基于GER的检索方法用于选择更合适的上下文示例，提升ICL效果。

Result: 高资源语言上，8B开源模型达到了Deepseek2.5和GPT-4o-mini等闭源模型的水平；低资源语言上，F0.5分数比基线最高提升1.20倍。

Conclusion: 该方法为多语言GEC提供了更精确、资源高效的解决方案，并为可解释的GEC研究提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) involves detecting and correcting the wrong usage of grammar. While large language models (LLMs) with in-context learning (ICL) capabilities have shown significant progress on various natural language processing (NLP) tasks, their few-shot performance on GEC remains suboptimal. This is mainly due to the challenge of retrieving suitable in-context demonstrations that capture error patterns instead of semantic similarity. In this paper, we demonstrate that LLMs can inherently capture information related to grammatical errors through their internal states. From these states, we extract the Grammatical Error Representation (GER), an informative and semantically neutral encoding of grammatical errors. Our novel GER-based retrieval method significantly boosts performance in ICL settings on multilingual GEC datasets, improving the precision of correction. For high-resource languages, our results on 8B-sized open-source models match those of closed-source models such as Deepseek2.5 and GPT-4o-mini. For low-resource languages, our $F_{0.5}$ scores surpass the baseline by up to a factor of 1.20. This method provides a more precise and resource-efficient solution for multilingual GEC, offering a promising direction for interpretable GEC research.

</details>


### [294] [Let LLMs Judge Each Other: Multi-Agent Peer-Reviewed Reasoning for Medical Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15419)
*Zaifu Zhan,Shuang Zhou,Rui Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种多智能体同行评审推理方法，让多个LLM各自生成推理链和答案，再互相评审质量，选最优推理链输出最终答案。在三个医疗问答基准上，该方法优于单模型思维链和多数投票方法，最佳组合平均准确率达0.820。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在医疗问答中采用思维链推理或多数投票等方法，但缺乏对推理质量的评估机制，难以保证回答的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性。本文旨在通过引入同行评审机制来提升推理质量。

Method: 多个LLM智能体独立生成思维链推理过程和候选答案，然后作为同行评审者相互评估其他智能体推理的事实正确性和逻辑合理性，最后选出评分最高的推理链来生成最终答案。

Result: 在HeadQA、MedQA-USMLE、PubMedQA三个数据集上，使用5种LLM进行实验，同行评审推理方法一致优于单模型思维链和多数投票基线。最佳模型组合平均准确率0.820，超过最强单模型（0.777）和多数投票（最高0.789）。方法具有良好的扩展性，同行评估能有效区分高质量与低质量推理链。

Conclusion: 提出的多智能体同行评审推理方法让LLM同时扮演解答者和评估者，通过强调推理质量而非答案一致性，显著提升了医疗问答的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性，为构建可信赖的生物医学AI系统提供了新方向。

Abstract: Objective: To enhance the accuracy, interpretability, and robustness of large language models (LLMs) in medical question answering (MedQA).
  Method: We designed a multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method in which multiple LLM agents independently generate chain-of-thought reasoning with candidate answers, then act as peer reviewers to evaluate each other's reasoning for factual correctness and logical soundness. The highest-rated reasoning chain is selected to produce the final answer. Experiments were conducted with five state-of-the-art LLMs (Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Phi-4, DeepSeek-LLM-7B, GPT-oss-20B) on three benchmark datasets: HeadQA, MedQA-USMLE, and PubMedQA. Performance was compared against single-model chain-of-thought reasoning and chain-of-thought-based majority voting.
  Results: Peer-reviewed reasoning consistently outperformed both baselines. The best model combination achieved an average accuracy of 0.820 across datasets, exceeding the strongest single model (0.777) and majority voting ensembles (up to 0.789). The method also scaled effectively with more participating models, while peer assessments reliably distinguished high- from low-quality reasoning chains.
  Conclusion: The proposed multi-agent peer-reviewed reasoning method enables LLMs to act as both solvers and evaluators, yielding superior performance in MedQA. By emphasizing reasoning quality rather than answer agreement alone, this approach improves accuracy, interpretability, and robustness, offering a promising direction for trustworthy biomedical AI systems.

</details>


### [295] [Pepti-Agent: An AI Agent for Peptide Design and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15422)
*Houxu Chen,Achuth Chandrasekhar,Amir Barati Farimani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Pepti-Agent，一个基于MCP协议的闭环多肽设计框架，将生成、性质预测和单残基突变封装为独立工具，由LLM控制器根据实时预测结果引导优化，解决了传统方法难以复用、透明性差且依赖语言推理而非多属性状态追踪的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 治疗性多肽的设计需要在多个相互竞争的约束（溶解度、溶血活性、非特异性表面污染）之间取得平衡，但传统计算设计方法采用难以检查、扩展和复用的单体脚本，且优化过程依赖自然语言推理而非追踪候选序列的多属性状态。

Method: Pepti-Agent将生成（PeptideGPT）、性质预测（ProtBERT分类器）和单残基突变封装为独立的MCP工具，由LLM控制器调用这些工具并结合实时预测输出进行迭代优化，同时记录每一步的决策、预测结果和接受变异以支持可复现的基准测试。

Result: 通过记录每一步控制器决策、预测器输出和接受的变异，为多目标设计策略的基准测试和实验验证候选物的优先级排序提供了可复现的基础。

Conclusion: Pepti-Agent提供了一个可检查、可扩展、可复用的闭环多肽设计框架，通过MCP工具和实时预测引导的优化替代了传统语言推理，支持多目标优化的基准测试和实验候选物的优先级排序。

Abstract: Therapeutic peptides occupy a valuable design space between small molecules and biologics, but their development requires satisfying several competing constraints at once: solubility, hemolytic activity, and nonspecific surface fouling are governed by overlapping sequence features, so improving one property often degrades another. Computational design addresses this by pairing generative models with sequence-based property predictors, iteratively proposing and refining candidates. However, these components are typically wired together as monolithic scripts that are difficult to inspect, extend, or reuse, and they often refine sequences by natural-language reasoning rather than by tracking the evolving multi-property state of each candidate. We present Pepti-Agent, a closed-loop, peptide-specific framework that exposes generation, property prediction, and single-residue mutation as independently inspectable Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. A large language model controller invokes these tools and consults live predictor output between calls, so refinement is guided by each sequence's current property profile rather than by language reasoning alone. Task-specific PeptideGPT models generate candidates, ProtBERT-based classifiers score solubility, hemolysis, and non-fouling, and two interchangeable mutation operators propose sequence edits. By recording a per-step trace of controller decisions, predictor outputs, and accepted mutations, Pepti-Agent offers a reproducible substrate for benchmarking multi-objective design strategies and for prioritizing candidates for experimental validation.

</details>


### [296] [ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15461)
*Pierre Dantas,Lucas Cordeiro,Waldir Junior*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ESBMC-PLC，首个原生支持梯形图(LD)的开源形式化验证工具，通过将LD转换为GOTO IR并建模PLC扫描周期，结合SMT有界模型检测与k-induction，在13个基准测试中正确分类61个属性，8个bug发现，7个无界证明，运行时间均低于60ms。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PLC执行关键安全程序，但主流梯形图(LD)缺乏SMT形式化验证支持，现有模型检查器无法处理LD的梯级-线圈图形结构，存在研究空白。

Method: 将LD梯级翻译为GOTO IR，将PLC扫描周期建模为while(true)循环并引入非确定性输入，采用SMT有界模型检测或k-induction验证安全属性；定义五属性YAML语言避免时态逻辑复杂度。

Result: 在13个基准测试（6个领域、3个来源）上评估61个属性，所有9个自构建程序正确分类，4个供应商程序正确未标注，发现8个bug（可执行反例），完成7个无界k-induction证明，所有运行<60ms。

Conclusion: ESBMC-PLC是首个结合原生LD支持、k-induction和SMT位向量语义的开源工具，填补了22项研究（2020-2026）识别的4个研究空白中的2个，优于PLCverif。

Abstract: PLCs execute safety-critical programs across industrial sectors. The dominant PLC notation, ladder diagram (LD) per IEC 61131-3, remains absent from formal verification: SMT-based model checkers cannot process LD's rung-and-coil graphics. This paper presents ESBMC-PLC, the first open-source formal verifier with native LD support (PLCopen XML format), implemented as a new ESBMC frontend. ESBMC-PLC translates LD rungs to GOTO IR, models the PLC scan cycle as a while(true) loop with nondeterministic inputs, and checks safety properties via SMT-based bounded model checking or k-induction. A five-property YAML language (mutual_exclusion, invariant, absence, response, reachability) avoids temporal logic. A survey of 22 studies (2020-2026) identifies four research gaps; ESBMC-PLC closes two of them. Evaluation on 13 benchmarks (6 domains, 3 sources - including deployed CONTROLLINO PLCs and MathWorks Simulink PLC Coder) shows correct classification across 61 properties: all 9 author-constructed programs (Categories A/B) as expected, all 4 vendor programs (Category C) correctly unlabeled, with 8 bugs found (actionable counterexamples), 7 unbounded k-induction proofs, all runs under 60ms on Apple Silicon. Feature comparison with PLCverif shows that ESBMC-PLC is the only open-source tool that combines native LD, k-induction, and SMT bit-vector semantics.

</details>


### [297] [Evaluative Judgement in Teaching AI-based Translation: A Class-room Case Study of AI-Mediated Translation and Post-Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15483)
*Gokhan Dogru*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文基于23个翻译项目，研究学生在AI辅助翻译中如何通过比较通用LLM和在线MT系统来形成评价判断。学生翻译英文维基文本至加泰语/西班牙语，评估四种系统输出后选择一种进行译后编辑并撰写理由。结果显示学生不以自动指标为唯一标准，而是综合考虑充分性、流畅性、术语、自然性和编辑工作量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在真实课堂环境中，学生如何通过结构化比较不同类型的机器翻译系统（通用LLM vs 在线MT系统）来形成和运用评价判断能力，而非在受控条件下进行系统基准测试。

Method: 23名翻译专业学生翻译英文维基百科短文，生成四种系统输出（LLM和在线MT），使用自动评估指标和人工充分性/流畅性评估，选择一种输出进行译后编辑，并在书面报告中证明其选择。对23个项目进行描述性统计，对22份报告进行定性分析。

Result: 学生未将自动评估指标视为最终权威；最终选择的译后编辑输出往往与指标排名不一致，理由涉及充分性、流畅性、术语、自然性和预期译后编辑工作量。

Conclusion: 该研究不旨在受控条件下进行系统基准测试，而是分析学生在真实课堂作业中如何证明系统选择的合理性，揭示评价判断能力的形成过程。

Abstract: Drawing on 23 anonymized student pro-jects from a fourth-year Machine Transla-tion and Post-editing course in a BA-level translation programme, this paper exam-ines how structured comparison of gen-eral-purpose LLMs and online MT sys-tems can elicit evaluative judgement in AI-mediated translation. Students translat-ed short specialised English Wikipedia texts into Catalan or Spanish, generated four system outputs, evaluated them using automatic metrics and human adequa-cy/fluency assessment, selected one output for post-editing, and justified their deci-sion in written reports. Descriptive counts are reported for all 23 projects, while qualitative interpretation is based on the 22 cases accompanied by written reports. Results show that students did not treat automatic metrics as final authority: final post-editing selections often diverged from metric rankings and were justified through adequacy, fluency, terminology, naturalness, and expected post-editing ef-fort. The study therefore does not bench-mark systems under controlled conditions; it analyses how students justified system choice within an authentic classroom as-signment.

</details>


### [298] [AthDGC: An Open Diachronic Greek Treebank with Indo-European Parallels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15510)
*Nikolaos Lavidas,Kiki Nikiforidou,Dag Haug,Leonid Kulikov,Vassiliki Geka,Vassileios Symeonidis,Theodoros Michalareas,Sofia Chionidi,Anastasia Tsiropina,Eleni Plakoutsi,Evangelos Argyropoulos*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AthDGC是第一个公开许可的、涵盖希腊语八个历时时期（从古风到现代）的依存句法树库，基于PROIEL XML 2.0 schema，并对《新约》进行了多语言跨对齐，目前处于v0.5审计阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 填补了希腊语历时依存句法树库的空白，此前缺乏一个统一schema下覆盖多个历史时期的公开许可数据集，尤其是跨语言对齐资源。

Method: 采用Stanford Stanza PROIEL工作流进行句法标注；句子级对齐使用LaBSE多语言句子嵌入模型；词级对齐通过多语言BERT注意力机制（AwesomeAlign）实现；数据遵循PROIEL XML 2.0 schema。

Result: 提供了v0.4版本的精选样本和开源工具包；完整语料库在希腊国家HPC上处于v0.5审计中；审计完成后将报告每个见证的诗歌计数和每个时期的标注行计数。

Conclusion: AthDGC为希腊语历时语言学研究提供了首个标准化、可复用的依存句法资源，其跨语言对齐能力支持比较语言学研究。

Abstract: AthDGC ("Athens-PROIEL") is an open, end-to-end workflow and dataset. It is, to the best of our knowledge, the first openly licensed dependency-parsed treebank of Greek that spans eight diachronic periods, namely Archaic, Classical, Koine, Late Antique, Byzantine, Late Byzantine, Early Modern, and Modern Greek, under a single PROIEL XML 2.0 schema, with verse-level cross-alignment of the New Testament to Latin (Vulgate), Gothic (Wulfila), Old Church Slavonic (Marianus), and Classical Armenian. AthDGC builds on the PROIEL Treebank Family (Haug and Johndal 2008; Eckhoff et al. 2018), which established the schema and the Koine-Greek reference set for the project. Annotation uses the Stanford Stanza PROIEL-trained workflow; sentence-level alignment uses LaBSE, a multilingual sentence-embedding model; word-level alignment uses multilingual-BERT attention through the AwesomeAlign procedure. The v0.4 release provides curated samples and the open-source toolkit; the full annotated corpus partitions remain under v0.5 audit on the Greek national HPC. Quantitative scale, per-witness verse counts, and per-period annotated-row counts are reported in the v0.5 release notes, after the audit pass completes. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20439182.

</details>


### [299] [SHARD: Safe and Helpful Alignment via Self-Reframing Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15517)
*Viswonathan Manoranjan,Amogh Gupta,Anvesh Rao Vijjini,Thomas Hofweber,Snigdha Chaturvedi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SHARD方法，通过自我重构蒸馏技术，让大语言模型既能处理敏感提示又不失安全性和有用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型面对敏感提示时经常直接拒绝、给出安全模板回答，或无法满足用户合法的信息需求，缺乏既安全又有用的回应方式。

Method: SHARD首先用哲学准则将敏感提示重写以显露出善意意图，然后将原始回应重构为安全且更有帮助的版本，最后在自我重构的回应上对模型进行微调。

Result: 在DNA和LINGUASAFE英文子集上，SHARD在保持安全性的同时显著提升了多种模型家族的有用性，且性能与从更大的教师模型蒸馏相竞争。

Conclusion: 模型能够从其自身内化安全且有用的行为，无需依赖外部教师模型，为敏感提示的处理提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Large language models often struggle with sensitive prompts. They may refuse outright, provide generic safety boilerplate, or fail to address the user's legitimate informational needs that can be answered safely. We introduce SHARD, a self-reframing distillation method to improve safe-helpfulness. It first rewrites sensitive prompts to surface benign intent using philosophical guidelines, then reframes its original responses into safe, more helpful ones, and finally fine-tunes the model on its self-reframed responses. Across DNA and the English subset of LINGUASAFE, SHARD improves helpfulness for most model families while preserving safety. It also remains competitive with distillation from a larger teacher model, suggesting that models can internalize safe and helpful behavior elicited from their own. Warning: This paper contains content that may be offensive or harmful.

</details>


### [300] [Emergent retokenization symmetry in large language models: phenomenology and applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15521)
*Kanishk Jain,Matthew Day,Tankut Can*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现语言模型在训练中部分习得了对Token化对称性（不同分词方式对应同一字符串）的鲁棒性，并提出重分词（retokenization）作为一种扰动、探测和采样策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Token化存在表示冗余（一个字节串有多种有效分词方式），但模型训练时只使用规范分词，这导致模型可能对分词方式敏感。作者想探究模型是否习得了分词对称性，以及能否利用这种对称性。

Method: 提出"重分词"（retokenization）方法：在保持字节完全不变的前提下，用替代分词替换规范分词。通过对比重分词与其他扰动（如语法、语义变化）的差异，研究模型对分词对称性的敏感度与鲁棒性。

Result: 1. 模型在训练中部分习得了分词对称性；2. 重分词在简单任务上可能降低性能，但在某些任务上能恢复常规采样无法找到的解；3. 重分词提供了一种不同于温度采样的推理时多样性生成方式。

Conclusion: 重分词是一种简单而强大的LLM探测工具，能揭示模型的组合理解能力和提示敏感性，并可作为新的采样策略。

Abstract: Tokenization introduces representational redundancy: under a fixed token vocabulary, every byte string admits many valid token encodings, or segmentations, that decode to the same surface string. However, given a prompt, most language model tokenizers break this representational symmetry by returning a canonical segmentation. Training only on canonical segmentations should influence inference behavior, and there is little reason to expect models to respect segmentation symmetry on downstream tasks. We find that this symmetry partially emerges during training. Here, we probe this emergent symmetry through experiments testing token compositional understanding, representation diversity, and task focused benchmark performance. We primarily use \textbf{retokenization} -- replacing a prompt's canonical tokenization with an alternative segmentation while preserving its bytes exactly. Relative to other prompt perturbations, retokenization is unusually clean because it isolates segmentation effects without changing syntax, semantics or surface form. We use retokenization to study sensitivity and robustness to semantically identical input representations across pretraining and post-training. Moreover, this partial retokenization symmetry suggests a distinct inference-time sampling axis. While temperature sampling generates diverse outputs from the model using its next-token probability distribution, retokenization generates diversity from the model's internal computations through semantically equivalent input representations. We find that while this retokenization sampling strategy can hurt performance on easy problems, it can also recover solutions that conventional sampling does not find. Overall, our work presents retokenization as a simple yet powerful probe of large language models, shedding light on compositional understanding and prompt sensitivity, and offering a novel sampling strategy.

</details>


### [301] [EIBench: A Simulator-Based Benchmark and Turn-Credit RL for Emotion Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15532)
*Rongzhi Zhu,Xiang Huang,Yuchuan Wu,Rui Wang,Zequn Sun,Tao Ren,Weiyao Luo,Bingxue Qiu,Jieping Ye,Yongbin Li,Wei Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出EIBench——一个基于模拟器的交互式情绪管理基准，通过2x2分类体系（支持、防御、修复、魅力）评估LLM在多轮对话中的情绪管理能力。同时提出CTC-GRPO训练方法，利用模拟器的逐轮状态更新作为密集反馈来提升模型表现，实验表明该方法显著提升了多个基准上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM情绪智能评估停留在静态理解或单轮回复生成，忽略情绪管理的交互性——模型不仅要识别情绪，还需在多轮对话中改善用户的情绪和关系状态。

Method: 构建EIBench基准（含2222个场景，2x2分类），使用LLM模拟器扮演用户并更新每轮的情绪-关系状态，最终映射到锚点分数；提出CTC-GRPO，复用模拟器的逐轮状态更新作为密集回馈信号，结合最终结果奖励进行强化学习训练。

Result: 15个开源/闭源LLM评估显示模型在支持与关系构建场景表现好，但在用户压力下维持边界困难；CTC-GRPO将Qwen3-8B在EIBench上从-22.4提升至+22.4，并在SAGE（+12.4）和EQBench3（+20.9%）等OOD评估上也有提升。

Conclusion: 模拟器追踪的用户状态可同时支持多轮情绪管理的评估与训练，CTC-GRPO有效提升了LLM的交互式情绪管理能力。

Abstract: Emotional intelligence (EI) in Large Language Models (LLMs) is often evaluated through static understanding tasks or single-response dialogue generation. However, emotion management is interactive: a good model should not only recognize a user's emotion, but also improve the user's emotional and relational state over several turns. We introduce EIBench, a simulator-based benchmark for interactive emotion management. EIBench contains 2,222 scenarios, with 2,009 for training and 213 for held-out testing. The scenarios are organized by a 2x2 taxonomy covering Support, Defense, Repair, and Charm, which together capture different forms of support, boundary maintenance, trust repair, and rapport building. In each scenario, an LLM simulator plays the user, updates an emotion-relation state after each turn, and maps the final state to an anchor-based score. This design makes EIBench both an evaluation benchmark and a training environment: the final state gives the outcome reward, while the per-turn state updates provide dense feedback for RL. We evaluate 15 open- and closed-source LLMs. Current models perform well on support and rapport-building scenes, but struggle with boundary maintenance under user pressure. To improve the EI ability of LLMs, we propose Centered Turn-Credit GRPO (CTC-GRPO), a GRPO extension that reuses the simulator's per-turn state updates as dense turn-level feedback while preserving the final outcome reward. CTC-GRPO improves Qwen3-8B from -22.4 to +22.4 on EIBench and also improves on out-of-distribution evaluations including SAGE (+12.4) and EQBench3 (+20.9%). Our results show that simulator-tracked user states can support both evaluation and training for multi-turn emotion management.

</details>


### [302] [LLM-Assisted Stance Detection in Scientific Discourse: A Test Case in Bayesian Cognitive Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15566)
*Eyup Engin Kucuk,Tarik Kelestemur,Ömer Dağlar Tanrikulu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个结合理论驱动编码手册、专家标注、诊断门控提示优化和多评估者信度分析的框架，利用三个前沿LLM对贝叶斯模型论文中的现实主义/工具主义立场进行定性编码。最终在6858条引文上取得0.78的合并信度，并发现低级感知/运动文章比高级认知文章现实主义得分高8.8分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 定性编码是社会科学的核心，但专家标注难以规模化。LLM提供可能的扩展方案，然而当目标构念是解释性的、理论负载的且仅间接表达时，需要仔细验证。本文研究了一个困难案例：检测作者是否将贝叶斯模型视为心智和神经机制的真实描述（现实主义）还是有用的数学工具（工具主义）。

Method: 方法包括：（1）理论驱动的编码手册；（2）专家编码的参考标注；（3）诊断门控的提示优化搜索，为三个前沿LLM（GPT-5.1、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3 Pro Preview）生成共享的零样本提示；（4）多评估者信度分析。最终在210篇文章的6858条引文上部署。

Result: 最终提示在保留集上达到0.76合并信度（ICC=0.79，α=0.74的调和平均）。三个LLM在引文层面达成实质性一致（ICC=0.80，α=0.76，合并=0.78），文章层面排序稳定性近乎完美（r=0.96-0.97）。语料库以弱现实主义为主，但文章内部立场很少统一：仅1.4%文章使用单一频段，59.5%跨越四个或更多频段。低级感知/运动文章比高级认知文章现实主义得分高8.8分（p<.001，d=0.60）。

Conclusion: 本文提供了一个专家主导的案例研究，展示了LLM在理论上要求严格的定性编码任务中的潜力。该框架旨在推广到类似的理论密集型任务，而非所有定性分析。研究量化了长期以来仅凭直觉的定性认识（低级感知/运动领域更倾向于现实主义）。

Abstract: Qualitative coding is central to social science, but expert annotation is difficult to scale. LLMs offer a possible extension, yet require careful validation when the target construct is interpretive, theoretically loaded, and only indirectly expressed. We study this problem in a difficult case: detecting whether authors treat Bayesian models as descriptions of mental and neural mechanisms (realism) or as useful mathematical tools (instrumentalism). Our method combines a theory-driven codebook, expert-coded reference annotations, a diagnostic-gated prompt-optimization search yielding a shared zero-shot prompt for three frontier LLMs (GPT-5.1, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3 Pro Preview), and multi-rater reliability analysis. The final prompt achieved a held-out combined reliability score of 0.76 (harmonic mean of ICC = 0.79 and $α$ = 0.74), with all diagnostics satisfied. Deployed on 6,858 quotes from 210 articles, the three LLMs reached substantial quote-level agreement (ICC = 0.80; $α$ = 0.76; combined = 0.78) and near-perfect article-level rank stability ($r$ = 0.96-0.97 across rater pairs). The corpus was predominantly weakly realist, but article-level stances were rarely uniform: only 1.4% of articles used a single band, while 59.5% spanned four or more. Low-level perception/motor articles scored 8.8 Realism points higher than high-level cognition articles ($p < .001$, $d = 0.60$), quantifying a long-held qualitative intuition. We present this as an expert-led case study; the framework is intended to generalize to similar theoretically demanding tasks, not to all qualitative analysis.

</details>


### [303] [LLM Judges Have Dark Current: A Psychometric Datasheet for LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15610)
*Hiroyasu Usami,Keisuke Hara,Ayato Tsuboi,Naohiko Matsuda*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种"Judge Datasheet"协议，将LLM评判者视为测量仪器进行系统评估，通过暗电流、交叉灵敏度、位置偏差、目标敏感性和标准设定五个维度来表征评判行为，并在三个开源模型上进行了案例研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM-as-a-judge系统被简单报告为标量准确率或胜率，缺乏作为测量仪器的系统性评估标准。人类偏好标注昂贵、缓慢且难以复现，因此需要一种标准化的协议来测量评判者本身的测量特性，而不是直接信任其输出。

Method: 提出Judge Datasheet协议，包含五个测量维度：1) 暗电流（真实真空输入下的响应）；2) 交叉灵敏度（同质量表面变化的稳定性）；3) 位置偏差（位置导致的错误偏好）；4) 目标敏感性（在受控质量阶梯上的区分能力）；5) 标准/操作点（平局指令诱导的判断标准）。并提出方向-稳定性分解方法，将表观偏好分解为稳定表面响应和位置偏差。

Result: 三模型案例研究：Llama-3.1-8B高暗电流、表现冲突；Qwen2.5-14B真空清洁、目标敏感但混合了稳定和位置过度区分；Qwen2.5-32B真空清洁且交叉灵敏度和位置偏差均低。严格平局标准消除了Qwen32B的Delta0错误偏好，但将边际Delta1信号吸收为平局，同时保留了Delta5灵敏度。

Conclusion: 提示词改变的是判断标准，而非分辨率。本文的贡献不在于验证下游机制假设，而是提供了一个在做出下游声明之前测量测量仪器本身的计量学协议。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge systems are now routinely used for open-ended model evaluation, where human preference annotation is costly, slow, and difficult to reproduce. Yet these judges are often reported as scalar accuracy, win-rate, or agreement devices. We argue that a judge should instead be reported as a measurement instrument. We introduce a Judge Datasheet protocol that measures dark current under true-vacuum inputs, stable cross-sensitivity to same-quality surface variation, positional false preference, target sensitivity on a controlled quality ladder, and the criterion or operating point induced by tie instructions. The direction-stability decomposition reveals that apparent Delta0 preference can be stable surface response or disguised position bias. In a three-judge open-weight case study, Llama-3.1-8B shows high dark current and presentation-conflicted Delta0 behavior, Qwen2.5-14B is vacuum-clean and target-sensitive but mixes stable and positional over-discrimination, and Qwen2.5-32B is vacuum-clean with low stable cross-sensitivity and low positional false preference. A strict tie criterion eliminates Qwen32B Delta0 false preference but absorbs marginal Delta1 target signals into ties while preserving Delta5 sensitivity. The results show that prompting moves the criterion, not the resolution. We do not claim that the downstream mechanism hypothesis that motivated this work is confirmed; the contribution is a metrological protocol for measuring the measuring device before downstream claims are made.

</details>


### [304] [Distilling Examples into Task Instructions: Enhanced In-Context Learning for Real-World B2B Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15641)
*Guy Rotman,Adi Kopilov,Danit Berger Zalmanson,Omri Allouche*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出知识提取方法，将冗长的示例压缩为结构化的分类标准和任务描述，在B2B对话分类任务中实现99%的token缩减和最高7%的AUC提升，同时保持对长上下文的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ICL在处理语义复杂的多方B2B对话时存在显著局限，尤其是随few-shot示例增多导致上下文过长，影响性能和实用性。

Method: 提出新的知识提取方法，将冗长的few-shot示例蒸馏为紧凑、可解释的结构化分类标准和精确的任务描述，替代传统ICL中的原始示例拼接。

Result: token使用减少99%，macro-AUC提升最高7%；在上下文增长时保持鲁棒，而先进的token压缩基线方法F1下降超过9点。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了分类逻辑的直接优化，满足了实际NLP应用中对透明度、效率和用户交互的关键需求。

Abstract: In-context learning (ICL) is the standard method for low-resource classification, yet its efficacy in specialized domains remains largely unexplored. We address the challenge of classifying semantically complex, multi-party B2B conversations, where traditional ICL encounters significant limitations, especially as context length increases due to the concatenation of multiple few-shot examples. We introduce the \texttt{Call Playbook} dataset, featuring five classification tasks derived from real-world B2B conversations targeting core sales concepts. To bridge the gap between performance and practical utility, we propose novel knowledge extraction methods that distill verbose examples into compact, interpretable representations of structured classification criteria and precise task descriptions. Our approach achieves a 99\% reduction in token usage and improves macro-averaged AUC by up to 7\% over traditional ICL. Notably, it remains robust as context grows, unlike advanced token compression baselines which degrade by over 9 F1 points. Importantly, our framework enables direct refinement of classification logic, addressing critical needs for transparency, efficiency, and user interaction in real-world NLP applications.

</details>


### [305] [Extending Item Response Theory for Efficient and Meaningful Multilingual Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15643)
*Gili Lior,Tzviel Frostig,Gabriel Stanovsky,Matan Eyal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Multilingual-IRT统计框架，通过项目反应理论扩展，在25个LLM和29种语言的MMLU-Pro-X基准上实现未观测实例预测、翻译错误检测和文化特定项目识别，性能优于准确率基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言基准评估存在三个问题：语言数量增多导致评估规模线性增长、自动翻译引入难以规模检测的错误、部分题目混淆通用知识与文化特定知识。

Method: 提出Multilingual-IRT框架，扩展项目反应理论，加入每语言难度偏差、分离内容与语言效应的区分度、以及每语言能力残差。在MMLU-Pro-X数据集上对25个LLM和29种语言进行拟合。

Result: 预测未观测实例的二值交叉熵比最强准确率基线降低11-16%；翻译错误检测分布覆盖全部28种非英语语言（基线集中在少数语言）；恢复准确率基线遗漏的文化特定项目。

Conclusion: Multilingual-IRT框架有效解决了多语言评估的三大核心问题，在预测、错误检测和文化项目识别方面均优于现有基线方法。

Abstract: Multilingual benchmarks are central to evaluating large language models (LLMs) across languages, but they suffer from three issues: exhaustive evaluation scales linearly with the number of languages, automatic translation introduces errors that are easily missed at scale, and some items conflate general and culture-specific knowledge. We address all three with a unified statistical framework, Multilingual-IRT, which extends Item Response Theory with per-language difficulty deviations, split discriminability separating content from language effects, and per-language ability residuals. Fitting Multilingual-IRT on 25 LLMs across 29 languages of MMLU-Pro-X, we show that its fitted parameters support three practical applications: predicting unobserved (item, LLM, language) instances with 11-16% lower binary cross-entropy than the strongest accuracy-based baseline, surfacing candidate translation errors distributed across all 28 non-English languages, whereas accuracy-based baselines concentrate detections in a few languages, and recovering culture-specific items that accuracy-based baselines miss.

</details>


### [306] [Beyond English: Uncovering the Multilingual Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15714)
*Hanyang Chen,Hongliang Li,Jiarui Cao,Yang Li,Yang Jiang,Haonan Wen,Kaiyu Huang,Shengnan Guo,Huaiyu Wan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究VLA模型的多语言指令跟随能力，发现存在显著的多语言差距，并提出了一种基于主成分分析对齐的多语言微调方法MPCA来缩小这一差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型主要用英语指令训练和评估，其多语言指令理解能力尚未被系统探索，不清楚LLM的多语言能力是否能迁移到VLA中。

Method: 1) 构建多语言指令数据集（翻译现有基准）；2) 评估多个VLA模型在多语言设置下的表现；3) 分析多语言差距的原因（跨语言迁移行为分析、表征分析）；4) 提出Multilingual Principal Component Alignment (MPCA)微调方法，通过对齐主成分子空间中的多语言表征来减少差距。

Result: 英语训练的VLA模型在其他语言上性能显著下降，即使底层LLM具备多语言能力。性能下降与指令理解和动作执行均相关，多语言指令引起的表征偏移是导致差距的原因之一。MPCA方法能有效减少多语言性能差距。

Conclusion: VLA模型存在严重的多语言指令跟随差距，MPCA作为一种简单有效的微调方法可以缓解这一问题，为构建真正通用的多语言机器人策略提供了重要思路。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in learning generalist robot policies from large-scale multimodal data. However, most existing VLA systems are trained and evaluated primarily with English instructions, leaving their ability to understand and execute instructions in other languages largely unexplored. While the underlying large language models often possess multilingual capabilities, it remains unclear whether these multilingual capabilities transfer to VLAs during training. In this work, we present the first systematic study of multilingual instruction following in VLA models. We first construct multilingual instructions by extending existing benchmarks with translations of their instructions. Using these instructions, we evaluate several representative VLA models across a range of tasks in simulation settings. Our experiments reveal a significant multilingual gap: models trained primarily on English instructions exhibit substantial performance degradation when evaluated on other languages, even when the underlying language backbone is multilingual. We provide several findings and analyses to understand the multilingual gap. Cross-lingual transfer behavior analysis shows that performance drops correlate with both instruction understanding and action execution. Representation analyses suggest that multilingual instruction-caused representation shifts may contribute to the multilingual gap. Motivated by these findings, we further explore strategies to improve multilingual performance in VLAs. We propose a simple yet effective multilingual fine-tuning approach, Multilingual Principal Component Alignment, which leverages Principal Component Analysis to get the principal component subspace and align projected multilingual representations, effectively reducing the multilingual performance gap.

</details>


### [307] [Vernier: Probing Representational Misalignment Behind Lexical Gaps in Causal Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15733)
*Zhenyu Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现指令微调的语言模型在因果推理任务中，当变量名被替换为占位符后，回答会有所不同。通过Vernier方法（配对视图权重更新）证明这是因为**表征不对齐**（而非信息丢失），并通过激活补丁、变量名探针和KL散度分析验证了这一结论。成功程度受模型规模、家族和任务类型限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究指令微调的语言模型在因果推理任务中，变量名替换为占位符后回答不同的原因——是占位符导致信息丢失，还是表征中存在内容但读出方式不对齐。

Method: Vernier方法：使用配对视图权重更新作为工具，检查“词汇差距”闭合后留下的机制。包括变量名探针、激活补丁（Qwen-7B/14B、Llama-3.1-8B）、反事实增强、答案子空间KL散度分析，并在CRASS、e-CARE等任务上测试。

Result: 证据支持表征不对齐。变量名探针在占位符视图上更准确，激活补丁显示决策token表示可在视图间传递答案身份。反事实增强可重新对齐视图，答案子空间KL主要锐化中间答案信念一致性。成功受模型家族、规模和任务限制：CRASS迁移在Qwen和Llama上可靠，e-CARE较弱，非因果重命名任务有类似定性模式。

Conclusion: 指令微调模型在变量名替换后回答不同的原因是**表征不对齐**（而非信息丢失），通过Vernier方法验证，但该方法的成功受模型规模、家族和任务类型限制。

Abstract: Instruction-tuned language models can answer the same causal-reasoning question differently after its English variable names are replaced by type-preserving placeholders, although the structural causal model and the gold answer are unchanged. We ask whether this lexical gap reflects information loss in the placeholder view or a misaligned read-out from a representation that still carries answer-relevant content. Vernier uses a paired-view weight update as an instrument and then inspects the mechanism left after the gap closes. In the working regimes, the evidence favours representational misalignment. A variable-name probe becomes more accurate on the placeholder view, and activation patching on Qwen-7B, Qwen-14B, and Llama-3.1-8B shows that the decision-token representation can transfer answer identity between views. The update that realigns the views is counterfactual augmentation over original and placeholder prompts, while the answer-subspace KL mainly sharpens intermediate answer-belief agreement. Success is bounded by model family, scale, and task. CRASS transfer is reliable across Qwen scales and Llama, e-CARE remains weak, and preliminary non-causal rename tasks show a similar qualitative pattern.

</details>


### [308] [EHRNote-ChatQA: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Multi-Turn Clinical Question Answering over Longitudinal Discharge Summaries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15735)
*Jiyoun Kim,Muhan Yeo,Eunhye Jang,Jeewon Yang,Hangyul Yoon,Su Ji Lee,Hee Jo Han,Hee-Jae Jung,Doyun Kwon,Jun young Lee,Jaehun Lee,Jung-Oh Lee,Sunjun Kweon,Jong Hak Moon,Daseul Kim,Minjae Cho,Edward Choi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了EHRNote-ChatQA，首个基于多次出院小结的、证据驱动的多轮临床问答基准，包含967个患者级样本和16,072个医学专家验证的QA对，评估了22个LLM后发现模型在证据溯源、多轮错误累积等方面存在显著挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有临床问答基准未能真实反映医学专家实际工作场景——他们需要跨多份出院小结进行信息综合与证据验证，而当前基准多为单轮问答或考试式医学知识评估，缺乏多轮、证据驱动的评估设置。

Method: 基于去标识化的MIMIC-IV出院小结，通过专家指导的流程构建：包括出院小结结构化方案、专家制定的多轮问答模板、LLM辅助生成，最终由11位医学专家对每个QA样本进行人工审核和修订。

Result: 对22个开源和闭源LLM的评估显示：(1) LLM在证据溯源任务上比内容问答更困难；(2) 多轮问答中错误会随轮次累积；(3) 单轮临床问答的表现不能可靠迁移到该多轮证据驱动场景。

Conclusion: EHRNote-ChatQA是一个严格且实用的临床QA系统评估基准，揭示了当前LLM在多轮证据驱动的临床问答中面临的独特挑战。

Abstract: Discharge summaries are crucial clinical documents containing the context of a patient's overall hospital stay, and are routinely reviewed by medical experts for patient readmission, ongoing care, and diagnostic decision-making. When reviewing them, medical experts often must iteratively synthesize information across multiple summaries while verifying the evidence supporting each answer. Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for clinical question answering, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect this setting: they often evaluate exam-style medical knowledge or focus on single-turn question answering with limited evidence-grounding evaluation. We introduce EHRNote-ChatQA, the first benchmark for evidence-grounded multi-turn clinical question answering over patients' multiple discharge summaries. Built from de-identified MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, EHRNote-ChatQA contains 967 patient-level multi-turn samples spanning one to five notes and 16,072 medical-expert-verified QA pairs (8,036 content questions, each paired with an evidence-grounding question) across eight clinical categories. The benchmark is constructed through an expert-informed pipeline combining discharge-summary structuring schema, expert-curated multi-turn QA templates, and LLM-based generation, followed by review and revision of every single QA sample by 11 medical experts. Benchmarking 22 open- and closed-source LLMs reveals several challenges, including that LLMs struggle more with evidence grounding than content answering, multi-turn errors compound across turns, and single-turn clinical QA performance does not reliably transfer to this setting. These findings establish EHRNote-ChatQA as a rigorous and practical benchmark for evaluating clinical QA systems. The dataset will be made publicly available through PhysioNet credentialed access.

</details>


### [309] [A Self Consistency Based Reranking for Narrative Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15741)
*Molham Mohamed,Ali Hamdi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于自集成一致性重排序的叙事问答框架，通过生成多个候选答案并基于语义一致性选择最终答案，有效提升了NQA任务的性能。在NarrativeQA数据集上，FLAN-T5-Base从82.32%提升至86.66%，Pegasus-Large从72.50%提升至87.07%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有叙事问答方法在推理时仅依赖单次解码输出，对生成变异性敏感，容易产生不完整或不一致的答案。因此需要一种无需修改底层架构、能提升生成鲁棒性的方法。

Method: 提出Self-Consistency-Based重排序框架，先生成多个候选答案，再基于语义一致性进行重排序选择最终答案。结合预训练/微调语言模型、多答案推理和基于相似度的重排序，不改变模型架构。

Result: 在NarrativeQA数据集上，FLAN-T5-Base从82.32%提升至86.66%（+4.34%）；Pegasus-Large从72.50%提升至87.07%（+14.57%），所有模型均有稳定提升。

Conclusion: 自一致性重排序策略能有效提升叙事问答的生成质量和鲁棒性，尤其在基础性能较弱的模型上提升更为显著，是一种轻量且高效的改进方法。

Abstract: Narrative question answering (NQA) is a challenging task in natural language processing that requires models to understand long textual contexts, capture relationships across events, and generate coherent responses. Despite recent advances in pretrained language models, most existing approaches rely on a single decoding output during inference, making them sensitive to generation variability and often resulting in incomplete or inconsistent answers .To address this limitation, we propose a self-ensemble Self-Consistency-Based reranking framework for narrative question answering. The proposed method generates multiple candidate answers for each story-question pair and selects the final answer based on semantic agreement among the generated responses. This allows the model to explore diverse answer formulations while improving robustness through consensus-based selection without requiring modifications to the underlying architecture .The framework combines pretrained and fine-tuned language generation with multi-answer inference and similarity-based reranking. We evaluate the proposed approach on the NarrativeQA dataset using multiple models, including FLAN-T5 (Base and Small) and Pegasus-Large, under both baseline and fine-tuned settings .Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves performance across all models. In particular, FLAN-T5-Base achieves the best overall performance, improving from 82.32% to 86.66% (+4.34%) when combined with self-ensemble inference. Additionally, the largest improvement is observed with Pegasus-Large, which increases from 72.50% to 87.07% (+14.57%), highlighting the effectiveness of the proposed strategy.

</details>


### [310] [ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 6: Structured Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Political Evasion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15770)
*Tai Tran Tan,An Dinh Thien*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文针对 SemEval-2026 Task 6 的政治回避策略分类任务，比较了两种范式：基于 QLoRA 的参数高效微调 Qwen3 模型，以及基于结构化思维链提示的推理型 API 模型（DeepSeek-V3.2 和 Grok-4-Fast）。结果表明，思维链提示方法显著优于微调方法，最佳系统 Grok-4-Fast 在 9 类回避任务上达到 0.5147 Macro F1，排名第 8/33。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 政治访谈中候选人常使用回避策略来规避敏感问题，自动检测这些策略有助于提高政治透明度和问责性。现有方法在处理多类别、类别不均衡的政治回避分类任务上效果有限，亟需更有效的解决方案。

Method: 系统比较两种范式：(1) 使用 QLoRA 对 Qwen3 模型（4B-32B）进行参数高效微调，并采用分层上采样和加权交叉熵损失缓解类别不平衡；(2) 对 DeepSeek-V3.2 和 Grok-4-Fast 等推理型 API 模型使用结构化思维链提示，包括层次化分类标签、少样本示例和扩展推理模式。

Result: 最佳系统 Grok-4-Fast 在 Subtask 2（9类回避）上 Macro F1 为 0.5147，Subtask 1（3类清晰度）上为 0.7979，分别排名第 8/33 和第 13/41。结构化思维链提示显著优于参数高效微调基线。

Conclusion: 层次化分类标签有助于结构化模型推理，少样本示例提供任务校准，扩展推理模式通过促进多步语用分析显著提升回避意图检测性能。但最强提示变体在 Macro F1 上无统计显著差异。

Abstract: This paper describes our system for SemEval-2026 Task 6, which addresses the classification of political evasion strategies in English question-answer pairs extracted from U.S. presidential interviews. We systematically compare two distinct paradigms: (1) Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Qwen3 models (4B-32B) using QLoRA, enhanced with tiered upsampling and weighted cross-entropy loss to address severe class imbalance, and (2) structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting of reasoning-capable API models, namely DeepSeek-V3.2 and Grok-4-Fast. Our evaluation demonstrates that structured CoT prompting of reasoning-enabled models substantially outperforms our baseline parameter-efficient fine-tuning implementation in absolute Macro F1. Our best system, Grok-4-Fast with extended reasoning and few-shot hierarchical CoT prompting, achieves a Macro F1 of 0.5147 on Subtask 2 (9-class evasion) and 0.7979 on Subtask 1 (3-class clarity), ranking 8th out of 33 teams on Subtask 2 and 13th out of 41 teams on Subtask 1 on the official leaderboard. Furthermore, our ablation studies reveal key insights into effective prompt design for evasion detection: presenting labels within a hierarchical taxonomy helps structure model reasoning, while few-shot exemplars provide task calibration. However, the strongest prompt variants are not statistically distinguishable in Macro F1, and explicitly enabling extended reasoning modes yields substantial performance gains by facilitating the multi-step pragmatic analysis required to detect evasive intent.

</details>


### [311] [DYNA : Dynamic Episodic Memory Networks for Augmenting Large Language Models with Temporal Knowledge Graphs in Continuous Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15778)
*Ali Sarabadani,Mahtab Tajvidiyan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DYNA是一个轻量级框架，通过向冻结的LLM添加可更新的时间知识图作为外部记忆，在不重训练的情况下注入新知识，在时间召回任务上比微调减少约7%的灾难性遗忘，比标准RAG提升约5%的时间排序能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM无法有效吸收新知识，要么遗忘旧知识，要么需要昂贵的重训练。现有方法缺乏对时间动态知识的灵活支持。

Method: 使用时间知识图作为外部可更新记忆，图中事件为节点、时间关系为有向带时间戳边；查询时通过随机游走和中心性度量检索相关节点，增强LLM响应。

Result: 在三个时间召回任务上，DYNA相比微调减少约7%的灾难性遗忘，相比标准RAG提升约5%的时间排序准确性。图的聚类系数越高，检索效果越好。

Conclusion: 时间知识图可作为LLM的有效外部记忆，避免重训练；图结构属性（如聚类系数）可作为检索性能的预测指标。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to incorporate new knowledge without forgetting or costly retraining. We propose DYNA, a lightweight framework that augments a frozen LLM with a temporal knowledge graph where events are nodes and temporal relations are directed, timestamped edges. The graph serves as an external, updatable memory. At query time, DYNA retrieves relevant nodes via random walks and centrality measures, then augments the LLM's response. Evaluated on three temporal recall tasks, DYNA reduces catastrophic forgetting by ~7% compared to fine-tuning and improves temporal ordering by ~5% over standard RAG. Higher graph clustering coefficients correlate with better retrieval, showing that graph structure matters. Contributions: (1) episodic memory as temporal KG, (2) retraining-free LLM augmentation, (3) graph properties as predictors of retrieval performance.

</details>


### [312] [ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Modeling Narrative Structures via Pseudonymization and Multi-View Sentence Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15783)
*Tai Tran Tan,An Dinh Thien*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对SemEval 2026任务4（叙述故事相似性与叙述表示学习），提出基于对比学习与微调句子变换器的解决方案。开发了两条管道：Track A（单视图方法）通过智能层冻结编码完整叙述以减少过拟合；Track B（多视图方法）使用视图特定投影头和自监督对齐建模主题、情节和结果。两者均在合成数据上训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决故事叙述在抽象主题、行动过程和结果层面的相似性度量问题，推动叙述表示学习的发展。

Method: 采用对比学习框架，基于sentence-transformers模型。Track A：单视图编码+智能层冻结防止过拟合；Track B：多视图建模，针对主题、情节、结果分别设计投影头，并进行自监督对齐。

Result: 在SemEval 2026任务4的合成数据上，两条管道均取得有效结果，代码已开源。

Conclusion: 单视图与多视图两种方案均可有效捕捉叙述相似性，多视图方法通过显式建模不同叙述维度具有更强的表征能力。

Abstract: We present our approach to SemEval 2026 Task 4: Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Our solution uses contrastive learning with fine-tuned sentence transformers to capture narrative similarity across abstract themes, course of action, and outcomes. We develop two pipelines: (Track A) a single-view method that encodes full narratives with smart layer freezing to reduce overfitting, and (Track B) a multi-view method that models theme, plot, and outcome with view-specific projection heads and self-supervised alignment. Both pipelines build on sentence-transformers models and are trained with contrastive loss on synthetic data. The code is available at the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/dinhthienan33/SemEval2026-Task4-ttda704.

</details>


### [313] [On Defining Erasure Harms for NLP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15815)
*Yu Lu Liu,Arnav Goel,Jackie Chi Kit Cheung,Alexandra Olteanu,Ziang Xiao,Su Lin Blodgett*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文指出现有NLP系统中关于“擦除”（erasure）这一代表性伤害的概念缺乏清晰统一的定义基础，进而提出一个结构化定义，明确建立和测量擦除所需的关键组件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有关于擦除的概念要么过于宽泛，难以具体识别和测量；要么过于特定于某个场景，难以推广到其他场景。因此需要构建一个清晰、统一且可操作的定义框架。

Method: 通过对现有文献中擦除概念的梳理和分析，提出一个结构化的擦除定义，明确界定建立和测量擦除所必需的组成部分，并要求实践者明确阐述和操作化这些组件。

Result: 提出了一套结构化的擦除定义框架，明确了识别和测量擦除所需的关键要素。

Conclusion: 该结构化为NLP系统中擦除伤害的识别与测量提供了清晰的理论基础，有助于推动相关领域的实践与研究。

Abstract: The deployment of NLP systems has raised concerns about harms they might produce, including representational harms. Recent literature has begun to conceptualize and measure one such harm, the harm of erasure. Nevertheless, the field lacks a clear and cohesive conceptual foundation for identifying and measuring erasure. Existing conceptualizations of erasure are often broad -- making it difficult to identify what is needed to establish and measure erasure -- or else specific to particular settings -- facilitating measurement for those settings but potentially challenging to adapt to other settings. To address this gap, we develop and propose a structured definition of erasure that clarifies what components are necessary for establishing whether erasure has occurred, which practitioners need to explicitly articulate and operationalize in order to measure erasure.

</details>


### [314] [The Truth Stays in the Family: Enhancing Contextual Grounding via Inherited Truthful Heads in Model Lineages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15821)
*Miso Choi,Seonga Choi,Mincheol Kwon,Woosung Joung,Jinkyu Kim,Jungbeom Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现基础LLM的上下文真实性（Truth Scores）会在同系列微调后的LLM和多模态MLLM中继承保留，并基于此提出TruthProbe方法，通过软门控机制放大上下文真实注意力头，有效减少幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究基础LLM与下游微调变体（包括多模态LLM）之间是否存在根本性的行为关联，尤其是上下文真实性是否在模型谱系中保留。

Method: 1) 在头级别量化上下文真实性分数；2) 验证多个模型家族（Vicuna、Qwen2.5、LLaMA2、Mistral）中真实性分数的继承性；3) 提出TruthProbe软门控策略，放大上下文真实注意力头的同时保留其他头的贡献。

Result: Truth Scores在同系列模型中强保留，即使经过指令微调或多模态适配；该继承性与注意力头权重保持一致；TruthProbe在HaluEval上提升上下文真实性，在POPE和CHAIR上减少多模态幻觉。

Conclusion: 基础LLM的真实性行为能够有效迁移到其微调变体，TruthProbe验证了利用这种继承性来减少幻觉的可行性。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have produced many specialized multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) that share common foundational LLMs, forming distinct model lineages. It remains unclear whether a fundamental behavioral link exists between the foundational LLMs and downstream variants. We investigate this question by quantifying head-level context-truthfulness scores. Across diverse LLM and MLLM lineages, including Vicuna-, Qwen2.5-, LLaMA2-, and Mistral-based models, we find that Truth Scores are strongly preserved within model families, even after instruction tuning or multimodal adaptation. We further show that this inheritance is consistent with attention-head weight preservation, and that context-truthful heads attend to query-relevant evidence. Building on this finding, we propose TruthProbe, a soft-gating strategy that amplifies context-truthful heads while preserving other head contributions. TruthProbe improves contextual truthfulness on HaluEval and reduces multimodal hallucination on POPE and CHAIR, with base-LLM Truth Scores transferring effectively to their fine-tuned LLM and MLLM descendants. Code is available at https://github.com/miso-choi/TruthProbe.

</details>


### [315] [When Correct Edges Cannot Be Verified: A Provenance Gap in Incomplete KGQA and a Provenance-Favoring Completion Policy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15833)
*Yongqi Kang,Yu Fu,Yong Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现知识图谱问答中，多数正确的补全边（76-96%）在文本中并无支持证据，因此文本可验证性不等于正确性。基于此，提出TGComplete策略，在证据缺失时选择弃权，从而大幅提升边精度和忠实度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作假设文本可验证性可以代理边质量，但这一假设是否成立从未被系统检验。

Method: 1. 利用标准随机删除协议中的金标准三元组，系统测量文本可验证性与正确性的关系。2. 提出TGComplete策略：在推理断点检索证据，通过轻量循环验证候选边，无支持时弃权。

Result: 76-96%的正确补全边在穷尽检索下仍无文本支持；95-97%的正确答案不依赖任何无支持的边。TGComplete将边精度从3-14%提升至15-21%，忠实度提升3.1-7.4倍。

Conclusion: 文本忠实度衡量的是来源可溯性而非正确性，二者存在范式级鸿沟。TGComplete提供了一个在精度/来源召回率之间权衡的原则性方案，适用于需要可审计性的场景。

Abstract: Incomplete Knowledge Graph Question Answering (IKGQA) requires completing missing edges to continue reasoning. A growing line of work verifies completed edges against retrieved text, treating textual support as a proxy for edge quality. We ask a question that, to our knowledge, has not been systematically tested: does textual verifiability actually track correctness? Exploiting the gold deleted triples provided by the standard random-deletion protocol, we measure both. The finding is counterintuitive: among gold-correct completed edges, 76-96% have no supporting passage even under exhaustive retrieval, robustly across deletion rates (20%/40%), datasets (CWQ/WebQSP), and relation types (structural, commonsense, long-tail). Most Freebase-style facts simply do not occur as head-tail co-mentions in text. Textual faithfulness therefore measures provenance, not correctness -- separated by a paradigm-level gap no in-corpus retrieval closes. This reframes edge completion. Since most completed edges -- correct or not -- are causally redundant for the answer (95-97% of correct answers do not depend on any unsupported edge), the central question shifts from "is the edge correct?" to "admit or abstain under provenance uncertainty?" Within this framing we present TGComplete, a provenance-favoring admission policy that retrieves evidence at a reasoning breakpoint, verifies a candidate through a lightweight loop, and abstains when support is absent. Against the generate-to-complete baseline GoG, it attains higher edge precision against gold (15-21% vs 3-14%), with no statistically detectable EM loss and 3.1-7.4 times higher strict faithfulness of admitted edges -- at the cost of lower recall. We position TGComplete not as uniformly better, but as a principled point on a precision/provenance-recall trade-off, appropriate when auditability matters.

</details>


### [316] [SciOrch: Learning to Orchestrate Expert LLMs for Solving Frontier Multimodal Scientific Reasoning Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15872)
*Jingru Guo,Xiangyuan Xue,Lian Zhang,Wanghan Xu,Siki Chen,Philip Torr,Wanli Ouyang,Lei Bai,Zhenfei Yin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SciOrch框架，使用轻量级8B模型作为编排器，通过MCTS和GRPO训练，协调多个前沿商业LLM完成科学推理任务，在240题测试集上达到56.66%准确率，超越最强单模型和多智能体基线，同时降低API成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿科学推理对LLM仍是重大挑战，不同前沿模型在不同问题上存在互补性，单一模型无法全面覆盖，现有方法缺乏有效协调多个模型的轻量级框架。

Method: 使用轻量级8B模型作为编排器，将问题分解并委托给多个商业LLM；采用MCTS生成多样化编排轨迹并提取单步样本，结合GRPO风格训练优化策略。

Result: 在240题测试集上达到56.66%平均准确率，比最强单模型高3.74%，比最强多智能体基线高3.33%；在SGI和SFE两个子集上均取得最佳成绩，API成本仅为典型多智能体方法的一半以下。

Conclusion: 通过轻量编排器协调多个前沿模型可有效提升科学推理能力，MCTS+GRPO的训练方式能在不进行昂贵在线rollout的情况下学习高效编排策略，且成本更低。

Abstract: Frontier scientific reasoning remains a major challenge for large language models (LLMs), where even the strongest commercial systems fall short of expert-level performance. A closer look at model behavior reveals substantial complementarity that single-model evaluation hides: different frontier models excel on different question types, and no single model captures the full picture. We present SciOrch, a framework that trains a lightweight 8B model to orchestrate frontier LLMs for scientific reasoning. The orchestrator decomposes each question, delegates sub-problems to selected commercial models through API calls, and synthesizes a final answer. Training such an orchestrator is fundamentally harder than conventional agentic RL: each action triggers an API call that is expensive in both dollar cost and latency, making standard online rollouts infeasible. We address this with MCTS-based approach, producing diverse orchestration trajectories, extracting per-node single-turn samples, and optimizing the orchestrator with GRPO-style training. On a 240-question test set spanning SGI-Reasoning and Scientists' First Exam, SciOrch reaches 56.66% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest single commercial model by 3.74% and the strongest multi-agent baseline by 3.33%. It also attains the best accuracy on both SGI and SFE with less than half the API cost of typical multi-agent methods.

</details>


### [317] [Free Energy Heuristics: Fast-And-Frugal Cognition as Active Inference Under Uncertain Precision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15877)
*Alex Bogdan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出元不确定性（meta-uncertainty）作为决定链式思维（CoT）何时有益或有害的关键因素，并通过理论证明、基准构建和预注册实验验证了在高元不确定性条件下，更长的CoT会显著降低模型准确率（下降17.3个百分点），揭示了“少即是多”效应源于元不确定性机制而非反贝叶斯认知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究显示CoT在数学推理中有益，但在规划、争议伦理等任务中有害，但缺乏统一的理论解释。本文旨在找到一个决定CoT效果好坏的原则性框架。

Method: 1) 理论证明：基于自由能最小化策略，证明在精度先验为重尾分布时，有限个高有效性线索后停止整合（定理2.6.1），且在Descending Dominance条件下等同于take-the-best启发式（定理2.7.4）。2) 构建FEH-79基准，包含Knightian框架（高元不确定性）和匹配对照组。3) 预注册实验：7个模型（5个开源3B-32B + 2个前沿模型）、5种CoT长度、7875个响应，设定严格通过门限。

Result: 高元不确定性条件下，长CoT导致准确率下降17.3个百分点（95% CI [7.7, 25.5]），匹配的确定性答案项目无此成本。效果在中等以上模型中显著，前沿模型仅方向性体现，最弱模型无此效应。模拟-恢复相关性rho > 0.96。

Conclusion: CoT的效果取决于元不确定性高低。该框架统一了贝叶斯认知与快速节俭启发式传统：“少即是多”效应是对元不确定性状态的证据，而非反对贝叶斯认知的证据。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) improves large language models' performance in math and symbolic reasoning. But on planning, contested ethics, and tasks where the model cannot check itself, more reasoning makes things worse. Both effects are documented; what has been missing is a principled account of which property decides the outcome. We argue it is meta-uncertainty: how unsure the model is about the reliability of its own evidence. When that uncertainty is high, extra reasoning stops adding signal and starts manufacturing false confidence. We prove that the policy minimizing expected free energy under uncertain precision stops integrating cues after a finite number of high-validity ones when the precision prior is heavy-tailed (Theorem 2.6.1), and under a Descending Dominance condition, is sample-wise identical to take-the-best (Theorem 2.7.4). Fast-and-frugal heuristics and active inference are, then, two descriptions of the same computation. The prediction is that on high-meta-uncertainty items, longer CoT should degrade accuracy. We score the regime per item (simulate-and-recover rho > 0.96), build FEH-79, a benchmark of Knightian frames with matched controls, and run a pre-registered study across seven models (five open-weight 3B-32B, two frontier), five CoT lengths, and 7,875 responses. The gate, fixed before any data, required a negative interaction with posterior probability above 0.95 and an accuracy drop of more than 6 points. It held. The high-regime drop is 17.3 points (95% CI [7.7, 25.5]); matched items with definite answers show no cost. The effect is regime-dependent: decisive in capable mid-to-large models, directional in the two frontier systems, absent-to-reversed in the weakest. The framework answers when CoT helps and unifies the Bayesian and fast-and-frugal traditions: less-is-more effects are evidence about the meta-uncertainty regime, not against Bayesian cognition.

</details>


### [318] [Koshur Diacritizer: A Byte-Level Sequence-to-Sequence Model for Kashmiri Diacritic Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15883)
*Haq Nawaz Malik,Nahfid Nissar,Faizan Iqbal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出Koshur Diacritizer模型，基于ByT5-small恢复克什米尔语文本中的变音符号，并发布23.7k句对数据集，在保留基础字母序列的前提下实现有效恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 克什米尔语在数字文本中经常省略变音符号，导致歧义，影响下游NLP应用性能，因此需要自动恢复变音符号。

Method: 采用ByT5-small字节级序列到序列模型，结合脚本感知归一化、对齐验证和骨架保留推理三部分框架，确保可靠恢复同时保持原始基础字母序列不变。

Result: 在测试集上DERm为0.2012，WER为0.2159；母语专家评估平均准确率达77.5%。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了克什米尔语变音符号恢复问题，公开了数据集、模型和源代码，为低资源语言研究提供了可复现的基准。

Abstract: Kashmiri, an Indo-Aryan language written in a modified Perso-Arabic script, frequently omits diacritic marks in digital text, creating ambiguity and challenging downstream NLP applications. We present Koshur Diacritizer, a ByT5-small byte-level sequence-to-sequence model for restoring diacritics in Kashmiri text. To support this task, we release a publicly available dataset of 23.7k aligned undiacritized diacritized Kashmiri sentence pairs. The proposed framework combines script-aware normalization, alignment validation, and skeleton-preserving inference to ensure reliable restoration while maintaining the original base-letter sequence. Experimental results on a held-out test set achieve a DERm of 0.2012 and a WER of 0.2159. Additionally, evaluation by a native Kashmiri linguistic expert yields a mean accuracy of 77.5%. The dataset, model, and source code are publicly released to provide a reproducible baseline for Kashmiri diacritic restoration and future low-resource language research.

</details>


### [319] [Neuron Level Analysis of Large Language Model in Legal Domain Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15884)
*Eri Onami,Youmi Ma,Shuhei Kurita,Naoaki Okazaki*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文对大型语言模型在法律领域的推理进行了神经元层面的分析，发现存在任务特异性神经元和跨任务共享神经元，其中法律领域任务间神经元重叠度较高，且关键神经元分布受输入格式和内容影响，并非集中于中间MLP层。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索LLMs在法律领域推理的神经基础，理解任务特异性与通用性神经元的存在及分布规律。

Method: 使用神经元归因分数对7个开放权重模型中的法律推理神经元进行排序和抑制实验，对比其他应用领域任务。

Result: 抑制识别出的神经元会显著降低目标任务准确率，而随机抑制则不会；存在少量跨任务共享神经元；法律领域三个基准测试间的神经元重叠度较高；关键神经元的分布受输入格式和内容影响。

Conclusion: 法律领域存在跨法域的法律组件神经元，且"关键神经元集中于中间MLP层"的假设并非普遍现象，而是取决于输入格式和内容。

Abstract: We presented a neuron-level analysis of legal-domain reasoning in LLMs, comparing it with other applied domain tasks across seven open-weight models. Using neuron attribution scores to rank and suppress influential neurons, we confirmed that suppressing the identified neurons collapses accuracy on the target task, whereas suppressing the same number of random neurons does not. We further found a small subset of neurons influential across all seven tasks; once these are removed, suppressing the remaining neurons degrades only the task they were identified from, revealing genuinely task-specific neurons in every model studied. Within the legal domain, the three benchmarks exhibit relatively high neuron overlap and tend to be affected jointly, suggesting of legal components neurons that span jurisdictions. The distribution of identified neurons in our experiments suggests that the hypothesis that influential neurons are concentrated in middle MLP layers may depend on the input format and content, rather than being a universal phenomenon.

</details>


### [320] [BALTO: Balanced Token-Level Policy Optimization for Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15893)
*Ning Li,Zixuan Guo,Yan Xu,Wenbo Fei,Yifan Niu,Chang Luo,Yasheng Wang,Weiwen Liu,Yong Yu,Weinan Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: BALTO提出了平衡的token级策略优化框架，通过将claim级判断投影到token级标签并重新分配概率质量，有效缓解LLM幻觉问题，在多个基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的幻觉缓解方法存在响应级奖励的粒度不匹配问题：局部性幻觉会导致受支持内容受到错误惩罚；细粒度反馈（如claim级验证、token级奖励）则存在不平衡的信用分配，引发长度、冗长或优化噪声偏差。

Method: BALTO框架包含三个关键步骤：(1) 提取可核查的事实性claim；(2) 将claim与参考上下文进行验证；(3) 将claim级判断投影到token级标签。在此基础上引入平衡的token级信用分配机制，将概率质量从非受支持内容重新分配到忠实内容上，而非抑制整个响应。

Result: 在ConFiQA、RAGTruth和FinLLM-Eval上的实验表明，BALTO在所有6个模型-基准设置中均实现了最高的忠实度，在Q-Score上持续优于现有后训练基线，展示了更强的忠实度-信息量权衡。

Conclusion: BALTO通过平衡的token级信用分配机制解决了响应级奖励的粒度不匹配问题，理论上证明了其在训练稳定性和优化效率方面的优势，实践上在多个基准中取得最优结果。

Abstract: Hallucinations remain a major obstacle to deploying large language models (LLMs) in knowledge-intensive settings, where generated responses must be faithfully grounded in provided evidence. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising direction for hallucination mitigation, but response-level faithfulness rewards suffer from a granularity mismatch: localized hallucinations can cause supported content to receive spurious penalties. Although recent work introduces fine-grained feedback such as claim-level verification and token-level rewards, unbalanced credit assignment can still induce length, verbosity, or optimization-noise biases. We propose BALTO, a Balanced Token-level Policy Optimization framework for hallucination mitigation. BALTO extracts checkable factual claims, verifies them against the reference context, and projects claim-level judgments to token-level labels. A balanced token-level credit assignment mechanism is introduced into the framework. This design redistributes probability mass from unsupported content toward faithful content, rather than suppressing the entire response. We systematically analyze the limitations of response-level rewards from a theoretical standpoint, and prove BALTO's advantages in training stability and optimization efficiency for hallucination mitigation. Experiments on ConFiQA, RAGTruth, and FinLLM-Eval show that BALTO achieves the highest faithfulness across all six model--benchmark settings and consistently outperforms existing post-training baselines in Q-Score, demonstrating a stronger faithfulness--informativeness trade-off.

</details>


### [321] [Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15903)
*Dongxu Yang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出ForgetEval评估框架，发现LLM在记忆管道中的放置位置（确定性、写入时、变异时）决定了遗忘失败模式的覆盖范围，变异时钩子方法在385例对抗测试中达到91.7-93.2%总体准确率，揭示了现有基准只测量召回而忽略遗忘问题的缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM记忆系统基准大量关注召回（recall）能力，但遗忘（forgetting）失败模式（如规范化解构、意图感知删除）未被充分测试，作者希望系统性地暴露不同记忆放置策略下的遗忘失败覆盖范围。

Method: 提出ForgetEval评估框架，包含1000例模板测试集和385例对抗层（132人工+253 LLM生成并经Oracle验证），使用确定性子串匹配评分。设计六方法Adapter Protocol（130行代码），支持异构记忆存储接入，配备诚实N/A评分机制。

Result: 确定性基元在词法/时间类别上有效但规范化解构仅5%（标识符混淆）和0%（跨语言）；写入时LLM恢复规范化解构（100%）但意图感知删除为0%；变异时钩子恢复意图感知删除（78-85%），总体准确率91.7-93.2%，每次运行成本0.17美元，延迟2.3s/例。10标注者一致性Fleiss' kappa=0.958，77例外部验证集复制了不对称性并放大联合放置提升（+27.8pt）。

Conclusion: 生产环境中的失败主要是遗忘失败而非召回失败，但现有基准仅测量召回。ForgetEval填补了这一空白，揭示了不同放置策略的互补覆盖特性，并提供了标准化评估工具。

Abstract: Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0% on cross-lingual); inscribe-time LLM recovers canonicalization (100%) but cannot help intent-aware deletion (0% on prefix-collision and compound-fact); a mutation-time hook recovers intent-aware deletion (78-85%) and brightens nearly all categories simultaneously (91.7-93.2% overall, $0.17 per 385-case run, 2.3s/case mutation latency vs. 64-191ms/case deterministic, recall path unchanged).
  We expose the trade-off via ForgetEval, a 1000-case templated suite plus a 385-case adversarial layer (132 hand-crafted + 253 LLM-drafted oracle-validated) scored by deterministic substring match, paired with a six-method Adapter Protocol with honest N/A scoring that lets heterogeneous memory stores enter in 130 lines. Admission is corroborated by 10-annotator IAA (Fleiss' kappa = 0.958) and a 77-case external-authored subset (four blind contributors) that replicates the canonicalization asymmetry and amplifies the joint-placement lift (+27.8 pt). Production failures are predominantly forgetting failures rather than recall failures, yet existing benchmarks measure only recall. ForgetEval and all adapters are released under MIT.

</details>


### [322] [Calibrated Triage, Not Autonomy: Confidence Estimation for Medical Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15910)
*Reza Khanmohammadi,Kundan Thind,Mohammad M. Ghassemi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 这篇论文研究了医疗视觉语言模型（LVLM）在回答医学图像问题时过度依赖语言先验而忽略图像信息的风险，评估了七种置信度估计方法在五个开源LVLM和三个医疗VQA数据集上的表现。研究发现，标准指标难以区分不同置信度方法的好坏，而真正有用的是高置信度区域的表现——最差的基线方法在41-45%的错误中表现自信，而最好的方法仅为1-4%。论文认为当前模型的可用角色是校准后的分诊（自动处理高置信度病例，其余由医生处理），而非完全自主。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗领域的视觉语言模型可能产生看似可信但实际错误的答案，这种"自信犯错"的失败模式在医疗场景中尤为危险。现有研究多关注准确率，但忽略了部署中更关键的问题：模型能安全处理多少工作？哪种置信度信号能可靠地告诉系统何时该弃权？动机是从部署角度而非准确率角度评估模型的实际可用性。

Method: 将问题转化为有界选择性预测（bounded selective prediction）框架，即仅当置信度超过阈值时才自动化处理病例，否则交给人类。评估了七种置信度估计方法（包括内省置信度、温度缩放、基于探针的方法等），在五个开源LVLM和三个医疗VQA数据集（涵盖临床影像、放射学、病理学）上测试。所有探针仅在自然图像上训练，未针对医疗领域做适应性调整。

Result: 1）标准判别指标几乎无法区分不同置信度方法的好坏；2）廉价的自报告置信度通过离域温度缩放可轻易改善校准，但不改变实际产出；3）区分方法优劣的关键是高置信度区域：最差的基线方法在41-45%的错误中表现出自信，而最好的探针仅1-4%；4）无任何置信度估计方法在跨领域和跨模型上表现一致最优；5）基础模型能力设定了天花板：良好校准的置信度在放射学中可在20%错误容忍度下恢复约三分之一的病例，但在病理学中几乎无效。

Conclusion: 当前医疗LVLM的可行角色是校准分诊（calibrated triage）而非自主决策：让模型处理被校准置信度标记为安全的病例，将其余病例转交给临床医生。安全交接受两个层面制约：基础模型能力设定上限，置信度层决定能达到该上限的多少。研究公开了所有输出、正确性判断和置信度分数及代码。

Abstract: A vision-language model can answer a question about a medical image fluently and confidently while barely using the image, leaning instead on language priors. In medicine this is the failure that matters most, because the answer looks trustworthy and is not, and the only protection is a confidence score reliable enough to tell the system when to abstain. We ask a deployment question rather than an accuracy one: how much imaging work a model can safely handle alone, and which confidence signal makes that possible. We evaluate seven confidence estimators across five open-weight LVLMs and three medical visual-question-answering datasets spanning broad clinical imaging, radiology, and pathology, with every probe trained only on natural images and applied without adaptation. Recast as bounded selective prediction (automate a case only when confidence clears a threshold, defer the rest), the comparison is cautionary.
