Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for automated decision-making systems in finance, healthcare, or environmental monitoring. Time series data are ubiquitous in these fields, yet hard to process automatically. Can time series be analyzed by LLM agents? We examine three approaches: providing the agent with raw numerical data, using the LLM as a coding agent, or a combination of both. In the coding agent setup, the model iteratively queries the data using Python code. Using two time series understanding benchmarks, we show that agents with code access can outperform models processing raw data by up to 10%. However, even the best performing agent still answers about 22-34% of the questions incorrectly. To get insights into models' strategies and reasoning gaps, we analyze the model outputs with a strong LLM judge. Our analysis reveals that coding agents can select appropriate statistical tests, but often miss important nuances. Meanwhile, models with access to raw data can reach the right conclusions using back-of-the-envelope calculations.

</details>


### [361] [The BD-LSC Dataset: Facilitating the Benchmarking of Models for Lexical Semantic Change Detection in Slang and Standard Usage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16560)
*Afnan Aloraini,Viktor Schlegel,Goran Nenadic,Riza Batista-Navarro*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出两个新基准数据集（BD-LSC和ST-WSD）来捕捉词汇语义的双向变化（意义获得与丧失），尤其是俚语与标准用法的混合情况。评估发现，虽然GPT-4o在精确匹配上表现最佳，但所有系统在稀有俚语义上的Macro-F1仅约0.5，说明该任务仍是开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语义变化检测方法难以捕捉词汇同时获得和丧失意义的双向变化，尤其缺乏针对同时具有俚语和标准用法的词汇的系统性基准。作者旨在填补这一评估空白。

Method: 构建了两个互补基准数据集：BD-LSC（捕捉三个时间段内语义的获得、丧失与稳定性）和ST-WSD（包含俚语与标准用法的细粒度实例级语义标注）。随后系统评估了无监督聚类、监督学习、Transformer和GPT-4o等大语言模型。

Result: 少样本GPT-4o在Exact Sense Match和多标签准确率上表现最佳；但所有系统的Macro-F1仅约0.5，表明稀有俚语义的检测仍是核心难题。

Conclusion: 双向语义变化检测（尤其是俚语-标准语义混合情况）仍具挑战，稀有俚语义的识别是当前最关键的开放问题。

Abstract: Automatic semantic change detection aims to identify how word meanings shift over time, offering insights into both linguistic and societal change. Despite recent progress in computational lexical semantic change (LSC), existing benchmarks and methods struggle to capture bi-directional semantic change, particularly cases where words simultaneously gain and lose senses. This problem is especially challenging for words that have both slang and standard meanings. To address these gaps, we introduce two complementary benchmark datasets. The Bi-Directional Lexical Semantic Change (BD-LSC) dataset captures sense gain, sense loss, and stability across three time periods, enabling the study of complex semantic trajectories. The SlangTrack Word Sense Disambiguation (ST-WSD) dataset provides fine-grained, instance-level sense annotations for words combining slang and standard usages, supporting systematic benchmarking of WSD and semantic change detection models. Using these benchmarks, we systematically evaluate models across different methodological families: unsupervised clustering using contextualised embeddings, supervised machine learning, transformer-based models, and state-of-the-art large language models. Among the evaluated systems, the few-shot GPT-4o model achieved the strongest aggregate performance on Exact Sense Match (ESM) and multi-label accuracy; however, Macro-F1 scores near 0.5 across all systems show that rare slang senses remain difficult, which we identify as the central open challenge.

</details>


### [362] [Fast When, Careful Who: Dual-Process Multiparty Turn-Taking with Diffusion Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16568)
*Rutherford A. Patamia,Ming Liu,Wei Luo,Favour Ekong,Akan Cosgun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个两阶段管道模型，用于多说话人场景下的轮流说话检测。第一阶段快速扫描音频提出候选结束时间，第二阶段验证器在候选时间点判断是保持还是转移，并支持下一说话者预测。在VoxConverse数据集上实验，结合扩散增强后效果提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轮流说话方法多针对双人对话，无法处理多人场景中的重叠与快速切换问题。

Method: 两阶段流水线：快速触发器扫描音频提出候选结束时间，轻量验证器仅在候选时间运行，判断保持或转移并预测下一说话者。此外采用扩散增强作为数据扩充策略。

Result: 在完整多人设置和受控双人投影设置下均有改进，扩散增强进一步提升了转移检测性能。

Conclusion: 两阶段方法与扩散增强能有效应对多人对话中复杂的轮流切换问题。

Abstract: Reliable turn-taking is essential for spoken dialogue systems. However, most existing methods are designed for two-speaker interaction and struggle with realistic multiparty audio containing overlap and rapid speaker changes. We study multiparty turn-taking on the VoxConverse dataset and propose an audio-only two-stage pipeline that separates when to trigger a turn boundary from whether the floor is actually transferring. A fast trigger scans the audio and proposes candidate end-of-turn times, while a lightweight verifier runs only at those times to decide \textsc{Hold} or \textsc{Shift} and support next-speaker prediction. We report results in the full multiparty setting and a controlled dyadic top-2 projection for comparability. We also investigate diffusion-based, label-preserving background-audio mixing as a data augmentation strategy. Results show improved shift detection over a baseline, with further improvements from diffusion augmentation.

</details>


### [363] [Can LLM Agents Infer World Models? Evidence from Agentic Automata Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16576)
*Reef Menaged,Gili Lior,Shauli Ravfogel,Roee Aharoni,Gabriel Stanovsky*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向智能体自动机学习的评估框架，通过让LLM智能体与黑盒交互来发现隐藏的确定性有限自动机（DFA）。实验表明，随着DFA规模增大，模型表现急剧下降；推理模型优于非推理模型，但在查询规划、证据整合和假设构建方面仍存在系统性失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的LLM智能体评估缺乏对交互式环境探索能力的受控测试。作者希望构建一个可量化的基准，测试LLM智能体能否像经典算法一样，通过与环境的交互来发现隐藏的底层结构。

Method: 将经典的自动机学习范式（成员查询和等价查询）引入LLM智能体评估。智能体需要通过与Oracle交互来学习一个未知的DFA。作者使用不同规模的DFA作为隐藏任务，对比了经典算法（如L*算法）与多种LLM智能体的表现。

Result: 1) 随着DFA状态数增加，所有LLM智能体的性能急剧下降；2) 推理模型（如链式推理模型）明显优于非推理模型；3) 轨迹分析发现，智能体在查询规划、证据整合和假设构建环节存在系统性失败模式。

Conclusion: 当前LLM智能体能在一定程度上完成非平凡的交互式发现任务，但在鲁棒性和效率上仍远不如经典的自动机学习算法。这揭示了LLM在结构化推理和交互式探索方面的根本性局限。

Abstract: We propose agentic automata learning to evaluate the extent to which tool-calling LLM agents can uncover hidden environments through interaction. In our setup, an agent should uncover a hidden deterministic finite automaton (DFA) by interacting with an oracle through (1) membership queries ("Does this string belong to the target language?") and (2) equivalence queries ("Is this the target DFA?"). This yields a scalable testbed with controlled task complexity, measurable interaction efficiency, and strong baselines (classic automata-learning algorithms). Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that performance drops sharply as DFA size increases. Reasoning models are markedly stronger than non-reasoning models, yet trajectory analyses reveal recurring failures in query planning, evidence integration, and hypothesis construction. Overall, our results show that current LLM agents can sometimes perform non-trivial interactive discovery, but remain far less robust and efficient than classic algorithms for the task.

</details>


### [364] [Uncertainty Is Not a Safety Net for Clinical VQA, but Can It Anticipate Model Failure?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16583)
*Arnisa Fazla,Alberto Testoni,Ameen Abu-Hanna,Barbara Plank,Iacer Calixto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 当前临床视觉语言模型的不确定性估计质量并非内在属性，而是随模型准确性波动；在面对干扰时模型准确性崩溃但不确定性变化不大，导致校准失败；然而不确定性可用于诊断模型脆弱性，提示应将其作为诊断工具并结合扰动评估来保障临床部署安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床视觉语言模型的安全部署需要可靠的不确定性估计，以判断何时应信任预测或交由临床医生处理。作者希望测试当前不确定性估计方法是否真的能提供这种信号。

Method: 在12个临床VLM上基准测试8种不确定性估计方法，在临床视觉问答任务上进行评估；通过隐藏正确选项（NOTA扰动）进行压力测试，观察不确定性与准确性的变化关系。

Result: 不确定性估计质量与模型准确性高度相关，在模型表现最差的地方不确定性估计也最差；NOTA扰动下准确性崩溃但不确定性变化很小，导致系统校准失败；但未扰动输入的不确定性可以可靠预测哪些预测会在NOTA下崩溃。

Conclusion: 不确定性估计应定位为诊断工具用于识别脆弱预测；扰动式评估是通往安全临床部署的有效路径。

Abstract: Safe deployment of clinical vision-language models (VLMs) requires reliable uncertainty estimation (UE): a signal indicating when predictions should be trusted or escalated to a clinician. We test whether current UE methods actually deliver this signal. Benchmarking 8 methods across 12 VLMs on clinical visual question-answering (VQA), we find that UE quality is not an intrinsic property of the UE method: it tracks model accuracy, degrading precisely where the model performance is weakest, and therefore where reliability is most needed. When we stress-test models by hiding the correct option among the multiple-choice answers (NOTA perturbations), accuracy collapses while uncertainty barely changes, leaving models systematically miscalibrated. Yet, we find that uncertainty on the unperturbed input reliably anticipates which predictions will collapse under NOTA, indicating that UE in current VLMs carries diagnostic information about model fragility. Our results position UE as a diagnostic tool for identifying fragile predictions and motivate perturbation-based evaluation as a path toward safe clinical deployment.

</details>


### [365] [SING: Synthetic Intention Graph for Scalable Active Tool Discovery in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16591)
*Qiao Xiao,Haochen Shi,Yisen Gao,Wenbin Hu,Huihao Jing,Tianshi Zheng,Baixuan Xu,Ziheng Zhang,Weiqi Wang,Haoran Li,Jiaxin Bai,Yangqiu Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出SING框架，通过构建意图-工具图（intention-tool graph）实现动态工具检索，在7,471个工具语料上Global Recall@5提升59.8%，下游成功率提升28.9%，同时减少99.8%的工具模式暴露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM agent依赖固定工具清单（封闭世界假设），当工具生态系统扩展到成百上千个API时，穷举注入成本高昂；而检索增强的工具选择方法中，一次性检索难以对齐工具描述与agent的真实任务意图，尤其在长期任务中所需能力随任务分解、观察和新子目标而动态变化。

Method: SING（Intention-Aware Active Tool Discovery）框架：构建意图-工具图，链接用户意图、工具能力和工具协作模式；根据演化的任务状态动态检索工具。

Result: 在7,471个工具的统一语料上，基于三个真实世界工具使用基准评估：Global Recall@5提升高达59.8%，下游任务成功率提升高达28.9%，全语料工具模式暴露减少99.8%。

Conclusion: 意图感知的图结构能够在大规模agent生态系统中实现更准确且上下文高效的工具发现，验证了动态、意图驱动的工具检索在替代静态工具清单方面的有效性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on agent harnesses that manage context, tools, and multi-turn execution, making tools a central interface for acting in realistic digital environments. As harness-connected tool ecosystems expand to hundreds or thousands of APIs, services, and task-specific skills, exhaustive tool schema injection becomes costly and imposes a closed-world assumption that limits agents to a predefined static inventory. Retrieval-augmented tool selection offers a natural alternative, but existing one-shot retrieval methods often fail to align isolated tool descriptions with the agent's true task intention, especially in long-horizon tasks where required capabilities emerge through decomposition, observations, and newly induced subgoals. We propose SING, an intention-aware active tool discovery framework that builds an intention-tool graph linking user intentions, tool capabilities, and tool collaboration patterns, and dynamically retrieves tools according to evolving task states. Using a unified corpus of 7,471 tools, we evaluate SING on three real-world tool-use benchmarks. SING improves Global Recall@5 by up to 59.8% and downstream success rate by up to 28.9% over baselines, while reducing full-corpus tool-schema exposure by 99.8%, demonstrating that intention-aware graph structure enables more accurate and context-efficient tool discovery in large-scale agentic ecosystems.

</details>


### [366] [How Far Can Machine Translation Quality Take You? Extrinsic Discourse Evaluation in Goal-Oriented Setups](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16596)
*Wafaa Mohammed,Kata Naszadi,Vlad Niculae*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出两种外在语篇评估框架（静态和交互式），通过实体计数任务和福利外交游戏证明：高内在翻译质量并不能保证语篇层面的连贯性，翻译错误会显著影响下游任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器翻译评估和语篇评价主要关注内在翻译质量，缺乏对翻译错误在下游任务中实际后果的度量。

Method: 1) 静态评估：提出实体计数任务，检测语篇中的指称一致性；2) 交互评估：基于多智能体"福利外交"游戏，测试长程沟通与协调能力。

Result: 高内在翻译质量并不能可靠预测下游语篇任务成功；即使是强翻译系统仍会产生指称不一致；交互特有的翻译失败会损害下游协调。

Conclusion: 以目标为导向的环境可作为语篇敏感的机器翻译外在评估的有效框架。

Abstract: Existing machine translation (MT) metrics and discourse-focused evaluations primarily assess translation quality intrinsically, without measuring the downstream consequences of translation errors. In this work, we focus on extrinsic discourse evaluation of machine translation under two distinct regimes: static and interactive. Under the static regime, we propose an entity counting task as a probe of referential consistency in discourse. We show that high intrinsic MT quality does not reliably predict downstream discourse success and strong MT systems still produce referential inconsistencies. For the interactive regime, we study the goal-oriented multi-agent Welfare Diplomacy game as a probe of long-horizon communication and coordination. We find that interaction-specific translation failures impact downstream coordination. Our results highlight goal-oriented environments as a viable framework for discourse-sensitive extrinsic MT evaluation.

</details>


### [367] [VeriGraph: Towards Verifiable Data-Analytic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16603)
*Jiajie Jin,Zhao Yang,Wenle Liao,Yuyang Hu,Guanting Dong,Xiaoxi Li,Yutao Zhu,Zhicheng Dou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出VeriGraph框架，通过构建显式的异质证据有向无环图来增强LLM智能体在数据分析任务中的可验证性，实验表明该方法在多个基准上取得最优结果，且证据图的可审计性显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体在数据分析任务中输出难以验证：线性文本轨迹将数值计算与语义推理混在一起，导致结论难以复现和审计。

Method: 提出VeriGraph，一种可追踪的神经符号推理框架。核心包括：1) 三种证据扩展原语（计算扩展、基础扩展、推导扩展）构建异质证据DAG；2) 将结构可追踪性归约到图可达性，语义支持通过证据评估衡量；3) 基于图的策略优化，使用复合奖励函数监督答案正确性、计算完整性和推导连贯性。

Result: VeriGraph-8B在四个基准上取得最高总分，Grounding Rate达到87.61%。

Conclusion: 显式证据图构建是实现可验证数据分析智能体的有效路径。

Abstract: LLM-based agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in data-intensive analytical tasks, yet their outputs are rarely verifiable: a reliance on linear text trajectories makes their reasoning difficult to audit. In particular, deterministic computations over raw data and semantic deductions over natural-language claims are often entangled in an unstructured stream, leaving numerical conclusions hard to reproduce and qualitative judgments hard to inspect. To address this, we propose VeriGraph, a traceable neuro-symbolic reasoning framework that enables agents to construct an explicit heterogeneous evidence directed acyclic graph (DAG) during execution. VeriGraph introduces three evidence-expansion primitives, namely computational, grounding, and derivational expansion, to connect raw data, interpreter variables, computed results, and natural-language claims in a unified graph. Under this formulation, structural traceability is reduced to graph reachability from raw data sources to terminal claims, while semantic support is measured by claim-level evidence evaluation. To improve graph construction, we further design a graph-based policy optimization strategy with a composite reward that jointly supervises answer correctness, computational integrity, and derivational coherence. Experiments on four benchmarks show that VeriGraph-8B achieves the highest overall score among all baselines. More importantly, VeriGraph produces auditable evidence graphs with substantially stronger claim grounding, achieving a 87.61\% Grounding Rate under our claim-level evidence support evaluation. These results suggest that explicit evidence-graph construction is a promising path toward verifiable data-analytic agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/ignorejjj/VeriGraph.

</details>


### [368] [Sycophancy as Material Failure under Pushback Loading: A Multi-Axis Characterization Across Three Loading Cases and up to Seventeen Material Charges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16617)
*Ferdinand M. Schessl*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文采用材料科学框架（对话=试样、LLM=材料、反驳=渐进载荷、立场翻转=材料失效），对LLM中的谄媚行为进行多轴测量与表征。基于7800个样本（辩论、错误预设、伦理场景三类载荷工况），通过14个回合级轴测量及3个说话者级独立轴，揭示了谄媚行为的力学耦合规律、方差组成模式，并发现了跨裁判可靠性的显著差异（辩论场景稳健，错误预设场景敏感）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有70+篇论文记录了LLM的谄媚行为，但专家对构念边界的共识极低（ICC=.184），因为行为分类取决于所偏好的表面形式（surface form）。作者旨在克服这一碎片化问题，提供一种不依赖特定表面形式的多轴表征方法。

Method: 采用材料科学类比（对话=试验试样、LLM模型=材料电荷、反驳=渐进载荷、立场翻转=材料失效），设计三种载荷工况（辩论n=1000、错误预设n=3400、伦理场景n=3400），共7800个样本，每种工况使用10-17种不同材料电荷。构建14个回合级轴测量（速度、损伤累积、框架漂移、脆性、方向稳定性）和3个说话者级独立轴，进行Hooke耦合分析、方差成分分解和跨裁判可靠性评估。

Result: 测量存在Hooke耦合（σ=E·ε类似物），跨载荷工况可复现，辩论场景效应量达|r_rb|=0.35；符号结构呈现第二模式：伦理场景反转了速度和累积块。方差组成分为两种剖面：辩论为电荷主导（脆性断裂型：材料等级决定），错误预设和伦理场景为主题主导（蠕变型：载荷决定），比值为2.03 vs 0.13/0.17（辩论方向甚至存在估算依赖）。跨裁判可靠性：辩论稳健（κ=0.88），错误预设敏感（κ=0.36）。

Conclusion: 本文提供了Ye等人诊断中所呼唤的方法论转向：一种不依赖于构念的特定表面形式的多轴表征方法。同时揭示了单裁判基准测试必须报告跨裁判可靠性这一关键警示。

Abstract: Sycophancy in LLMs is documented across 70+ papers, but expert agreement on construct boundaries remains low (ICC=.184; Ye et al., 2026). The construct fragments because behavioral classification depends on which surface form is privileged. We adopt a materials-science framing: conversation as test specimen under load, LLM-model as material charge, pushback as progressive load, stance-flip as material failure. We characterize this failure across three loading cases (debate n=1000; false-presuppositions n=3400; ethical-setting n=3400; 10-17 material charges per case; 7800 specimens total) using 14 turn-level axis-measurements spanning velocity, damage accumulation, frame-drift, brittleness, and direction stability, plus three speaker-resolved axes from an independent pipeline. The measurements are Hooke-coupled ($σ= E \cdot \varepsilon$ analog) and reproduce across loading cases with effects up to $|r_{rb}| = 0.35$ on debate; the sign structure adds a second pattern: the ethical-setting case inverts the velocity and accumulation blocks. Variance composition partitions into two profiles: debate is charge-dominated (brittle-fracture-like: the material grade decides), false-presuppositions and ethical-setting are topic-dominated (creep-like: the load decides); the ratios (2.03 vs 0.13/0.17) are estimator-dependent, for debate even in direction. Cross-judge reliability (GPT-4o vs Haiku 4.5) shows debate scoring is judge-robust (Cohen's $κ= 0.88$) while false-presupposition scoring is judge-sensitive ($κ= 0.36$) -- a caveat single-judge benchmarks must report. This is the methodological move Ye et al.'s diagnosis calls for: a multi-axis characterization that does not depend on which surface form of the construct one privileges.

</details>


### [369] [Islamic Large Language Models: From Knowledge Acquisition to Trustworthy and Hallucination-Resistant AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16629)
*Mohammed Amine Mouhoub*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文综述了伊斯兰大语言模型（LLMs）与可信伊斯兰AI的发展现状，指出仅具备阿拉伯语能力不足以构建可靠的伊斯兰AI，系统还需依赖 curated 资料、检索验证模块、引文感知生成、教法学派（madhhab-aware）推理、人类专家评估以及衡量忠实性、来源有效性和推理质量的基准测试，最后提出了抗幻觉伊斯兰AI的研究议程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 伊斯兰知识问答对LLMs提出独特挑战：答案需基于权威来源、引文必须精确、古典阿拉伯语与现代变体差异大、且必须呈现合法的教法分歧而非单一答案。现有通用LLMs难以满足这些要求，亟需专门化的伊斯兰AI系统。

Method: 通过调研综述的方式，围绕阿拉伯语NLP、伊斯兰NLP资源、古兰经问答、检索增强生成、伊斯兰法律推理、遗产继承推理、幻觉评估和可信度等主题，系统梳理该新兴领域的研究工作。

Result: 发现当前伊斯兰LLMs的主要挑战包括：引文准确性不足、教法分歧处理不当、幻觉问题严重、缺乏高质量的评估基准。现有模型在阿拉伯语流利度上虽然有进步，但在知识忠实性和推理质量上仍有显著差距。

Conclusion: 构建可信伊斯兰AI需要综合方案：curaated 资料库、检索与验证模块、引文感知生成、教法学派推理、人类专家评估，以及专门衡量忠实性、来源有效性和推理质量的基准。文章最后提出了抗幻觉伊斯兰AI系统的研究议程。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for knowledge-intensive question answering, including religious and legal questions. Islamic knowledge is a particularly demanding setting: answers are expected to be grounded in authoritative sources, citations must be exact, Arabic varieties differ substantially from the language of classical sources, and legitimate jurisprudential disagreement must be represented rather than collapsed into a single answer. This survey reviews the emerging field of Islamic LLMs and trustworthy Islamic AI. We organize the literature around Arabic NLP and Arabic-centric LLMs, Islamic NLP resources, Qur'anic question answering, Islamic knowledge benchmarks, retrieval-augmented generation, Islamic legal reasoning, inheritance reasoning, hallucination evaluation, and trustworthiness. We argue that fluency in Arabic is not sufficient for Islamic AI. Reliable systems require curated sources, retrieval and verification modules, citation-aware generation, madhhab-aware reasoning, human expert evaluation, and benchmarks that measure not only answer accuracy but also faithfulness, source validity, and reasoning quality. The survey concludes with a research agenda for hallucination-resistant Islamic AI systems.

</details>


### [370] [FraudSMSWalker: Benchmarking Agentic Large Language Models for SMS-to-Webpage Fraud Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16659)
*Y. H. Zhou,Z. M. Ma,Y. J. Zhou,Y. T. Li,H. X. Xiang,Y. M. Cheng,T. L. Chen,K. J. Zhang,Z. H. Nan,J. H. Ni,Z. Wu,Q. Y. Pan,S. Zhang,S. Cheng,M. Y. Luo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出FraudSMSWalker，一个用于评估URL被屏蔽情况下跨渠道SMS诈骗判断能力的基准测试集，包含699条中英双语样本链，实验表明当前智能体在屏蔽声誉捷径后难以兼顾准确率与证据支撑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SMS诈骗评估要么只关注短信本身的分类，要么暴露URL和域名线索让模型依赖声誉捷径（如黑名单），无法衡量模型在跨渠道场景下真正基于证据判断的能力。

Method: 构建699条双语SMS-网页证据链（332欺诈+367良性），覆盖10个服务场景；模型输入仅包含短信上下文和脱敏网页证据，隐藏原始URL、域名、IP、重定向和声誉元数据；设计了包含登录、支付等元素的困难良性样本；采用屏蔽浏览器协议评估9个Web智能体，并进行URL可见性消融实验。

Result: 当前智能体能够检测可疑线索，但在保持良性样本召回率方面存在困难，且其正向预测结果往往缺乏观察证据的充分支持。

Conclusion: FraudSMSWalker可作为衡量Web智能体在声誉捷径被抑制时能否做出既准确又基于证据的诈骗判断的基准。

Abstract: SMS fraud is increasingly cross-channel: a message directs the user to a webpage, and the final risk depends on how the SMS claim aligns with the page content and requested user action. However, existing evaluations either focus on message-only smishing classification or expose URL and domain cues that allow models to rely on reputation shortcuts. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{FraudSMSWalker}, a controlled benchmark for URL-masked SMS-to-webpage fraud judgment. FraudSMSWalker contains 699 bilingual chains, including 332 fraudulent and 367 benign cases, across ten service scenarios. The model-visible input consists of the SMS context and sanitized webpage evidence, while raw URLs, hosts, domains, IPs, redirects, and reputation metadata are withheld. The benchmark further includes hard benign cases whose pages contain login, payment, verification, or account-management elements that are plausible under the service context but also appear in scam flows. We evaluate nine web agents under masked browser-agent protocols and conduct URL-visibility ablations. The results show that current agents can detect suspicious cues, but struggle to preserve benign recall and often produce positive predictions that are weakly supported by the observed evidence. These findings position FraudSMSWalker as a benchmark for measuring whether web agents can make fraud judgments that remain both accurate and evidence-grounded when direct reputation shortcuts are suppressed. The associated code and dataset are accessible at the \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/FraudMessageWalker-Bench}{anonymous link}.

</details>


### [371] [Progressive Knowledge-Guided Large Language Model Framework for Bearing Fault Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16684)
*Jinghan Wang,Gaoliang Peng,Yanjun Chen,Wei Zhang,Wentao Wu,Tianchen Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种渐进式物理引导的多尺度振动信号处理框架，通过81维物理可追溯特征空间、故障自适应信号分割和隐式机制知识编码，在四个公开数据集上达到98.49%的诊断准确率，计算成本降低12.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决轴承故障诊断中三个相互关联的测量挑战：全局统计特征效率与局部瞬态信号保真度之间的权衡、测量特征对底层故障物理的可追溯性不足、跨诊断尺度的多源测量信息融合效率低。

Method: 1) 基于轴承运动学理论和特征缺陷频率构建81维物理可追溯测量描述子；2) 故障自适应信号分割机制，利用物理先验引导关注故障相关波形区域；3) 在训练过程中将结构化故障机制知识隐式编码到模型参数中，实现自主多尺度测量融合。

Result: 在四个公开基准数据集上达到98.49%的诊断准确率，计算成本相比信号级基线降低12.6倍，特征激活与轴承故障力学机制一致。

Conclusion: 该框架有效统一解决了三个测量挑战，兼具高精度、低计算成本和物理可解释性，适用于安全关键工业系统。

Abstract: Vibration-based bearing fault diagnosis requires resolving three interrelated measurement challenges, including the trade-off between global statistical feature efficiency and local transient signal fidelity, insufficient traceability of measurement features to underlying fault physics, and ineffective multi-source measurement information fusion across diagnostic scales. This paper presents a progressive physics-guided multi-scale vibration signal processing framework that addresses all three challenges within a unified diagnostic pipeline. An 81-dimensional measurement descriptor, derived from bearing kinematic theory and characteristic defect frequencies, establishes a physically traceable feature space enabling real-time fault screening at approximately 20 ms per sample. A fault-adaptive signal segmentation mechanism then directs analytical attention toward fault-relevant waveform regions guided by physics-based priors, without manual feature engineering. Structured fault mechanism knowledge is further encoded implicitly in model parameters during training, enabling autonomous multi-scale measurement fusion without external knowledge dependencies at inference. Validated on four public benchmark datasets under diverse operating conditions, the framework achieves 98.49% diagnostic accuracy with a 12.6-fold reduction in computational cost relative to signal-level baselines. Interpretability analysis confirms that diagnostic feature activations align with established bearing fault mechanics, supporting measurement traceability in safety-critical industrial systems.

</details>


### [372] [Multi-Turn Reflective Masking Elicits Reasoning in Mask Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16700)
*Yanming Zhang,Yihan Bian,Jingyuan Qi,Yuguang Yao,Lifu Huang,Tianyi Zhou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Reflective Masking (RM)方法，通过轻量级后训练使掩码扩散模型支持多轮掩码和去噪，实现类似人类纠错的迭代局部精炼能力，在文本生成、数独和图像编辑等任务中优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型在推理时依赖完全顺序生成，即使只需要局部编辑也会从头重新生成；而掩码扩散模型虽天然支持局部编辑，但现有方法不支持多轮掩码与去噪过程，无法充分利用迭代精炼的优势。

Method: 提出Reflective Masking (RM)，通过轻量级后训练使MDM支持多轮迭代掩码和去噪；引入History Reference机制，利用先前轮次的中间去噪状态作为参考，无需额外参数。

Result: 在文本生成、数独和图像编辑等多种任务和模态中，Reflective Masking均优于标准掩码基线方法，展现出强泛化能力。

Conclusion: Reflective Masking为掩码扩散模型提供了一种原生测试时扩展的推理范式，无需架构改动即可广泛应用，可作为MDM推理的基本原语。

Abstract: While reasoning on autoregressive (AR) models is often performed by chain-of-thought reasoning and reflection, their refinement of previous outputs still relies on fully sequential generation, even when only local edits are needed. In contrast, the masking mechanism in Mask Diffusion Models (MDMs) naturally supports explicit local edits on previous outputs, allowing selective refinement without discarding previous answers and generating another from scratch. While this property more closely aligns with how humans correct mistakes by iterative local refinement, existing MDMs do not support multi-turn masking and denoising. We propose Reflective Masking (RM), which elicits such an intrinsic reasoning capability in MDMs via lightweight post-training. RM provides a native test-time scaling, where an MDM iteratively revisits and revises its prior outputs based on evolving context. To exploit insights from previous turns like AR reasoning, we further introduce History Reference, a parameter-free mechanism that leverages intermediate denoising states during revision. Our approach requires no architectural changes and is easily applicable to existing MDMs. Across diverse tasks and modalities, including text generation, Sudoku, and image editing, Reflective Masking consistently outperforms standard masking-based baselines and demonstrates strong generality, positioning RM as a fundamental primitive for reasoning on MDMs.

</details>


### [373] [P3B3: A Multi-Turn Conversational Benchmark for Measuring European and Brazilian Portuguese Variety Bias in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16753)
*Rafael Ferreira,Inês Vieira,Inês Calvo,James Furtado,Iago Paulo,Diogo Tavares,Diogo Glória-Silva,David Semedo,João Magalhães*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了P3B3基准测试，用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）在葡萄牙语欧陆变体（pt-PT）和巴西变体（pt-BR）之间的偏好偏差。实验表明大多数LLM存在对pt-BR的强烈偏好，且不同模型的可控性存在差异，揭示了语言变体表征不平衡的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM在日常交流中广泛应用，捕捉区域语言变体差异对于实现可靠和公平的语言使用至关重要。葡萄牙语的欧洲变体（pt-PT）和巴西变体（pt-BR）在数据量上严重不平衡（pt-BR占主导），而LLM对葡萄牙语变体的偏好尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 构建了P3B3基准测试，这是一个由专家策划的、语言变体不可知的对话提示集，同时提出了一个评估框架用于衡量变体偏差和可控性。

Result: 实验发现大多数LLM表现出对pt-BR的强烈偏差，不同模型在可控性方面存在差异。

Conclusion: 研究结果突显了需要在多种语言变体之间实现更均衡的多语言表征，以促进LLM的公平性和可靠性。

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become embedded in everyday communication, capturing regional linguistic variation is essential for reliable and equitable language use. In Portuguese, European (pt-PT) and Brazilian (pt-BR) varieties remain unevenly represented, with pt-BR dominating in data quantity, while LLM preference for Portuguese variants remains underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce P3B3, an expert-curated language variety agnostic benchmark of conversational prompts, along with an evaluation framework for measuring variety bias and controllability. Experiments on several models show that most LLMs exhibit a strong bias toward pt-BR, with variation in controllability across models. These results highlight the need for more balanced multilingual representation across language varieties.

</details>


### [374] [The Art of Mixology: Mixup-based Obfuscation for Privacy-Preserving Split Learning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16801)
*Chen Chen,Xiang Gao,Xianshun Wang,Chengran Li,Shengyu Xia,Xueluan Gong,Linru Zhang,Qian Wang,Kwok-Yan Lam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出MIXGUARD，一种基于混合（mixup）的隐私保护拆分学习框架，通过令牌级混淆、表示级混淆和自适应梯度扰动三种机制协同工作，在保护大语言模型训练隐私的同时保持模型效用，实验证明其在多个任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐私保护拆分学习方法在效用、隐私、效率和稳定性之间存在难以平衡的困境，要么效用严重下降，要么易受数据重建攻击，要么计算通信开销过大，要么性能不稳定。

Method: MIXGUARD提出三种核心机制：1）令牌级混淆（token-level obfuscation）；2）表示级混淆（representation-level obfuscation）；3）自适应梯度扰动（adaptive gradient perturbation）。首先在公共数据集上构建轻量级校准模型来精炼近似目标表示，然后将该模型应用于私有数据的隐私保护微调过程。

Result: 在四个分类任务和四个文本生成任务上，跨越多个LLM系列、模型规模、架构和微调策略进行实验，MIXGUARD的模型效用与非拆分训练基线相当，隐私保护能力持续强于现有拆分学习防御方法，且在自适应攻击设置下仍保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MIXGUARD有效解决了拆分学习中效用与隐私的权衡问题，为资源受限用户在训练大语言模型时提供了更安全、高效且稳定的隐私保护方案。

Abstract: Split learning provides a practical paradigm for resource-constrained users to train Large Language Models (LLMs) by offloading computation-intensive layers to a server while keeping raw data local. However, existing privacy-preserving split learning methods still face a difficult trade-off among utility, privacy, efficiency, and stability. Specifically, these methods often suffer from substantial utility degradation, remain vulnerable to advanced data reconstruction attacks, incur prohibitive computational and communication overhead, or exhibit unstable performance across different tasks. In this paper, we propose MIXGUARD, a novel mixup-based privacy-preserving split learning framework for LLMs. MIXGUARD introduces token-level obfuscation, representation-level obfuscation, and adaptive gradient perturbation mechanisms, which operate jointly to preserve useful learning signals while preventing privacy leakage to the server. Technically, MIXGUARD first constructs a lightweight calibration model on a public dataset to refine the approximated target representation, and then applies this model during privacy-preserving fine-tuning on private data. We conduct extensive experiments on four classification tasks and four text generation tasks across multiple LLM families, model sizes, architectures, and fine-tuning strategies. The results show that MIXGUARD preserves model utility comparable to non-split training baselines, consistently achieves stronger privacy protection than existing split learning defense methods against state-of-the-art data reconstruction attacks, and remains robust under adaptive attack settings.

</details>


### [375] [LLM-based Visual Code Completion for Aerospace Geometric Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16806)
*Hau Kit Yong,Robert Marsh,Edmar A. Silva,András Sóbester,Stuart E. Middleton*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的视觉编程副驾驶系统（使用ReAct方法和GPT 5.4），用于航空航天工程几何设计任务，并开发了Wingbuilder插件和AVPD数据集。用户试验表明系统能生成有用的建议，但推理速度较慢，限制了其在复杂任务中的实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 航空航天行业重视安全性和可解释性，目前尚无商用LLM几何设计副驾驶系统，因此需要开发适合该领域、兼具可视化编程与解释性的AI辅助设计工具。

Method: 基于视觉编程变体的ReAct方法，结合GPT 5.4构建副驾驶应用；开发Wingbuilder Grasshopper插件库用于航空航天几何抽象；构建包含18个专家设计任务及参考答案的AVPD数据集。

Result: 两名航空航天工程师的用户试验显示，系统生成的建议被认为有帮助；ReAct方法有效，但推理速度慢，仅对复杂耗时任务有价值；参与者表示喜欢该工具并愿意未来使用。

Conclusion: LLM视觉编程副驾驶在航空航天设计领域具有潜力，但ReAct推理速度是当前主要瓶颈，限制了其在简单任务中的实用性，未来需优化推理效率。

Abstract: Recent advances in both Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have seen a step change in their ability to perform visual code completion, but the aerospace industry, which prioritizes safety and explainabilty over rapid LLM adoption, currently has no publicly announced LLM-based geometric design copilot systems in commercial use by aerospace Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs). This paper presents a LLM-based visual programming copilot application for aerospace engineering design tasks, using a visual programming variant of the ReAct methodology and GPT 5.4. In addition to the copilot, we describe Wingbuilder, a new Grasshopper plugin library with custom components for aerospace-specific geometry abstraction, and an associated Aerospace Visual Programming Dataset (AVPD) with 18 aerospace expert designed tasks at different levels of difficulty alongside ground truth solutions. We evaluate our copilot application with a user trial involving two experienced aerospace engineers from a large aircraft manufacturing company. We find our copilot visual programming ReAct methodology was successful in generating suggestions that participants found helpful, but slow ReAct inference times limit its usefulness to more complex time-consuming tasks where waiting for good copilot solution suggestion was worthwhile. Participants reported they liked the tool and would be willing to use it in the future.

</details>


### [376] [Connecting Speech to Words through Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16807)
*Gabriel Pirlogeanu,Dan Oneata,Horia Cucu,Herman Kamper*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需文本监督的视觉-语音映射方法，通过图像和语音描述学习口头词汇，在单词检索和关键词检测任务上优于强基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在缺乏文本标注的情况下，如何建立书面单词与其口语发音之间的映射关系。

Method: 1) 利用图像字幕系统构建视觉概念的书面词汇表；2) 对每个单词，找到包含该词的图像描述对应的语音；3) 使用无监督词发现技术对齐语音片段以定位目标词汇。

Result: 在口语单词检索和关键词检测实验中，提出的方法优于强神经基线模型，且更具可解释性。

Conclusion: 该方法在英语中验证了可行性，并为未来在缺乏文本转录的低资源语言上应用提供了动机。

Abstract: How can we learn the mapping between written words and their spoken counterparts in the absence of explicit textual supervision? We present a visually grounded method for building a vocabulary of spoken words using only images and their spoken descriptions. First, image captioning systems are used to build a vocabulary of written words representing salient visual concepts in the images. For each word, we then find utterances whose image captions contain that word. Then we use an unsupervised word discovery technique to align these utterances to locate instances of the target word. The result is spoken word segments that are linked to written words -- all accomplished without any text supervision. In spoken word retrieval and keyword spotting experiments, the proposed approach outperforms a strong neural baseline while being more interpretable. These results demonstrate the feasibility of the approach in English and motivate future work on low-resource languages without transcripts.

</details>


### [377] [Tying the Loop -- Tied Expert Layers in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16825)
*Martin Jaggi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出"Expert Tying"方法，通过跨层共享专家参数，在保持独立路由和注意力的前提下，将MoE模型内存占用降低近2倍，且几乎不损失性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE架构虽然通过稀疏激活降低了计算成本，但完整参数（尤其是专家参数）仍需加载到内存中，导致训练和推理的内存开销巨大。研究者希望在不显著牺牲性能的前提下压缩内存占用。

Method: 在连续Transformer层之间共享专家参数（Expert Tying），但保持每层独立的路由选择和注意力机制。在OLMoE、Qwen3、DeepSeek等主流MoE架构上验证。

Result: 内存占用降低近2倍（约50%），困惑度和下游任务质量几乎没有退化。利用了MoE路径中固有的参数冗余。

Conclusion: Expert Tying提供了一种极为有利的计算-内存权衡，为下一代LLM的高效训练和扩展提供了新思路。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures efficiently scale Large Language Models (LLMs) by activating only a small fraction of their experts per token, yet the full parameter count - dominated by the expert parameters - must be held in training and inference memory. To address this, we introduce Expert Tying, an architectural modification that shares expert parameters across consecutive transformer layers while preserving independent, layer-wise routing and attention.
  We evaluate this approach across common, state-of-the-art architectures, including OLMoE, Qwen3, and DeepSeek-style MoEs. Our pretraining experiments demonstrate that tying experts can reduce memory footprint by almost 2x at virtually no degradation in perplexity or downstream quality. By exploiting the parameter redundancy inherent in MoE pathways, our method provides a highly favorable compute-to-memory trade-off, advancing efficient training and scaling of next-generation LLMs.

</details>


### [378] [Does Traversal Order Matter? A Systematic Study of Tree Traversal Methods in Transformer Grammars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16836)
*Zongru Liu,Pengyu Ji,Pengcheng Wang,Kewei Tu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探索了Transformer Grammars中不同的句法树遍历策略（DFT、BFT和混合的PRT），发现不同遍历方式在嵌套组合与全局前瞻之间存在固有权衡，并给出了任务感知的设计建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer Grammars仅依赖深度优先遍历（DFT）来线性化句法树，但不同的线性化方式可能对模型性能产生显著影响，这一设计空间尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出了广度优先遍历（BFT）和一种新的混合遍历策略——产生式规则遍历（PRT），结合不同的树结构和掩码策略进行实验评估。

Result: 在语言建模、句法泛化和文本摘要任务上进行了实证评估，揭示了不同遍历策略的性能差异。

Conclusion: 不同的遍历策略在嵌套组合能力与全局前瞻能力之间存在固有权衡，研究为设计任务感知的Transformer Grammars提供了可操作的指导建议。

Abstract: Transformer Grammars (TGs) enhance language modeling by incorporating syntactic tree structures. Despite the potentially significant impact on model performance of how syntactic trees are linearized in TGs, existing studies rely solely on Depth-First Traversal (DFT) for linearization. In this paper, we expand the traversal design space by exploring Breadth-First Traversal (BFT) and a novel hybrid traversal strategy, Production-Rule Traversal (PRT), which combines the structural lookahead of BFT with the early lexical generation of DFT. We integrate these traversal methods with varying tree configurations and masking strategies, and empirically evaluate their performance on language modeling, syntactic generalization and summarization. We reveal the inherent trade-offs between nested composition and global lookahead, providing actionable recommendations for designing task-aware Transformer Grammars.

</details>


### [379] [Data-Driven Decoding of Russell's Circumplex Model of Affect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16843)
*Amdjed Belaref,Samir Sadok,Zineb Noumir,Renaud Seguier*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探究Transformer模型（RoBERTa、wav2vec 2.0及多模态融合）的潜在表征是否内在编码了Russell情绪环状模型的几何结构，发现多模态融合能完美对齐Russell的情绪排序，且零样本条件下细粒度情绪词接近人类映射坐标，证明环状结构并非人为标签的产物，而是模型嵌入中固有的拓扑规律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感计算依赖深度学习表征情绪，但潜在空间通常是高维黑箱，缺乏可解释性。本文旨在验证Transformer的嵌入空间是否恢复Russell环状模型的几何规律，从而桥接心理学理论与表征学习之间的鸿沟。

Method: 设计了两个互补实验：1）评估基于文本（RoBERTa）和语音（wav2vec 2.0）的Transformer编码器以及多模态Transformer融合架构的深度表征，在MSP-Podcast等自然数据集上分析其拓扑一致性；2）在零样本设置下使用通用文本嵌入，将细粒度情绪词投射到Russell模型坐标上，检验其与人类映射结果的距离。

Result: 多模态文本与音频融合可完美对齐Russell的基本情绪排序；零样本条件下，投影后的细粒度情绪词接近人类已建立的映射坐标。

Conclusion: Russell环状结构并非仅是人类标注的产物，而是被多模态嵌入内在编码的几何规律。本文提出了一种新颖的、数据驱动的情绪模型验证框架，有效弥合了心理学理论与深度学习表征之间的差距。

Abstract: Affective computing increasingly relies on deep learning to represent emotions, yet latent spaces often remain opaque, high-dimensional black boxes. This paper investigates whether Transformers' embeddings recover the geometric regularities of Russell's circumplex model. We unify two complementary experiments testing the hypothesis that, after training models on text and speech, their resulting latent spaces encode a topology consistent with valence-arousal and reproduce human-like neighborhood relations. Specifically, we evaluate deep representations extracted from Transformer-based text (RoBERTa) and speech (wav2vec 2.0) encoders, along with a multimodal Transformer fusion architecture, across naturalistic datasets like MSP-Podcast and controlled LLM-generated stimuli. Our analysis reveals that multimodal fusion of text and audio yields perfect topological alignment with Russell's primary emotion ordering. Furthermore, in a zero-shot setting using generic text embeddings, projected fine-grained emotion terms fall close to their established human-mapped coordinates. Our contribution is a novel, data-driven framework for validating emotion models, demonstrating that Russell's circumplex structure is intrinsically encoded in the embeddings of these modalities rather than being solely an artifact of human labeling, thereby bridging the gap between psychological theory and representation learning.

</details>


### [380] [Robust Dual-Signal Fusion: Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Gating with Compressed Chain-of-Thought Refinement for Irony Detection in Social Media Texts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16845)
*Ankit Bhattacharjee,Krityapriya Bhaumik*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RDS融合框架是一种混合神经符号架构，通过压缩思维链推理轨迹实现零样本讽刺检测，在多个数据集上达到或超越监督模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型默认以字面语义理解文本，零样本讽刺检测仍是一个持续挑战。

Method: 提出鲁棒双信号(RDS)融合框架，一种混合神经符号架构，在不进行监督微调的情况下压缩思维链推理轨迹。

Result: 在TweetEval测试集上达到78.1%准确率和0.777宏F1；在iSarcasm数据集上零样本宏F1为0.6726，讽刺F1为0.4821。完整的三信号并发融合才具有统计显著性提升(p=0.005)。

Conclusion: 仅当三个信号同时并发融合时，才能实现对基线具有统计验证的提升，表明结构协同效应的关键性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) natively default to literal semantic interpretations, making zero-shot irony detection a persistent challenge. We introduce the Robust Dual-Signal (RDS) Fusion framework, a hybrid neuro-symbolic architecture that compresses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories without Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Evaluated on a strictly held-out TweetEval test set (N=734), RDS achieves 78.1% accuracy and a Macro F1 of 0.777, matching the absolute performance ceiling of the fine-tuned BERTweet. On the heavily imbalanced iSarcasm dataset, the frozen CoT pipeline filters 22.5% of out-of-distribution hallucinations, yielding a zero-shot Macro F1 of 0.6726 and Ironic F1 of 0.4821, outperforming multiple heavily supervised SemEval transformer ensembles. A statistical ablation confirms this structural synergy: adding the symbolic prior to the neural baseline yields no significant gain (p = 0.242), and the marginal benefit of adding the CoT pipeline to that prior is heavily compressed (p = 0.149). Only the complete, concurrent fusion of all three signals achieves a statistically validated improvement over the baseline (p = 0.005).

</details>


### [381] [Follow the Latent Roadmap: Navigating Revocable Decoding for Diffusion LLMs with Anchor Tokens](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16847)
*Yizhen Yao,Qinglin Zhu,Runcong Zhao,Xiangxiang Dai,Yanzheng Xiang,Yulan He,Lin Gui*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ASRD框架，通过锚点监督的解码策略解决扩散大语言模型在并行生成中的错误传播和局部错误强化问题，在数学和编程任务上提升准确率6.4%，加速推理7.2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散大语言模型在并行生成中存在解码速度与质量的权衡，现有的可撤销解码策略在混合质量上下文中会导致错误传播（错误上下文污染新token）和局部错误强化（错误相互强化逃避检测）两大关键问题。

Method: 提出ASRD（锚点监督可撤销解码）框架：1）通过时间一致性识别锚点token，将解码上下文解耦为可信锚点和不确定候选；2）动态锚点token缓存；3）锚点引导生成：注入熵加权锚点信号到掩码位置；4）锚点扰动验证：对不确定候选token施加正交扰动，破坏脆弱的局部共识。

Result: 在数学和编程基准测试上，ASRD优于现有重掩码基线方法，准确率提升最高6.4%，推理吞吐量加速最高7.2倍。

Conclusion: ASRD通过显式解耦解码上下文为可信锚点和不确定候选，有效缓解了错误传播和局部错误强化问题，在无需训练的情况下显著提升了扩散大语言模型的解码质量和推理效率。

Abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer a promising avenue for parallel generation but face a trade-off between decoding speed and quality. While revocable decoding strategies attempt to mitigate errors by verifying and remasking tokens, they typically operate within a mixed-quality context. This leads to two critical failures: \textit{Error Propagation}, where new tokens absorb toxic information from erroneous context, and \textit{Local Error Reinforcement}, where errors mutually reinforce each other to evade detection. To alleviate these challenges, we propose ASRD (Anchor Supervised Revocable Decoding), a training-free framework that operates within the embedding space. ASRD explicitly decouples the decoding context into trusted \textit{Anchor Tokens}, which are identified via temporal consistency, and uncertain candidates. Leveraging a dynamic Anchor Tokens Cache, we introduce two complementary mechanisms: (1) Anchor-Guided Generation, which injects entropy-weighted anchor signals into masked positions to implicitly rectify attention toward the reliable global skeleton; and (2) Anchor-Perturbed Verification, which applies orthogonal perturbations to uncertain candidate tokens, destabilizing and remasking errors driven by fragile local consensus. Extensive experiments on math and coding benchmarks demonstrate that ASRD outperforms recent remasking baselines, achieving accuracy improvements of up to 6.4\% while accelerating inference throughput by up to 7.2$\times$.

</details>


### [382] [Revisiting the Systematicity in Negation in the Era of In-Context Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16867)
*Hitomi Yanaka,Taisei Yamamoto*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文从行为系统性和表征系统性两个角度分析了LLM对否定句的理解。行为上，LLM通过上下文学习能部分识别否定表达和范围，但表现不完美；表征上，否定线索提取的功能向量可构建，但范围识别更具挑战性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 否定句理解一直是语言模型面临的挑战，即使在LLM时代。本文旨在系统性地分析LLM对否定句理解的能力和局限性。

Method: 从行为系统性和表征系统性两个维度进行分析：行为层面通过示范和上下文学习测试LLM对否定表达和范围的识别能力；表征层面分析功能向量能否从上下文中稳健构建，以完成否定理解所需的任务。

Result: LLM通过上下文学习能部分识别否定表达和范围，但无法达到完美性能；否定范围识别的难度因输出格式而异。功能向量可构建用于否定线索提取，但范围识别向量构建更具挑战。

Conclusion: LLM对否定句的理解存在系统性不足，尤其在否定范围识别方面，功能向量的构建难度更高，表明模型在处理否定时存在表征层面的局限。

Abstract: Understanding the meaning of negated sentences remains one of the challenges for language models, even in the era of large language models (LLMs). We analyze systematicity regarding LLM understanding of negation from two perspectives: behavioral systematicity and representational systematicity. For behavioral systematicity, we confirm that through demonstrations and in-context learning, LLMs can recognize negation expressions and scope within sentences to some extent, but they fail to achieve perfect performance. In particular, the difficulty of the negation scope recognition for models varies depending on the output format. For representational systematicity, we analyze the extent to which function vectors can be robustly constructed from in-context examples for tasks that are essential to understanding negation. The experiments suggest that while function vectors can be composed for negation cue extraction tasks, extracting function vectors for recognizing scope is more challenging.

</details>


### [383] [Understanding Scam Trends and Rail Paths from Reddit Self-Disclosure Narratives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16874)
*Yangjun Zhang,Mirko Bottarelli,Mark Hooper,Carsten Maple*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文构建了2023-2025年Reddit自我披露数据集（21,304条帖子），通过启发式标注和LLM辅助方法分析诈骗特征年度趋势、多阶段路径及社区支持行为，发现诈骗过程以多轨道为主，不同诈骗类型在路径复杂度上存在系统性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究缺乏对诈骗年度趋势的追踪，且受限于缺乏覆盖多种诈骗类型的开源标注数据集，难以分析诈骗轨道间的关系。

Method: 1) 收集21,304条Reddit帖子进行启发式标注（身份、沟通、平台、支付四类轨道）；2) 采用LLM辅助方法标注1,800条包含诈骗链的帖子，经人工评估；3) 对评论运行主题模型分析社区支持行为。

Result: 诈骗过程以多轨道为主；不同年份诈骗类型和轨道成分呈现不同主导趋势；不同诈骗类型在路径复杂度上存在系统性差异；Reddit社区支持行为随时间变得更加细致。

Conclusion: 该数据集可支持合成诈骗链数据模拟和AI相关诈骗风险评估，但结论可能不泛化至其他平台。

Abstract: Online scam behavior is inherently multi-stage, and the lifecycle includes temporally ordered rails and events rather than isolated signals. Existing works analyze characteristics of scam types and rails, but they do not track scam trends across years. Moreover, the work on the relations between rails is hampered due to the lack of open-source datasets with annotations and coverage of different scam types. To address these gaps, we build a dataset to analyze the yearly trend of scam characteristics and rail paths using Reddit self-disclosure narratives from 2023 to 2025. We collect 21,304 posts from scam-related subreddits with at least one rail among identity, communication, platform, and payment for trend analysis by heuristic annotation. Then, we label 1,800 posts containing explicit or recoverable scam chains by an LLM-assisted method for scam path analysis. The method is evaluated with human annotation. Lastly, we run a topic model on the comments of the posts to analyze the community support behavior. The results reveal that scam processes are predominantly multi-rail. Across years, different scam types and rail components dominate. Different scam types vary systematically in path complexity. Reddit support behaviors have become more detailed over time. This work supports synthetic scam chain data simulation and AI-related scam risk assessment, though findings may not generalise to other platforms.

</details>


### [384] [Compositional Reasoning Depth Predicts Clinical AI Failure: Empirical Evidence Consistent with Transformer Compositionality Limits in Electronic Health Record Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16890)
*Sanjay Basu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究发现，大语言模型在电子健康记录问答中的错误率随推理步数（hop count）单调递增，这一现象跨模型架构（Claude、GPT-4o、GPT-5）和推理条件（零样本 vs. 扩展思维）均一致成立，且不受上下文截断影响，表明推理深度是模型失败的机制性预测因子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 聚合准确率基准掩盖了LLM在EHR问答中失败的系统性结构：需要更多推理步骤的问题会产生更多错误。作者希望引入一个理论驱动的"跳数"（hop-count）分类法，作为模型失效的原则性预测指标。

Method: 作者基于Transformer组合性极限的理论结果，定义了预指定的跳数分类法（推理所需的不同步骤数）。在313个MedAlign EHR问答对上进行四跳注释，评估301个问题，进行模型内消融（Claude Sonnet零样本 vs. 扩展思维）和跨架构复制（GPT-4o和GPT-5.4零样本）。同时进行了上下文充分性审计。

Result: 所有三个模型（跨越两个提供商和两代OpenAI模型）均显示准确率随跳数单调下降。Claude Sonnet零样本从30.6%（跳数=1）降至17.6%（跳数=4）；GPT-4o从37.8%降至14.7%；GPT-5.4从37.8%降至23.5%。上下文充分性审计表明高跳问题并未因EHR截断而处于劣势。扩展思维未显著平缓准确率-深度曲线，思考令牌使用量与跳数正相关（r=0.31）。

Conclusion: 跳数是理论驱动、跨架构的大语言模型在EHR问答中错误的预测因子，对临床AI的部署风险分层具有直接意义。

Abstract: Aggregate accuracy benchmarks conceal a systematic structure in how large language models fail at electronic health record (EHR) question answering: questions requiring more inferential steps produce disproportionately more errors. Motivated by theoretical results on transformer compositionality limits, we introduce a pre-specified hop-count taxonomy -- the number of distinct reasoning steps required to answer a clinical question from an EHR -- as a principled predictor of model failure. We annotate 313 clinician-generated MedAlign EHR question-answer pairs across four hop levels and evaluate 301 questions in a within-model ablation (claude-sonnet-4-6, zero-shot vs. extended thinking) and cross-architecture replications (gpt-4o and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05, zero-shot). All three models, spanning two providers and two OpenAI generations (GPT-4 and GPT-5), show monotone accuracy decline with hop count: Claude Sonnet zero-shot falls from 30.6% (hop=1) to 17.6% (hop=4) (Cochran-Armitage z=-2.30, p=0.011; OR per hop 0.72, 95% CI [0.56,0.92], p=0.008); GPT-4o replicates this (37.8% to 14.7%; OR 0.58 [0.45,0.75], p<0.001); and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05 confirms it (37.8% to 23.5%; OR 0.80 [0.66,0.98], p=0.027). A pre-specified context-sufficiency audit shows higher-hop questions are not differentially disadvantaged by EHR truncation (answerability 93-95% at hops 2-4 vs. 79% at hop=1), so the decline reflects compositional reasoning difficulty. Extended thinking did not significantly flatten the accuracy-depth curve across three reasoning conditions, and thinking-token usage scaled with hop count (r=0.31, p<0.0001), consistent with the predicted O(k) computational requirement. Hop count is thus a theory-motivated, cross-architecture predictor of large-language-model error on EHR question answering, with direct implications for deployment risk stratification of clinical AI.

</details>


### [385] [Contrastive-Difference CKA Reveals Concept-Specific Structural Alignment Across Language Model Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16897)
*Xueping Gao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究揭示不同LLM架构在高层概念编码上存在「几何-功能分离」：几何表征中度收敛，但功能可完全迁移。提出无训练诊断方法CKA_Delta，通过对比差异核对齐有效区分概念特异性收敛，在6个概念域验证，并发现规模扩大可能增强普遍性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同LLM架构在高层概念编码上是否存在结构兼容性，即不同模型对相同概念的内部表征是否具有普遍性（universality）。

Method: 提出CKA_Delta（对比差异CKA）：在逐样本对比差异上计算核对齐，取代标准CKA直接计算表征相似性，从而隔离概念特异性收敛与通用相似性。在跨架构、跨概念域的系统实验中验证。

Result: 几何表征中度收敛（5个概念域p≤0.017），但功能迁移近乎完美；CKA_Delta显著优于标准CKA的区分能力；安全概念呈现收敛趋势（p=0.08）；70B规模对提供普遍性随规模增强的观测证据；Gemma被识别为架构异常值（d=1.08, AUC=0.79）。

Conclusion: CKA_Delta可作为实用的架构间概念监测工具（训练-free的域分类器和异常检测器），而非绝对的迁移精度预测器；概念普遍性存在几何-功能分离现象，需进一步验证规模效应。

Abstract: Do different LLM architectures encode high-level concepts in structurally compatible ways? We systematically characterize a geometric-functional universality dissociation: across multiple concept domains and architectural families, moderate geometric convergence coexists with near-perfect functional transfer. Using contrastive-difference CKA (CKA_Delta), a training-free diagnostic that computes kernel alignment on per-sample contrastive differences, we isolate concept-specific convergence from generic similarity -- achieving significant discrimination where standard CKA cannot. The dissociation replicates across all six concept domains we test (five with p <= 0.017 geometric discrimination and safety as a converging-functional trend, p = 0.08), including two non-instruction concepts (code-vs-NL, reasoning-vs-recall) validated without system prompts; a single 70B--70B pair provides an observational note that universality may strengthen with scale, requiring replication with additional >=70B models. We position CKA_Delta as a practical regime classifier and architectural outlier detector (Gemma: d = 1.08, AUC = 0.79) rather than an absolute transfer-accuracy predictor, providing a training-free diagnostic for cross-architecture concept monitoring.

</details>


### [386] [Speaking the Language of Science: Toward a General-Purpose Generative Foundation Model for the Natural Sciences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16905)
*Mingyang Li,Yurou Liu,Jieping Ye,Bing Su,Ji-Rong Wen,Zheng Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LOGOS是一个基于共享科学语法的统一生成式语言模型，将自然科学中的异构任务统一为自回归框架，通过将科学对象及其空间交互编码为离散token序列，实现"一个模型适用于所有自然科学"。在1B、3B和8B参数规模上，模型性能与规模正相关，表明AI for Science应深度对齐大语言模型而非建立独立技术栈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有科学AI模型通常针对特定任务或领域单独设计，缺乏统一框架。本文希望探索是否可以通过一个共享的科学语法（grammar）将自然科学中多样化的任务统一起来，实现"一个模型适配所有科学任务"的愿景，并论证科学基础模型应与大语言模型深度对齐而非另起炉灶。

Method: 提出LOGOS模型，基于共享科学语法将科学对象及其空间交互编码为离散token序列（含空间接触和约束模式的离散token），摆脱对显式坐标或几何神经网络的依赖。所有下游任务统一建模为同一语法空间中的next-token prediction，实现多领域预训练与下游目标的高度对齐。在1B、3B、8B三种参数规模下训练验证。

Result: 在多种自然科学任务上，LOGOS一致达到或超越领域专用baseline的性能；模型规模与性能之间存在持续的正相关性（1B→3B→8B参数提升带来性能提升）。

Conclusion: 论文初步证明了"一个模型适配所有自然科学"的可行性，并提出AI4S的未来发展方向不应是建立独立于LLM的技术栈，而应通过共享架构、训练范式和推理基础设施，使科学基础模型与LLM深度对齐，让LLM成为AI4S的新入口。

Abstract: In this report, we present LOGOS (Language Of Generative Objects in Science), a scientific generative language model that unifies heterogeneous tasks across the natural sciences within a single autoregressive framework based on a shared scientific grammar. It encodes diverse scientific objects and their spatial interactions as token sequences over a common vocabulary. By representing spatial contact and constraint patterns as discrete tokens, the model captures complex structural interactions in a purely sequential manner, without relying on explicit coordinates or geometric neural networks. This unified representation enables a wide range of downstream tasks to be formulated consistently as next-token prediction in the same grammar space, creating strong alignment between continued multi-domain pre-training and downstream objectives. Across diverse tasks, LOGOS consistently matches or outperforms domain-specific baselines, providing preliminary evidence for the feasibility of "one model fits all" in the natural sciences. We train LOGOS models at different scales (1B, 3B, and 8B parameters) and find a consistent positive correlation between model size and performance. This suggests that the future of AI for Science (AI4S) may not lie in building an independent technical stack that is separated from large language models (LLMs). Instead, it may depend on deeply aligning scientific foundation models with LLMs through shared architectures, shared training paradigms, and shared inference infrastructure, so that LLMs can truly become a new entry point for AI4S. We release the model weights and associated resources to facilitate further research.

</details>


### [387] [LESS Is More: Mutual-Stability Sampling for Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16908)
*Amr Mohamed,Guokan Shang,Michalis Vazirgiannis*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出LESS，一种无需训练、模型无关的自适应采样器，通过互稳定性规则动态决定何时将掩码位置解码为最终token，在保持或提升准确率的同时大幅减少反向步数（较固定预算解码减少72.1%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）在反向去噪过程中执行固定步数采样，导致计算浪费在已稳定位置，而一些不稳定位置又可能过早被确定，缺乏自适应计算分配机制。

Method: 将token承诺建模为在线停止问题，提出互稳定性采样规则：仅当（1）top-1预测置信度高；（2）top-1 token在最近若干反向步中保持一致；（3）预测分布在top-K上的Jensen-Shannon散度稳定时，才将掩码位置视为可解码。

Result: 在Dream-7B、LLaDA-8B、LLaDA-1.5-8B上，覆盖全序列扩散和半自回归块采样，在7个基准上平均准确率优于现有的无需训练自适应采样器，同时反向步数减少72.1%，对应更低的wall-clock延迟和推理计算量。

Conclusion: LESS证明了扩散LM可以通过自适应停止策略有效分配计算资源，在不牺牲性能的前提下显著提升推理效率，且方法无需额外训练，具有良好的通用性。

Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive decoding by iteratively refining masked sequences, enabling parallel token updates and bidirectional conditioning. Their practical efficiency, however, is limited by sampling procedures that execute a fixed number of reverse denoising steps selected before decoding, spending computation on already-stable positions and sometimes committing unstable ones too early. We present \textsc{LESS}, a training-free, model-agnostic adaptive sampler that treats token commitment as an online stopping problem. \textsc{LESS} implements mutual-stability sampling through a joint stability rule that makes a masked position eligible for unmasking only when its top-1 prediction has high confidence, its top-1 token persists across recent reverse steps, and its predictive distribution is stable under top-$K$ inter-step Jensen--Shannon divergence. We evaluate \textsc{LESS} on Dream-7B, LLaDA-8B, and LLaDA-1.5-8B, covering full-sequence diffusion and semi-autoregressive blockwise sampling regimes, across seven benchmarks spanning general knowledge, math, and code. \textsc{LESS} improves average accuracy over strong training-free adaptive samplers while using $72.1\%$ fewer reverse steps than fixed-budget decoding. Since each reverse step requires a Transformer forward pass, these step-count reductions translate into fewer forward evaluations, lower measured wall-clock latency, and lower estimated inference compute.

</details>


### [388] [IMPACTeen: Intentions, Manipulation, Persuasion, Annotations, and Consequences in Teen Communication Dataset](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16910)
*Aleksander Szczęsny,Wiktoria Mieleszczenko-Kowszewicz,Maciej Markiewicz,Beata Bajcar,Tomasz Adamczyk,Jolanta Babiak,Grzegorz Chodak,Przemysław Kazienko*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: IMPACTeen是一个青少年社会影响力文本数据集，包含1021篇文本、5100条标注记录，从5种视角（青少年、家长、心理学家、传播专家、教师）标注了社会影响力技巧、意图、后果等维度，支持影响力检测、标注分歧、跨语言建模等研究。数据集以波兰语创建并提供英文版本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 填补青少年语境下社会影响力文本数据的空白，提供多视角、多维度标注的资源，以支持社会影响力检测、标注者分歧分析及语言模型评估等研究。

Method: 通过约束式LLM生成初始文本，经过两阶段人工编辑和验证确保真实性；随后从5种不同视角进行多维标注，覆盖影响力存在性、技巧、意图、后果、抵抗、反应及标注信心。

Result: 构建了包含1021篇文本、5100条标注记录的IMPACTeen数据集，涵盖人际、媒体和数字三种青少年社会影响力场景，提供波兰语及对应英文版本。

Conclusion: 该数据集为青少年社会影响力研究提供了高质量的多视角标注资源，可支持影响力检测、跨语言建模和语言模型训练评估等多个方向。

Abstract: IMPACTeen is a dataset of textual social influence scenarios spanning interpersonal, media-based, and digital settings in an adolescent context. It contains 1,021 texts, 5,100 individual annotation records, and gold labels for social influence techniques, with each text annotated from five distinct perspectives: teenagers, parents, psychologists, communication experts, and teachers. The resource was constructed through constrained LLM generation, followed by a two-step human editing and validation phase aimed at ensuring youth-context realism. A multi-dimensional annotation covered influence presence, techniques, intentions, consequences, resistance, reactions, and annotation confidence. The dataset supports research on social influence detection, annotator disagreement, cross-lingual modeling, and the training and evaluation of language models. The dataset was created in Polish and is accompanied by a corresponding English version.

</details>


### [389] [Exploring Extrinsic and Intrinsic Properties for Effective Reasoning with Code Interpreter](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16934)
*Patomporn Payoungkhamdee,Napat Laosaengpha,Jenta Wonglertsakul,Pittawat Taveekitworachai,Pume Tuchinda,Panjapong Poobanchuen,Ekapol Chuangsuwanich,Can Udomcharoenchaikit,Samuel Cahyawijaya,Peerat Limkonchotiwat,Sarana Nutanong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了代码解释器（CI）增强LLM推理的行为特性，从外在关键token和内在认知行为两个角度分析了强CI推理模型的特点，发现验证、回溯和反向链等认知行为在强模型中更常见，并探索了在推理和训练阶段利用这些属性的方法与局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管代码解释器（CI）已被广泛用于提升LLM推理能力，但关于有效代码推理的行为属性（如关键token和认知行为）尚未被系统探索，缺乏对"什么使得CI推理有效"的深入理解。

Method: 从两个维度分析：1）外在属性（关键token）；2）内在属性（代码特有的认知行为，如验证、回溯、反向链）。在多个LLM上进行观察，并在推理阶段（追加关键token）和训练阶段（增强认知行为）验证其效果。

Result: 1）强CI推理模型在关键token和认知行为上表现更突出；2）推理阶段追加关键token在数学、排序、优化任务上有提升，但在其他任务效果有限；3）训练阶段增强认知行为在SFT和RL上对两个模型有提升；4）这些行为减少了错误回答中的"过度思考"，提升了token效率。

Conclusion: 首次系统刻画了CI有效推理的行为特征，展示了利用这些属性改进CI推理的潜力与局限性，并揭示了某些模型中限制增益的因素。

Abstract: Reasoning with a Code Interpreter (CI) has emerged as an effective paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through executable computation and iterative verification. Despite its growing adoption, the behavioral properties underlying effective code reasoning remain largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate code reasoning from two distinct perspectives inspired by prior studies of natural language reasoning: extrinsic properties, represented by crucial tokens, and intrinsic properties, represented by code-specific cognitive behaviors. Across multiple LLMs, we find that stronger CI reasoning models consistently exhibit a higher prevalence of crucial tokens and cognitive behaviors, particularly verification, backtracking, and backward chaining. Building on these observations, we examine how these properties can be leveraged during both inference and training. At inference time, appending code-specific crucial tokens improves performance on several reasoning capabilities, including mathematical, ordering, and optimization, while yielding limited benefits elsewhere. At training time, augmenting a state-of-the-art framework with code-specific cognitive behaviors improves supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning performance in two of three evaluated models. Further analysis shows that these behaviors reduce overthinking in incorrect responses and improve token efficiency, while also revealing factors that limit gains in a certain model. Our findings provide the first systematic characterization of effective reasoning with CI and demonstrate both the potential and limitations of leveraging key properties to improve CI-based reasoning.

</details>


### [390] [TokenPilot: Cache-Efficient Context Management for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17016)
*Buqiang Xu,Zirui Xue,Dianmou Chen,Chenyang Fu,Chiyu Wu,Caiying Huang,Chen Jiang,Jizhan Fang,Xinle Deng,Yijun Chen,Yunzhi Yao,Xuehai Wang,Jin Shang,Gong Yu,Ningyu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TokenPilot 是一个双粒度上下文管理框架，通过全局压缩和局部驱逐策略，在保持性能的同时大幅降低LLM代理的长上下文推理成本（最高节省87%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理在长会话中上下文累积导致推理成本飙升，现有文本剪枝或动态内存驱逐方法因无约束的序列突变引发前缀不匹配和缓存失效，需要在文本稀疏性与提示缓存连续性之间取得平衡。

Method: 提出TokenPilot双粒度框架：(1) 全局层面：Ingestion-Aware Compaction稳定提示前缀，在输入门控处消除开放世界环境噪声；(2) 局部层面：Lifecycle-Aware Eviction监控上下文段的持续残值，在任务相关性过期时执行保守的批量轮次卸载。

Result: 在PinchBench和Claw-Eval上，隔离模式下成本降低61%和56%，连续模式下成本降低61%和87%，同时保持与先前系统相当的性能。

Conclusion: TokenPilot有效解决了长上下文推理中的成本-缓存连续性权衡问题，已集成到LightMem2中开源。

Abstract: As LLM agents are deployed in long-horizon sessions, context accumulation drives up inference costs. Existing approaches utilize text pruning or dynamic memory eviction to minimize token footprints; however, their unconstrained sequence mutations alter layouts, introducing prefix mismatches and cache invalidation. This reveals a critical trade-off between text sparsity and prompt cache continuity. To address this, we present TokenPilot, a dual-granularity context management framework. Globally, Ingestion-Aware Compaction acts as a framework harness to stabilize prompt prefixes and eliminate open-world environmental noise at the ingestion gate. Locally, Lifecycle-Aware Eviction monitors the ongoing residual utility of context segments, enforcing a conservative batch-turn schedule to offload content segments only when task relevance expires. Experiments on PinchBench and Claw-Eval under both isolated and continuous modes demonstrate that TokenPilot reduces costs by 61% and 56% in isolated mode, and 61% and 87% in continuous mode, while maintaining competitive performance compared to prior systems. TokenPilot has been integrated into LightMem2 at https://github.com/zjunlp/LightMem2.

</details>


### [391] [DEEPRUBRIC: Evidence-Tree Rubric Supervision for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Deep Research Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17029)
*Minghang Zhu,Chuyang Wei,Junhao Xu,Yilin Cheng,Zhumin Chen,Jiyan He*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DeepRubric通过反向构建流程（先确定评估目标，再合成查询-评分标准对）生成更可靠的查询-评分标准监督数据，用于强化学习训练深度研究Agent。以约1/13的RL GPU时间达到了与先前开源SOTA相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于评分标准的RL方法通常让LLM为给定查询生成评分标准，但当模型无法推断潜在信息需求时，生成的评分标准可能不完整，降低RL效率。因此需要更可靠的查询-评分标准监督。

Method: 提出DeepRubric数据构建框架：从种子主题出发，递归展开基于证据的子问题构建证据树，以叶子节点作为原子可验证的评估目标，再据此合成训练查询和评分标准，确保奖励信号准确评估查询所要求的信息。

Result: 构建了9K查询-评分标准监督样本，训练DeepRubric-8B模型（基于评分标准的GRPO），在三个基准测试上性能与先前开源SOTA相当，但RL GPU时间减少了约13倍。

Conclusion: DeepRubric通过反转查询-评分标准的生成顺序，有效提高了评分标准的完整性和可靠性，从而大幅提升RL训练效率，验证了高质量监督数据对深度研究Agent训练的关键作用。

Abstract: Deep research agents synthesize long-form reports by searching and reasoning over retrieved evidence. Reinforcement learning with rubric-based rewards improves these agents by optimizing them against checkable criteria that translate report quality into reward signals, but its efficiency depends on whether those criteria reliably capture the task scope and evidence needs. Most existing studies ask an LLM to generate rubrics for a given query, but when the model fails to infer the underlying information needs, the generated rubrics may be incomplete and reduce RL efficiency. To obtain more reliable query--rubric supervision, we introduce DeepRubric, a data construction framework that reverses this process: instead of inferring evaluation criteria for a given query, it first determines what an evidence-backed report should be evaluated on and then synthesizes aligned query--rubric pairs from those evaluation targets. Starting from a sampled seed topic, DeepRubric builds an evidence tree by recursively expanding evidence-backed sub-questions, whose leaves serve as atomic and verifiable evaluation targets. It then uses the evidence tree to synthesize the training query and rubrics, ensuring that the reward evaluates exactly the information requested by the query. Using DeepRubric, we construct 9K query--rubric supervision examples and train DeepRubric-8B with rubric-based GRPO, achieving comparable performance to prior open state-of-the-art deep research models across three benchmarks with roughly 13x fewer RL GPU-hours.

</details>


### [392] [KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17034)
*Mufei Li,Shikun Liu,Dongqi Fu,Haoyu Wang,Yinglong Xia,Hong Li,Hong Yan,Pan Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: KVEraser是一种通过学习KV缓存编辑实现高效局部上下文擦除的方法，它用学习的引导状态替换擦除区间的KV状态，几乎达到完全重计算的擦除效果，但延迟仅增加24%，相比完全重计算的17.6倍延迟增长有显著优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的后置上下文擦除方法在处理KV缓存时面临局部编辑导致全局影响的挑战——删除一个span后，其影响会传播到所有后续token的缓存状态中。精确擦除需要重计算被删除span之后的所有token，计算成本取决于后缀长度而非被删除span的长度，效率低下。

Method: KVEraser通过两步训练流水线实现：1) 通用跨度-邻居预训练，训练擦除器抑制被擦除跨度的影响；2) 任务特定微调，将擦除能力适配到下游场景。推理时，仅替换被擦除间隔的KV状态为学习的引导状态，其余缓存保持不变。

Result: 在1K-32K上下文长度的域内任务上，KVEraser在擦除后性能几乎匹配完全重计算，而延迟仅增加24%（完全重计算延迟增加17.6倍）。在未见过的长文档QA任务中，KVEraser在有危害事实干扰项的情况下达到最佳近似性能，比完全重计算快3-4倍。

Conclusion: KVEraser通过学习的KV缓存编辑机制，在保持高效性的同时实现了接近完全重计算的擦除效果，为长上下文LLM应用中的局部上下文编辑提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.

</details>


### [393] [Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17053)
*Peiyang Xu,Bangzheng Li,Sijia Liu,Karthik R. Narasimhan,Pramod Viswanath,Prateek Mittal,Xingyu Fu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出ContextRL，一种通过间接的上下文选择奖励来增强模型细粒度证据定位能力的强化学习方法，在长序列推理和多模态任务上取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在需要从长或复杂上下文中识别微小但关键证据时经常失败，例如工具执行轨迹中的单行信息或图像中的细微细节。

Method: 提出ContextRL方法，采用上下文感知的强化学习，通过间接辅助目标训练：给定查询、答案和两个高度相似但只有包含正确答案的上下文，模型选择正确上下文即获得奖励。在编程代理领域用条件过滤构建1k轨迹对，在多模态推理领域用生成式编辑和相似性搜索构建7k图像对。

Result: 在5个长序列基准上平均提升+2.2%，在12个视觉问答基准上平均提升+1.8%。对比实验表明，仅增加对比数据而不采用上下文选择目标几乎没有提升，证明收益来自所提出的目标而非额外数据。

Conclusion: ContextRL通过间接的上下文选择目标有效提升了模型的细粒度证据定位能力，在长序列推理和多模态任务上均取得一致改进，且效果来自目标设计而非数据增强。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often fail when answering requires identifying a small but decisive piece of evidence within a long or complex context, such as a single line in a tool trace or a subtle detail in an image. We propose ContextRL, a context-aware reinforcement learning (RL) method that improves long-horizon reasoning and multimodal performance through an \emph{indirect} auxiliary objective. Instead of supervising only the final answer, ContextRL presents the model with a query, an answer, and two highly similar contexts, and rewards it for selecting the context that supports the query--answer pair, thereby encouraging fine-grained grounding. We construct contrastive context data in two domains: for coding agents, trajectories serve as contexts, yielding 1k pairs built via condition filtering; for multimodal reasoning, images serve as contexts, yielding 7K pairs built via generative editing and similarity search. ContextRL achieves average gains of +2.2% over standard GRPO on 5 long-horizon benchmarks, and +1.8% across 12 diverse visual question answering benchmarks. To disentangle the effect of the proposed objective from that of additional data, we compare against data-augmentation baselines that repurpose the same contrastive contexts as standard query--context--answer examples. These baselines provide little to no improvement, showing that the gains arise from the proposed context-selection objective rather than from the contrastive data alone.

</details>


### [394] [The Value Axis: Language Models Encode Whether They're on the Right Track](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17056)
*Nick Jiang,Isaac Kauvar,Jack Lindsey*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究语言模型内部是否追踪当前轨迹的"价值"（即当前策略达成目标的概率），通过构建Qwen3-8B的价值轴，发现该轴与置信度、回溯行为、代码正确性相关。通过干预可调控自我纠正、探索行为，DPO可提升奖励行为的内部价值，并应用于分析真实场景（如政治敏感查询、SFT领域内置信度提升）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型内部是否存在对当前轨迹"价值"（即达成目标的可能性）的线性编码表征，以及该表征如何影响模型的置信度与行为决策。

Method: 使用合成情境内强化学习数据，为Qwen3-8B构建"价值轴"（value axis）；通过激活分析、因果干预（steering）、直接偏好优化（DPO）等方法验证该轴的功能。

Result: 价值轴激活可区分高/低置信度、有无回溯行为、正确/错误代码；steering可因果调控自我纠正、回溯探索行为；DPO能提升奖励行为对应的内部价值；真实场景中该轴对政治敏感查询赋予低价值，SFT提升领域内置信度。

Conclusion: 语言模型线性编码对期望目标成功概率的估计，该估计值调节模型坚持当前方向的置信度。

Abstract: We investigate whether language models internally track the value of their current trajectory, defined as the likelihood that their ongoing strategy will achieve their goals. Using synthetic, in-context reinforcement learning data, we construct a "value" axis for Qwen3-8B. We find that activations along this axis distinguish between high vs. low verbalized confidence, rollouts without and with backtracking, and correct vs. corrupted code. Steering towards high value causally suppresses self-correction and reduces explanatory verbosity, while steering towards low value induces backtracking and exploration. We demonstrate that direct preference optimization (DPO) can increase the internal value of rewarded behaviors (e.g. use a certain word), causing the model to act more confidently after exhibiting them. Finally, we apply the value axis to study in-the-wild settings. For example, we find that Qwen assigns low value to politically sensitive chat queries after post-training and that supervised fine-tuning increases internal confidence within the training domain. Our results suggest that language models linearly encode an estimate of expected goal success that modulates their confidence in pursuing a direction.

</details>


### [395] [From Static Inference to Dynamic Interaction: A Survey of Streaming Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.04592)
*Junlong Tong,Zilong Wang,YuJie Ren,Peiran Yin,Hao Wu,Wei Zhang,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文对流式大语言模型（Streaming LLMs）进行了系统性综述，提出了统一定义、分类体系，并探讨了方法、应用与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流式LLM的定义混乱，混淆了流式生成、流式输入和交互式流式架构，缺乏系统性的分类标准。

Method: 基于数据流和动态交互建立统一定义，提出系统性的分类法，深入讨论底层方法论，并整理应用场景与未来研究方向。

Result: 给出了流式LLM的统一定义、一套完整的分类体系，以及应用和研究方向的综述。

Conclusion: 该综述澄清了概念歧义，为后续流式LLM研究提供了系统性框架和指导。

Abstract: Standard Large Language Models (LLMs) are predominantly designed for static inference with pre-defined inputs, which limits their applicability in dynamic, real-time scenarios. To address this gap, the streaming LLM paradigm has emerged. However, existing definitions of streaming LLMs remain fragmented, conflating streaming generation, streaming inputs, and interactive streaming architectures, while a systematic taxonomy is still lacking. This paper provides a comprehensive overview and analysis of streaming LLMs. First, we establish a unified definition of streaming LLMs based on data flow and dynamic interaction to clarify existing ambiguities. Building on this definition, we propose a systematic taxonomy of current streaming LLMs and conduct an in-depth discussion on their underlying methodologies. Furthermore, we explore the applications of streaming LLMs in real-world scenarios and outline promising research directions to support ongoing advances in streaming intelligence. We maintain a continuously updated repository of relevant papers at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/Awesome-Streaming-LLMs.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [396] [Test-Time Adaptation of Spiking Neural Networks for Intracortical Neural Decoding using Membrane Potential Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14866)
*Guangzhi Tang*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出膜电位对齐（MPA）方法，通过KL散度匹配膜电位分布，使用低秩（LoRA）权重更新（<9%参数），实现脉冲神经网络在脑机接口中的测试时间自适应，达到与SOTA方法相当的性能且计算更高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 皮层内脑机接口存在逐日神经信号漂移导致预训练解码器性能下降的问题，现有无监督自适应方法（如深度递归或对抗架构）计算开销过大，无法部署在植入式硬件上。

Method: 提出MPA（Membrane Potential Alignment）方法：通过KL散度对齐膜电位分布，仅更新低秩（LoRA）权重（<9%参数），实现脉冲神经网络的测试时间自适应。

Result: 在跨越一个月的非人灵长类动物抓取任务中，MPA达到与SOTA方法NoMAD相当的性能，但架构更简单、时间分辨率更高（4 ms vs. 20 ms）。

Conclusion: 高效的SNN测试时间自适应是实现长期免校准脑机接口的实用路径。

Abstract: Intracortical brain-computer interfaces suffer from day-to-day neural signal shifts that degrade pretrained decoders. Existing unsupervised adaptation methods rely on deep recurrent or adversarial architectures that are too computationally expensive for implantable hardware. We propose Membrane Potential Alignment (MPA), a test-time adaptation method for spiking neural networks that realigns a pretrained decoder to shifted recordings by only matching membrane potential distributions via KL divergence. By restricting updates to low-rank (LoRA) weights, MPA adapts fewer than 9% of parameters. On a non-human primate reaching task spanning over one month, MPA achieves performance competitive with the state-of-the-art NoMAD method, while using a simpler architecture and finer temporal resolution (4 ms vs. 20 ms). These results show that efficient SNN-based test-time adaptation is a practical path toward long-term, recalibration-free brain-computer interfaces.

</details>


### [397] [Harnessing cortical geometry, wiring, and function as inductive biases for recurrent neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14975)
*Mo Shakiba,Rana Rokni,Mohammad Mohammadi,Nima Dehghani*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文利用MICrONS项目的小鼠视觉皮层功能连接组数据，构建生物启发的递归神经网络。通过整合近12,000个神经元的空间坐标、解剖连接和功能关系初始化网络权重，在三个认知任务中，受皮层结构约束的网络优于基线模型。功能权重初始化收益最大，空间嵌入带来稳健提升。这些网络还发展出低熵、模块化和小世界组织特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解皮层回路的结构和功能组织如何塑造递归计算，是神经科学和机器学习共同的核心问题。作者希望通过利用真实的皮层数据（空间坐标、连接性、功能关系）作为归纳偏置，构建更有效的递归神经网络。

Method: 利用MICrONS项目中同一动物的小鼠视觉皮层数据（钙成像与电子显微镜重建共配准），提取约12,000个兴奋性神经元的空间坐标、解剖连接和功能关系，以此初始化递归权重并在学习过程中施加通信感知的空间约束。在三个认知决策任务上评估模型性能。

Result: 结构-功能约束的网络在所有任务中一致优于基线和部分约束模型。功能权重初始化增益最大，真实空间嵌入提供额外稳健提升。网络自发形成低熵、模块化和小世界组织，且当递归限制为正权重时仍保持强性能。

Conclusion: 皮层几何、布线和功能结构可作为强大的归纳偏置，构建学习更高效且趋近生物计算关键组织原则的递归网络。

Abstract: How the wiring and functional organization of cortex shape recurrent computation remains a central question in both neuroscience and machine learning. Here, we leverage data released through the Machine Intelligence from Cortical Networks (MICrONS) program--a functional connectomics resource spanning multiple areas of mouse visual cortex, in which dense calcium imaging is co-registered with high-resolution electron microscopy reconstruction from the same animal--to build biologically grounded recurrent neural networks. Using neuronal spatial coordinates, anatomical connectivity, and function-derived relationships from nearly 12,000 coregistered excitatory neurons, we initialize recurrent weights and impose communication-aware spatial constraints during learning. Across three cognitive decision-making tasks, networks constrained by cortical structure and function consistently outperform baseline and partially constrained models. Functional weight initialization provides the largest gain, while real spatial embedding yields robust additional improvements across conditions. These biologically grounded networks also develop low-entropy, modular, and small-world organization, and retain strong performance even when recurrence is restricted to positive weights. Together, our results show that the machinery of cortex--its geometry, wiring, and functional structure--can be harnessed as a powerful inductive basis for building recurrent networks that learn more effectively while converging toward key organizational principles of biological computation.

</details>
