Even though the recently developed Edge of Stability (EoS) theory provides a powerful tool to understand and control the stability of optimization methods via the (preconditioned) curvature, these curvature-controlling methods are not popular in large-scale Transformer training due to the complexity of curvature estimation. To this end, we first introduce a fast online estimator of the largest (preconditioned) Hessian eigenvalue (i.e., curvature) based on a warm-started variant for power iteration with Hessian-vector products. We show theoretically, and verify empirically, that the proposed method makes per-iteration curvature tracking feasible at billion parameter scale while being more accurate. Using this tool, we find that training instabilities coincide with surges in preconditioned curvature and that curvature grows with depth. Motivated by these observations, we propose architecture warm-up: progressively growing network depth to carefully control the preconditioned Hessian and stabilize training. Experiments on large Transformers validate that our approach enables efficient curvature tracking and reduces instabilities compared to existing state-of-the-art stabilization techniques without slowing down convergence.

</details>


### [582] [GD$^2$PO: Mitigating Multi-Reward Conflicts via Group-Dynamic reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16771)
*Haotian Liu,Yihao Liu,Jingwei Ni,Siyuan Huang,Xinpeng Liu,Pengyu Cheng,Jiajun Song,Ruijin Ding,Junfeng Li,Zhechao Yu,Mengyu Zhou,Hongteng Xu,Xiaoxi Jiang,Guanjun Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对多维度奖励冲突问题，提出GD²PO算法，通过冲突感知过滤机制屏蔽奖励维度不一致的rollout，并引入查询级重加权动态调整更新强度，显著提升多奖励RL训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（如GDPO）将总奖励分解为独立奖励组分别计算RL损失，但面临多奖励冲突：同一rollout在不同奖励维度上可能产生正负相反的advantage，导致信号相互抵消，阻碍训练效率。

Method: 受DAPO启发，提出GD²PO：1）冲突感知过滤机制：屏蔽存在严重奖励维度不一致的rollout，保留有效RL优势信号；2）查询级重加权：根据整体奖励共识动态调整每个查询的更新强度。

Result: 在工具调用、人类偏好对齐等多奖励场景下，GD²PO一致且显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: GD²PO通过解决多奖励冲突问题，有效加速了多维度奖励场景下的RL学习效率。

Abstract: As LLMs advance, post-training reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly relies on multi-dimensional rewards to cultivate comprehensive capabilities. This shift demands new algorithms capable of optimizing diverse and potentially competing objectives simultaneously. To address this, existing methods such as Group reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization (GDPO) decompose the overall score into independent reward groups, then compute the RL loss separately within each group. However, this strategy still encounters multi-reward conflicts: a single rollout can yield positive advantages on certain reward dimensions but negative ones on others, causing opposing signals to cancel each other out during aggregation, further hindering RL training efficiency. Inspired by Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO), which improves RL training efficiency by filtering out ineffective rollouts with near-zero advantages, we propose Group-Dynamic reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization (GD$^2$PO). Specifically, GD$^2$PO employs a conflict-aware filtering mechanism to mask out rollouts suffering from severe reward-wise disagreement. By preventing conflicting signals from canceling each other out, this masking strategy preserves and enhances the magnitude of effective RL advantages, thereby significantly accelerating learning efficiency. Furthermore, we introduce query-level reweighting to dynamically adjust the update intensity of each query based on its overall reward consensus. Experiments on various multi-reward scenarios, including tool calling and human preference alignment, demonstrate that GD$^2$PO consistently and significantly outperforms existing baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/GD2PO.

</details>


### [583] [We Need Explanation Cards to Connect Explanation Algorithms to the Real World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16786)
*Eric Günther,Balázs Szabados,Kristof Meding,Gunnar König,Sebastian Bordt,Ulrike von Luxburg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"解释卡"（Explanation Cards）来增强算法解释，通过补充鲁棒性和有效性信息及明确的解读说明，解决现有算法解释难以理解和信息不足的问题，并将解读责任从用户转移到提供者。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法解释存在两大问题：(1) 解释的含义与直观理解不同，需要专业知识才能正确解读；(2) 流行的解释算法无法有效反映复杂决策函数的行为。这造成了解释表面传达的信息与实际提供的信息之间的鸿沟。

Method: 提出"解释卡"（Explanation Cards）框架，在标准解释基础上补充：(1) 鲁棒性和有效性等补充信息；(2) 清晰的解读说明。以反事实解释和SHAP为例展示如何构建解释卡。

Result: 解释卡能使原本无信息的解释变得实用，同时帮助检测解释不可用的情况。解释卡中的解读说明将责任从用户转移到提供者，为正确解读提供必要指导。

Conclusion: 解释卡是使算法解释适应现实世界应用的重要一步，并且为欧盟AI法案中可解释性条款的操作化提供了实用手段。

Abstract: Algorithmic explanations are intended to help stakeholders understand opaque algorithmic decisions, but in practice, they often fall short. First, the meaning of algorithmic explanations is often not what one might intuitively expect, so expert knowledge is required to interpret them correctly. Second, recent work has shown that popular explanation algorithms are uninformative about the behavior of complex decision functions. Together, these issues create a gap between what explanations appear to convey and what they actually provide. In this work, we propose Explanation Cards for Explanation Algorithms, which augment standard explanations with complementary information about robustness and validity, as well as clear instructions for interpretation. The complementary information can render otherwise uninformative explanations practically useful, while also helping to detect cases where they are not. Importantly, the interpretation instructions in explanation cards shift responsibility from users to providers: Rather than expecting users to recognize what can and cannot be concluded from an explanation, providers must make this explicit upfront. Using counterfactual explanations and SHAP as examples, we demonstrate how providers can construct explanation cards and that these cards provide users with the guidance needed for sound interpretation. We further argue that explanation cards offer a practical means of operationalising the explainability provisions of the EU AI Act. Overall, explanation cards are a significant step toward making explanation algorithms fit for real-world use cases.

</details>


### [584] [Decision-Weighted Flow Matching for Contextual Stochastic Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16790)
*Jize Xie,Haomiao Wu,Qiang Chen,Xiu Su,Yi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出决策加权流匹配（DW-FM）方法，通过重加权流匹配的回归目标，使生成式模型的训练与下游决策后悔值对齐，在三个随机优化任务上优于标准基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准条件生成模型训练强调均匀分布拟合，而未考虑生成场景对下游决策的影响——统计常见区域的误差对决策后悔影响小，而决策敏感区域的误差可能显著改变最优行动，导致目标不匹配。

Method: 提出决策加权流匹配（DW-FM），保留标准流匹配的简单性，但使用决策敏感的端点信息对速度回归目标进行重新加权；通过损失诱导的决策差异和伴随传输论证，建立了下游后悔值与路径速度不匹配之间的理论联系。

Result: 在三个基于CVaR的背景随机优化基准任务（合成投资组合、半真实金融、交通-CVaR）上，DW-FM相比标准基线显著降低了下游决策后悔值。

Conclusion: DW-FM有效解决了生成模型训练与下游决策优化之间的目标不匹配问题，在保持流匹配简洁性的同时实现了后悔值对齐，具有理论保证和实证有效性。

Abstract: Conditional generative models are increasingly used as scenario generators for stochastic optimization, but standard training objectives emphasize uniform distributional fit rather than the downstream decisions induced by generated scenarios. This creates an objective mismatch: errors in statistically common regions may have little effect on decision regret, whereas errors in decision-sensitive regions can substantially change the optimal action. We propose Decision-Weighted Flow Matching (DW-FM), a regret-aligned training framework that preserves the simplicity of standard flow matching while reweighting its velocity-regression objective using decision-sensitive endpoint information. Theoretically, we connect downstream regret to pathwise velocity mismatch through a loss-induced decision discrepancy and an adjoint transport argument, yielding an ideal regret-aligned surrogate and practical endpoint-weighted objectives with regret guarantees. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of DW-FM on three CVaR-based contextual stochastic optimization benchmarks spanning synthetic portfolio, semi-real financial, and traffic-CVaR tasks, where DW-FM improves downstream regret over standard baselines.

</details>


### [585] [Deep Q-Learning on Hölder Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16846)
*Qian Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了连续时间、连续状态-动作空间随机控制中Q学习的算子理论基础，分析了Bellman最优性目标在扩散环境下的正则性和逼近复杂度，提出了一种适应混合正则性的张量积DeepONet架构，并给出了显式的逼近与资源界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在连续状态-动作的随机控制中，Q学习/DQN的每次更新都基于Bellman最优性目标，但该目标在扩散环境下的正则性（光滑性）和近似复杂度尚未被严格分析，这限制了理论理解和算法设计。

Method: 在均匀椭圆性和Hölder正则系数的假设下，证明Bellman更新将有界输入映射到各向异性正则类（状态变量被平滑，动作变量仅保持Lipschitz依赖），从而得到紧的Bellman迭代族；基于此混合正则性，提出张量积DeepONet架构进行逼近，并分析逼近误差与资源复杂度。

Result: 给出了Bellman目标的正则性刻画、逼近误差界和资源复杂度上界；揭示了时间步长δ→0时刚度与复杂度之间的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 该理论在连续随机控制的Bellman目标正则性与逼近层面为Q学习理论做出了直接贡献，但未给出实际采样Q学习（含探索、经验回放和随机梯度更新）的完整收敛定理。

Abstract: We study the operator-theoretic core of Q-learning in continuous-time stochastic control with continuous states and actions. In value-based reinforcement learning, each Q-learning or DQN update is built from a Bellman optimality target; our analysis isolates this target in a diffusion setting and studies its regularity and approximation complexity. Under uniform ellipticity and Hölder-regular coefficients, we show that a Bellman update maps bounded inputs into an anisotropic regularity class, smoothing the state variable while leaving only Lipschitz dependence on the action variable. This yields a compact family of Bellman iterates and motivates a tensor-product DeepONet architecture adapted to the mixed regularity of the problem. We then derive explicit approximation and resource bounds, together with a stiffness--complexity trade-off as the time step $δ\to 0$. The resulting theory makes a direct contribution to Q-learning theory at the level of Bellman target regularity and approximation in continuous stochastic control. At the same time, we do not claim a full convergence theorem for practical sampled Q-learning with exploration, replay, and stochastic gradient updates.

</details>


### [586] [HawkesNest: A Multi-Axis Synthetic Benchmark for Spatiotemporal Pattern Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16863)
*Yahya Aalaila,Sumantrak Mukherjee,Gerrit Großmann,Sebastian Vollmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了HawkesNest基准，基于多元Hawkes过程构建可控时空点模式复杂度，用于诊断STPP模型在已知结构难度下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有STPP模型评估依赖不透明的真实数据集，潜在生成结构未知，模型失败难以归因。

Method: 构建基于多元Hawkes过程的基准，定义四个复杂度轴(时空纠缠、背景异质性、跨类型交互、域拓扑)，每个轴有确定性指标，在控制全局率、稳定性和模拟预算下进行压力测试。

Result: 指标在受控扫描下单调且近似正交；Hawkes基线在异质性-纠缠联合复杂度下退化；AutoSTPP在时空纠缠单独增加时表现出敏感性。

Conclusion: HawkesNest为STPP模型提供了可归因的诊断测试框架，揭示了不同模型在不同复杂度维度下的脆弱性。

Abstract: Evaluation of spatiotemporal point process (STPP) models relies heavily on opaque real-world datasets, where latent generative structure is unknown and model failures are difficult to attribute. We introduce HawkesNest, a generator-aligned benchmark for controlled spatiotemporal pattern complexity built on a multivariate Hawkes backbone. HawkesNest defines four complexity axes: space--time entanglement, background heterogeneity, cross-type interaction, and domain topology. Each axis is associated with a deterministic index computed from the latent data-generating mechanism. By varying these axes while holding global rate, stability, and simulation budget fixed, HawkesNest enables diagnostic stress tests of STPP models under known structural difficulty. We verify that the indices are monotone and nearly orthogonal under controlled sweeps. We illustrate its use by showing that Hawkes-family baselines degrade under joint heterogeneity--entanglement complexity, even though they are structurally aligned with the Hawkes data-generating backbone. We further show that HawkesNest exposes neural-model sensitivity: AutoSTPP remains vulnerable under isolated increases in space--time entanglement. Code. Available at https://github.com/YahyaAalaila/HawkesNest

</details>


### [587] [Integrated Marketing Attribution: A Bayesian Framework for Privacy-Safe Granular Measurement Anchored in MMM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16878)
*Meghana R. Bhat,Ankit Umare,Utsav Aggarwal,Richard Vecsler,Arunkumar Mani,Karthik Nair,Chandhu Nair*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出集成营销归因（IMA）框架，通过将营销组合建模（MMM）与贝叶斯归因模型结合，在隐私安全前提下实现细粒度、一致的营销活动级归因分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MMM与MTA两种主流方法各有局限：MMM隐私友好但粒度太粗，无法优化具体营销活动；MTA粒度细但隐私限制下可靠性下降。亟需一种既能保护隐私又能提供细粒度洞察的统一框架。

Method: 提出集成营销归因（IMA）框架，将MMM与针对特定渠道的贝叶斯归因模型统一结合，利用MMM提供的先验信息，从聚合数据中推导出营销活动级别的归因效果。

Result: IMA能在隐私安全的前提下提供细粒度的归因分析，同时保持与MMM结果的一致性。

Conclusion: IMA为零售营销测量提供了一种兼顾隐私保护与细粒度分析需求的有效解决方案，弥合了MMM与MTA之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Retail marketing measurement increasingly requires granular campaign-level insights without relying on user-level tracking. However, the two dominant approaches, Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) and Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), often produce fragmented insights. MMM is privacy-safe and robust for channel-level planning but is too coarse for campaign optimization, while MTA provides granular attribution but has become less reliable under increasing privacy restrictions. We propose Integrated Marketing Attribution (IMA), a unified framework that combines MMM with channel specific Bayesian attribution models to derive campaign-level effects from aggregated data. By leveraging MMM-informed priors, IMA delivers granular, privacy-safe attribution while preserving consistency with MMM.

</details>


### [588] [Upper Bounds on the Generalization Error of Deep Learning Models via Local Robustness and Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16883)
*Abdul-Rauf Nuhu,Parham M. Kebria,Vahid Hemmati,Mahmoud N. Mahmoud,Edward Tunstel,Abdollah Homaifar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于子区域鲁棒性缩放的新颖泛化界，通过在输入空间的不同子区域中分别考虑稳定与不稳定样本的数量来缩放鲁棒性项，从而获得更紧且非空虚的泛化上界。在ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法比现有方法获得更紧的估计，能够更准确地反映深度神经网络的真实错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于鲁棒性的泛化界在实际应用中往往过于宽松（空虚），导致无法有效评估模型真实性能。作者指出，问题的很大一部分源于鲁棒性项本身的处理方式——现有方法将鲁棒性视为全局度量，忽略了其在输入空间不同子区域中的变化，这严重限制了泛化界的实用价值。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的泛化界，核心思想是根据每个子区域中稳定样本和不稳定样本的数量对鲁棒性项进行缩放。该界同时结合了数据依赖和模型依赖的因素，使得理论界与真实误差之间更紧密。具体而言，不再将鲁棒性作为全局单一度量，而是细化到输入空间的子区域层面，从而捕捉局部差异。

Result: 在ImageNet数据集上训练的多种鲁棒深度神经网络上进行了实验验证。结果表明，所提泛化界始终是非空虚的（non-vacuous），并且在所有现有方法中获得了最紧的估计，与模型的真实经验性能高度一致。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于子区域鲁棒性缩放的泛化界有效解决了现有泛化界在实际中过于宽松的问题。通过将鲁棒性度量从全局细化到局部，结合数据和模型依赖因素，实现了显著更紧且非空虚的上界，为安全关键场景下深度学习模型的可信评估提供了理论基础和实践工具。

Abstract: Generalization is a critical property of data-driven models, particularly deep learning models deployed in safety-critical applications. Robustness-based generalization bounds have gained attention as a principled way to link robustness properties to generalization performance, often in a data-dependent manner. However, most existing bounds suffer from vacuousness in practical settings, yielding loose upper bounds that greatly exceed the actual error rates and limiting their usefulness for real-world evaluation. While this issue is often attributed to the uncertainty term, a substantial part of the problem originates from the robustness term itself, particularly for the 0-1 loss. Existing approaches typically treat the robustness term as a global measure, ignoring its variation across different sub-regions of the input space. In this work, we propose a generalization bound that addresses this limitation by scaling the robustness term according to the number of stable and unstable samples within each sub-region. Our bounds incorporate both data- and model-dependent factors while maintaining practical relevance (yielding tighter upper bounds on true error). Experiments on models trained on the ImageNet dataset show that our bounds remain consistently non-vacuous and achieve the tightest estimates among existing methods, closely aligning with empirical performance across a range of robust deep neural networks.

</details>


### [589] [Beyond Weights and Gradients: A Taxonomy of Federated Learning Messages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16891)
*Alvaro Javier Vargas Guerrero,Xinguang Wang,Quang Manh Doan,Guy Nagels*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对联邦学习中对现代通信负载（如合成数据、联邦分析）定义不完整的问题，提出了联邦消息的正式数学定义，并构建了涵盖模型结构、统计摘要和数据条件表示的三类分类体系，通过计算需求、通信成本和隐私风险评估揭示了去中心化训练中的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习的定义无法涵盖现代通信负载（如合成数据、联邦分析等），缺乏一个能同时考虑效用和隐私的正式数学框架来统一描述联邦消息。

Method: 提出联邦消息的形式化数学定义；构建三类分类体系（模型结构、统计摘要、数据条件表示）；从计算需求、通信成本和隐私风险三个维度评估各类消息；并对202篇近期文献进行系统综述。

Result: 发现自2021年以来，联邦学习领域显著转向多样化消息传递范式，从标准深度学习更新向更专门化的信息共享演变。

Conclusion: 该框架为未来研究提供了结构化路径，有助于根据不同硬件和安全需求优化联邦系统。

Abstract: Federated Learning is rapidly evolving beyond the exchange of traditional model weights and gradients, yet existing definitions fail to capture the full scope of modern payloads like synthetic data and federated analytics. This paper addresses the gap by proposing a formal mathematical definition of a federated message that accounts for both utility and privacy. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes these exchanges into three categories: model structures, statistical summaries, and data-conditioned representations. By evaluating these groups based on computational demands, communication costs, and privacy risks, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved in decentralized training. Our review of 202 recent publications highlights a significant shift since 2021 toward diverse messaging paradigms, signaling a move away from standard deep learning updates toward more specialized information sharing. This framework provides a structured path for future research to optimize federated systems for varying hardware and security requirements.

</details>


### [590] [Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them II: Hyperball Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16899)
*Kaiyue Wen,Xingyu Dang,Kaifeng Lyu,Tengyu Ma,Percy Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Hyperball优化器包装器，通过固定权重矩阵Frobenius范数及其优化器更新，解决了AdamW/Muon在大模型规模下收益递减的问题，在1.2B参数模型上实现20-30%的token等效加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于矩阵的优化器（如Muon）在语言模型预训练中能显著加速，但随着模型大小和数据规模增长，使用标准常数解耦权重衰减时，Muon相比AdamW的收益逐渐减小，需要解决这一扩展性问题。

Method: 提出Hyperball优化器包装器，将权重矩阵的Frobenius范数及其对应的优化器更新固定为常数，可应用于Adam或Muon等基础优化器。

Result: 在Qwen3风格模型（最高1.2B参数）上，Muon+Hyperball相比权重衰减基线实现20-30%的token等效加速；同时改善了跨宽度和深度的学习率迁移性。

Conclusion: Hyperball通过固定范数机制解决了大模型规模下优化器收益衰减问题，其有效性源于权重衰减会决定权重矩阵方向的角学习率这一理论依据。

Abstract: Matrix based optimizers such as Muon can substantially speed up language model pretraining, but their gains over AdamW are observed to shrink as model size and data scale grow when using standard constant decoupled weight decay. We propose Hyperball, a simple optimizer wrapper that addresses this issue. Given a base optimizer such as Adam or Muon, Hyperball sets the Frobenius norms of weight matrices and their corresponding optimizer updates to fixed constants. On Qwen3 style models up to 1.2B parameters, Muon Hyperball achieves 20--30% token equivalent speedup over weight decay baselines. Hyperball also improves learning rate transfer across widths and depths compared to decoupled weight decay. This method is motivated by prior theory showing that training with weight decay leads to an equilibrium weight norm that only depends on the training hyperparameters. Through this mechanism, the weight decay then decides the angular learning rate, i.e. how fast the direction of the weight matrix changes.

</details>


### [591] [Factorized Neural Operators Decompose Dynamic and Persistent Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16900)
*Hao Tang,Yuechen Duan,Jiongyu Zhu,Zimeng Feng,Hao Li,Chao Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出因子化神经算子（FaNO），将谱表示分解为等变动态响应和不变持久响应，分别捕捉物理系统中的快速瞬变动力学和持久结构，在预测精度、参数效率和跨尺度泛化方面优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子依赖单一归纳偏置，将不同物理响应耦合到共享表示中，难以处理物理系统中快变动力学与持久结构共存的多尺度行为。

Method: 提出统一格林函数框架，构建FaNO将谱表示分解为两个分支：等变分支捕获快速瞬变动力学，不变分支提取相干持久结构，实现物理角色的自发特化。

Result: FaNO在预测精度、参数效率和跨尺度泛化上均有提升，尤其在长程自回归滚动、跨分辨率外推及物理机制迁移下保持一致的预测性能。

Conclusion: 超越单一归纳偏置，采用因子化算子表示更能反映物理系统的异构组织特性，有望加速机器学习在科学计算和科学发现中的可靠部署。

Abstract: Physical systems often exhibit heterogeneous mechanisms, where rapidly evolving dynamics coexist with persistent structures. Capturing such multiscale physical behavior remains challenging for existing neural operators, which typically rely on single dominant inductive bias and therefore couple distinct physical responses into a shared representation. We introduce the Unified Green's Function Framework across domains and propose the Factorized Neural Operators (FaNO), which decompose spectral representations into equivariant dynamic responses and invariant persistent responses, leading to better interpretability and generalization. Mechanistically, we show that the two operator branches spontaneously specialize into distinct physical roles that remain consistent across scales and domains: the equivariant branch captures rapidly varying transient dynamics, whereas the invariant branch extracts coherent persistent structures. This factorized mechanism of FaNO improves prediction accuracy, parameter efficiency and cross-scale generalization across physical systems and domains. In particular, it maintains consistent predictions under long-horizon autoregressive rollout, cross-resolution extrapolation and physical-regime shifts. These findings suggest that scalable physical modeling may benefit from moving beyond single-inductive-bias formulations toward factorized operator representations that better reflect the heterogeneous organization of physical systems, accelerating the reliable deployment of machine learning for scientific computing and discovery.

</details>


### [592] [Demystifying Variance in Circuit Discovery of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16920)
*Frank Zhengqing Wu,Francesco Tonin,Volkan Cevher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CEAP方法改进电路发现（EAP-IG），从理论上降低重采样方差；揭示重述方差源于不同模板激活不同电路，暗示大模型本质难以调控；指出样本方差大多为良性，与选择性贡献缩放机制有关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电路发现方法EAP-IG虽在忠信度指标上表现良好，但存在显著的变异性（重采样方差、重述方差、样本方差），亟需研究这些方差的根源并提出改进方法。

Method: 提出CEAP方法，在EAP-IG基础上加入理论保证以降低重采样方差；通过实验分析重述方差的来源（不同模板激活不同电路）；利用选择性贡献缩放机制解释样本方差的极端忠信度分数。

Result: CEAP有效降低重采样方差；发现重述方差源于模板差异，且稀疏性无法解决此问题；样本方差总体良性，极端分数由选择性贡献缩放机制导致。

Conclusion: 大模型因任务可表达为无数模板，其内部电路可能本质难以全面解释和调控；CEAP为电路发现提供了更稳定的方法，但对重述方差问题仍需进一步探索。

Abstract: Circuit discovery is a key technique in mechanistic interpretability to pinpoint the model components that are crucial for performing a given task. Although the current state-of-the-art method (EAP-IG) performs well on the metric of (un)faithfulness, it suffers from substantial variability. This includes resampling variance, where the circuit changes when we probe with a new batch of data from the same distribution; rephrasing variance, where the discovered circuit shifts when the prompts are rephrased; and sample-wise variance, where a circuit with low population unfaithfulness exhibits large fluctuations in unfaithfulness across individual samples.
  This paper studies the roots of these variances. We demonstrate that CEAP, our new circuit discovery method that improves upon EAP-IG with a theoretical guarantee, can substantially lessen resampling variance. We further show that rephrasing variance arises because prompts with different templates tend to activate different circuits in the model. This leads us to argue that it may be challenging to find a comprehensive circuit that explains and controls the model's behavior on a task, which can be expressed in countless templates, suggesting that LLMs may be inherently hard to steer. We show that sparsity, which has been claimed to form more compact and interpretable task circuits, fails to solve this problem. Regarding sample-wise variance, we argue that it is largely benign: extremely poor unfaithfulness scores often stem from how unfaithfulness is defined, rather than from defects in the measured circuits. We show that the magnitude of unfaithfulness is affected by selective contribution scaling, a neural mechanism that accounts for the extremely poor scores sometimes observed.

</details>


### [593] [A Unified Causal-Origin Taxonomy of Distributional Shifts in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16933)
*Ardianto Wibowo,Paulo E Santos,Amer Baghdadi,Matthew Stephenson,Karl Sammut,Jean-Philippe Diguet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的因果起源分类法，用于刻画强化学习中的分布偏移，将ID/OOD泛化与非平稳环境联系起来，并基于POMDP分解交互过程，区分内部（智能体驱动）和外部（环境驱动）的偏移，同时引入评估框架衡量偏移影响与适应能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注分布偏移的缓解方法，而忽视偏移在智能体-环境交互中的因果起源，且ID/OOD泛化与非平稳设置之间的形式化关系尚不清晰。

Method: 基于部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）将交互分解为状态分布、观测过程、策略、奖励和转移动力学等结构组件，结合偏移时间边界，提出统一分类法，区分内部（智能体驱动）与外部（环境驱动）偏移，以及显式、隐式和混合偏移。

Result: 提出了统一的因果起源分类法，将ID/OOD泛化和非平稳性统一为底层过程的结构化变化，并构建了基于性能退化和恢复度量的偏移影响评估框架。

Conclusion: 该工作为在分布偏移下进行系统性鲁棒性分析提供了理论基础，通过将分布偏移扎根于RL的因果起源结构，支持更系统的鲁棒性分析。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems often degrade when operating conditions differ from those previously encountered, reflecting distributional shifts in the underlying data-generating process. Such shifts may occur between training and evaluation, as in In-Distribution (ID) and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, or within non-stationary settings where environment dynamics evolve over time. However, the formal relationship between these views remains unclear, and existing work mainly focuses on mitigation rather than the causal origin of shift within the agent-environment interaction. This work develops a unified causal-origin taxonomy that characterizes sources of distributional shift in RL and relates ID/OOD generalization to non-stationary settings. We transfer the classical dataset-shift principle from supervised learning to RL by reformulating distributional shift in terms of the generative interaction process. Using a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), we decompose the interaction into structural components, including the state distribution, observation process, policy, reward, and transition dynamics, together with the shifted-time boundary. The proposed taxonomy distinguishes internal, agent-driven, and external, environment-driven, distributional shifts. The shifted-time boundary perspective further characterizes explicit, implicit, and hybrid shifts. This formulation unifies ID/OOD generalization and non-stationarity as structured changes in the underlying process. We also introduce an evaluation framework for measuring shift impact and adaptation through performance degradation and recovery metrics. By grounding distributional shift in the causal-origin structure of RL, this work supports systematic analysis of robustness under distributional shift.

</details>


### [594] [Scalable Circuit Learning for Interpreting Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16939)
*Naiyu Yin,Dennis Wei,Tian Gao,Amit Dhurandhar,Karthikeyan Natesan Ramamurthy,Yue Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CircuitLasso，一种基于稀疏线性回归的可扩展电路学习方法，能在显著降低计算成本的同时，恢复与最先进干预方法结构精度匹配的电路，并有效揭示SAE特征间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征的可解释性电路学习方法因特征维度高、计算开销大而难以扩展，亟需一种更高效的方法来学习可解释的电路。

Method: 基于稀疏线性回归（Lasso）的CircuitLasso方法，通过学习SAE特征之间的稀疏关系来构建电路，避免了昂贵的干预式计算。

Result: 1) 结构精度与最先进的干预方法相当；2) 计算成本大幅降低；3) 能有效揭示SAE特征间的关系，展示语义特征在模型中的传播过程。

Conclusion: CircuitLasso提供了一种高效、可扩展的电路学习方法，并验证了学习到的电路在领域泛化任务中能以更低成本达到可比性能的实用价值。

Abstract: A prominent research direction in mechanistic interpretability is learning sparse circuits over LLM components to reveal how they jointly produce model behavior. However, raw neurons are polysemantic, making learned circuits hard to interpret. Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features alleviate this, but their high dimensionality makes existing intervention-based circuit learning methods computationally prohibitive. We propose CircuitLasso, a scalable circuit-learning approach based on sparse linear regression. CircuitLasso recovers circuits whose structural accuracy matches that of state-of-the-art intervention-based methods on the benchmark data, at a fraction of the computational cost. For interpretability, CircuitLasso efficiently uncovers relationships among SAE features, showing how human-interpretable semantic features propagate through the model and influence its predictions. Finally, we validate the utility of our learned circuits by leveraging their insights to achieve comparable performance at substantially lower cost on a domain-generalization task.

</details>


### [595] [Phantoms and Disclosures: a Causal Framework for Auditing Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16952)
*Kareem Amin,Rudrajit Das,Alessandro Epasto,Adel Javanmard,Dennis Kraft,Mónica Ribero,Sergei Vassilvitskii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个无需模型访问、无需插入金丝雀数据、无需训练参考模型的经验性隐私审计框架，通过统计假设检验区分合成数据中的"真实泄露"与"幽灵泄露"，为合成数据生成系统提供更紧的隐私泄露下界估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI和LLM生成的高效用合成数据存在记忆和复现训练集中隐私信息的风险，现有审计方法需要模型访问、金丝雀插入或参考模型训练，计算成本高昂且实用性受限。

Method: 将输入数据划分为训练集和保留集，对合成输出进行统计假设检验，判断观测到的数据披露是否符合零学习或特定差分隐私界限下的严格隐私基线，从而区分真实泄露（系统直接复现用户信息）与幽灵泄露（偶然生成）。

Result: 该框架有效作为成员推断攻击，提供比先前基于数据的审计方法更紧的隐私泄露经验下界；计算资源需求比影子模型或金丝雀基线方法低数个数量级。

Conclusion: 提出了一种模型无关、仅需合成输出和保留控制集的隐私审计框架，可在无模型内部访问条件下高效检测合成数据中的隐私泄露。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) has spurred interest in synthetic data as a privacy-preserving alternative to sensitive real-world datasets. However, generating high-utility synthetic data often carries the risk of memorizing and regurgitating private information from the training corpus. In this work, we present a customizable empirical auditing framework designed to detect and explain such data disclosures. Our framework introduces a mechanism to distinguish between "true disclosures"-where the system directly reproduces a user's information-and "phantom disclosures''-where the system incidentally generates a user's data. By partitioning input data into training and holdout sets and applying rigorous statistical hypothesis testing, we determine if observed disclosures are consistent with strict privacy baselines, such as zero-learning or specific Differential Privacy (DP) bounds. Crucially, this approach requires no model access, no canary insertion, and no reference model training -only the synthetic output and a held-out control set. We demonstrate that this framework effectively functions as a membership inference attack, providing empirical lower bounds on privacy leakage that are tighter than prior data-based auditing methods. Our approach is model-agnostic, applies to any synthetic data generation mechanism, and requires orders of magnitude fewer computational resources than shadow-model or canary-based alternatives.

</details>


### [596] [Beyond the Smile: A Hybrid Convolutional VAE for Crypto Volatility Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16961)
*Sadanand Singh,Allam Reddy,Manan Chopra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于加密货币隐含波动率曲面的卷积变分自编码器，结合二次微笑再拟合的混合预测器，在BTC和ETH期权数据上实现曲面补全RMSE 0.94-1.56 vol点，混合预测器在50%掩码率下达到0.83 vol点（相比单独微笑再拟合的7.00，误差降低八倍），且无额外推理成本。联合训练提升9-27%，模型能检测异常市场事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加密货币期权市场的隐含波动率曲面存在大量缺失数据（稀疏报价），传统参数化微笑模型在数据缺失严重时误差巨大，需要一种既能学习波动率曲面潜在结构又能完成缺失值补全的生成模型。

Method: 使用卷积变分自编码器学习6×7 tenor-delta网格上的波动率曲面潜在表示，结合二次微笑再拟合策略，通过确定性每期限路由规则组合两者；采用联合训练（BTC+ETH）增强泛化能力。

Result: 混合预测器在50%掩码下RMSE 0.83 vol点，比单独微笑拟合（7.00）降低8倍；在结构性缺失（整条期限删除）下生成模型仍保持1.5-1.9 vol点，而微笑拟合误差9.6-13.1；联合训练提升9-27%；模型可检测出8月闪崩和10月ETF预期行情异常。

Conclusion: 所提混合方法在数据缺失严重时显著优于纯参数化方法，且保持无套利性质；加密货币波动率曲面在BTC和ETH间共享大量潜在结构；模型可作为异常市场事件的无监督检测工具。

Abstract: We present a convolutional variational autoencoder for cryptocurrency implied-volatility surfaces, together with a deployable predictor that combines it with a quadratic smile re-fit through a deterministic per-tenor routing rule. Trained on 6,034 fully-filled hourly Binance Options surfaces of BTC and ETH spanning May-October 2023 and parameterised on a common $6 \times 7$ tenor-delta grid, the model attains a hidden-cell surface-completion RMSE in the 0.94-1.56 vol-point range across both markets and mask rates 10-50%. The hybrid predictor attains 0.83 vol points at 50% masking against 7.00 for the smile re-fit alone, an eightfold reduction obtained at no additional inference cost. Under structurally-correlated hole patterns that emulate the withdrawal of an entire tenor of strikes, the smile re-fit incurs 9.6-13.1 vol points of error while the learned model remains at 1.5-1.9, isolating a regime in which the generative model is the only viable predictor. Joint training on BTC and ETH improves the in-distribution model on both markets by 9-27% relative to the better-performing single-symbol counterpart, indicating a substantially shared vol-surface manifold across the two largest cryptocurrencies over the observation window. The hybrid is calendar- and butterfly-arbitrage-free at the listed strikes, a property that the parametric smile re-fit alone fails at high mask rates. The per-snapshot reconstruction error of the trained model flags the late-October ETF-anticipation rally and the August $17$, $2023$ flash crash as elevated-error periods without supervision. All training and evaluation infrastructure is released to support reproducible follow-on work.

</details>


### [597] [Scalable Pairwise Kernel Learning with Stochastic Vec Trick](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16979)
*Napsu Karmitsa,Tapio Pahikkala,Antti Airola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPaiK是一种针对成对学习场景的可扩展核方法，通过随机广义vec技巧(sGVT)大幅降低计算和内存开销，能在七个药物-靶标亲和力数据集上达到先进水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 成对学习（pairwise learning）中，核方法虽然表达能力强，但计算和内存开销巨大，难以应用于大规模数据集。作者希望保留核方法的表达能力，同时解决可扩展性问题。

Method: 提出随机广义vec技巧（sGVT），这是对稀疏Kronecker积乘法算法的随机化扩展，用于高效的大规模成对核训练。基于此构建了SPaiK框架。

Result: 在7个真实的药物-靶标亲和力数据集上评估，与当前最先进的成对学习方法进行比较，取得了具有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: SPaiK成功将基于核的成对学习推广到此前难以企及的数据规模，为大规模成对学习任务提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Pairwise learning is a specialized form of supervised learning that focuses on predicting outcomes for pairs of objects. In this work, we introduce SPaiK, a new scalable kernel learning method tailored for pairwise settings. Our approach preserves the expressive power of kernel methods while substantially reducing computational and memory requirements. The key innovation is the stochastic generalized vec trick (sGVT), a stochastic extension of the sparse Kronecker product multiplication algorithm, which enables efficient large-scale training with pairwise kernels. By incorporating sGVT, SPaiK makes it possible to apply kernel-based pairwise learning to datasets of a size previously out of reach. We evaluate the performance of SPaiK on seven real-world drug-target affinity datasets and compare the results with state-of-the-art methods in pairwise learning.

</details>


### [598] [Analytic Torsion and Spectral Gap Capture Persistent-Laplacian Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16990)
*Jernej Grlj,Aaron D. Lauda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将持久拉普拉斯算子压缩为三个数学不变量（贝蒂数、谱间隙、解析挠率）的紧凑谱表示方法，在多个基准数据集上验证了其有效性，在降低计算开销的同时有时性能甚至优于全谱。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持久拉普拉斯算子虽能提供比持久同调更丰富的几何表示，但其完整谱用于学习任务时面临高维度和不同过滤尺度下的"变长"问题，亟需一种紧凑且数学上可解释的固定长度表示。

Method: 将持久拉普拉斯算子的全谱蒸馏为三个数学不变量：贝蒂数（拓扑特征）、谱间隙（代数连通性）和解析挠率（几何复杂性），形成固定长度的紧凑特征表示。

Result: 在MNIST、QM-3D和SKEMPI WT数据集上，该简化特征空间能够捕捉全谱的关键预测信号，部分情况下甚至优于全谱，同时显著降低了计算成本并避免了高频特征噪声。

Conclusion: 这三个不变量为谱几何与拓扑学习之间提供了原则性的固定长度接口，验证了通过数学归纳实现降维的有效性。

Abstract: While persistent Laplacians (PL) offer a richer geometric representation of data than persistent homology, utilizing their full eigenspectrum for learning tasks is often hampered by high dimensionality and the ``varying length'' problem across different filtration scales. We propose a compact spectral representation that distills the persistent Laplacian into three mathematically grounded invariants: Betti numbers, the spectral gap, and analytic torsion. Across benchmark datasets including MNIST, QM-3D, and SKEMPI WT, we demonstrate that this reduced feature space captures the essential predictive signal of the full spectrum, and in some cases outperforms it, while significantly reducing computational overhead and preventing the noise introduced by higher-frequency eigenvalues. Our results suggest that these invariants provide a principled, fixed-length interface between spectral geometry and topological learning.

</details>


### [599] [From Tokens to Policy: Causal and Interpretable Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17010)
*Riccardo Cadei,Frank Otchere,Nyasha Tirivayi,Gustavo Angeles Tagliaferro,Falco J. Bargagli-Stoffi,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NEXIS方法，利用多模态预治疗数据将异质性治疗效果识别重新定义为马尔可夫毯发现问题，在可控实验中实现可解释的因果HTE表征，并通过非洲反贫困项目验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HTE识别方法在可表达性和可解释性之间存在权衡，且当未测量的异质性驱动因素存在时，方法两端都可能产生虚假的HTE特征，缺乏因果解读。作者希望利用更广泛的预治疗测量（多模态、多视角）和可扩展的表征学习，实现具有因果意义的HTE识别。

Method: 将HTE识别重新定义为在充分且对齐的预治疗表征上的马尔可夫毯发现问题，提出NEXIS（神经暴露交互搜索）——一种迭代过程，具有可证明且经验验证的一致性选择能力。

Result: 在非洲两个反贫困项目中部署NEXIS，通过卫星影像增强数据，捕捉了先前未测量的环境效应修饰因子，生成了新颖、可解释且具有指导意义的方案来优化项目的后续迭代。

Conclusion: 多模态预治疗数据结合NEXIS方法能够在可控实验中实现HTE的因果表征，既保持了可解释性，又避免了虚假关联的干扰，为政策优化提供了可操作的指导。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Treatment Effect (HTE) identification is crucial to explain the impact of an intervention and optimize our policies accordingly. Existing approaches trade expressivity for interpretability, but, if some active heterogeneity drivers are unmeasured, methods at both ends of this spectrum allow for spurious HTE characterization with no causal reading. In this work, we focus on controlled experiments and argue that an oracle HTE causal characterization via the latent interactors is now within reach, thanks to (i) more extensive pre-treatment measurements, i.e., multi-modal and multi-view, and (ii) scalable representations with minimal human supervision. We then re-frame HTE identification as a Markov-blanket discovery problem on a sufficient and aligned pre-treatment representation, and introduce Neural EXposure Interaction Search (NEXIS), an iterative procedure with provable and empirically validated consistent selection. We deploy NEXIS on two anti-poverty programs in Africa, augmenting each with satellite imagery capturing previously unmeasured environmental effect modifiers, leading to novel, interpretable and prescriptive guidelines to optimize the programs' next iterations.

</details>


### [600] [Filtered Conformal Ellipsoids for Graph-Native Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17014)
*Yannick Limmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究多变量时间序列的联合预测集，提出了一种过滤共形椭球方法，通过状态空间滤波器生成预测均值和协方差，再结合分裂共形校准调整半径，在依赖数据下实现了近似覆盖保证，并在交通数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多变量时间序列的联合预测集需要控制单一事件并适应跨坐标依赖关系，现有方法在处理依赖性和非高斯性方面存在不足。

Method: 提出过滤共形椭球：使用冻结状态空间滤波器输出一步预测均值和协方差，对马氏距离分数进行分裂共形校准。分析了滤波后分数的依赖性和可观测预测律商空间的收缩性，在稳定贝叶斯高斯投影滤波等条件下建立了覆盖界。

Result: 在METRLA-20和PEMSBAY-50等交通基准数据集上，所提方法比静态协方差和非滤波基线方法产生更尖锐的椭球；但在全图规模和非图原生数据集上，因子模型和Copula基线方法表现更好。

Conclusion: 过滤共形椭球能有效利用学习到的预测协方差提升预测集效率，但性能依赖于滤波器质量和数据特性，在不同规模和数据特性下优势不同。

Abstract: Joint prediction sets for multivariate time series should control a single event while adapting to cross-coordinate dependence. We study filtered conformal ellipsoids: a frozen state-space filter emits a one-step predictive mean and covariance, and split-conformal calibration is applied to the resulting Mahalanobis scores. The filter is used to choose the ellipsoid shape; conformal calibration chooses the scalar radius, so the construction benefits from a learned predictive covariance without relying on Gaussian tail probabilities for coverage. The main difficulty is that filtered scores are dependent and learned recurrent filters need not contract in their raw hidden state; we therefore analyse contraction in an observable predictive-law quotient that identifies hidden states producing the same future sequence of emitted Gaussian laws. Under a stable Bayes Gaussian-projection filter, covariance bounds, and a finite-horizon observability Fisher condition, small excess Gaussian negative log-likelihood implies contraction of the learned emitted laws. Combined with a threshold-autocovariance envelope this yields a Chebyshev-type approximate coverage bound for filtered split-conformal prediction under dependence; a sharper Bernstein-type bound requires an additional geometric-mixing concentration assumption. Under Gaussian oracle realisability we also obtain a near-oracle log-volume comparison within the class of conditionally valid Gaussian ellipsoid rules. We instantiate the framework with a GCN-GRU filter with diagonal-plus-low-rank covariance. On moderate-size graph-native traffic benchmarks (METRLA-$20$ and PEMSBAY-$50$), the learned filter gives sharper at-target ellipsoids than static-covariance and non-filter baselines; at full-graph scale and on non-graph-native datasets, factor and copula baselines can be stronger.

</details>


### [601] [ExpRL: Exploratory RL for LLM Mid-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17024)
*Violet Xiang,Amrith Setlur,Chase Blagden,Nick Haber,Aviral Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ExpRL方法，利用人类编写的问答数据作为奖励脚手架，通过LLM评判器对推理过程进行密集奖励，从而替代传统的监督微调或稀疏奖励强化学习，有效增强LLM在数学推理任务中的预训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏奖励强化学习在提升LLM推理能力方面效果显著，但其成功高度依赖于基模型的覆盖范围。现有方法通过中训练人工指定的推理轨迹来教授原始技能，但这种方式需要手动指定学习内容，且难以应对需要组合多种技能的复杂问题。因此，作者希望探索一种更自动化的方法。

Method: ExpRL方法：不将参考解决方案视为模仿目标，而是将其作为奖励脚手架（reward scaffolds），隐藏参考解决方案，仅用于构建问题特定的评分标准，由LLM评判器对策略采样的推理轨迹进行结果级或过程级密集奖励，从而强化部分进展、有用的中间简化及高效的推理行为。

Result: 在挑战性数学推理任务上，ExpRL在RL预训练效果上优于SFT、稀疏奖励GRPO和自蒸馏方法，并为后续的稀疏奖励RL提供了更好的初始化。此外，跨领域实验表明ExpRL能扩展到数学以外的领域。

Conclusion: ExpRL通过将参考解决方案作为奖励脚手架，实现了更自动化的中训练，有效提升了LLM在复杂推理任务上的能力，并具有良好的跨领域泛化潜力。

Abstract: Sparse reward reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard tool for improving LLM reasoning, but its success depends critically on the coverage present in the base model. In practice, models are often primed for RL through \emph{mid-training} on curated reasoning traces that teach useful primitive skills such as decomposition, verification, or self-correction. Although effective, this strategy requires manually specifying what the model should learn, and it remains unclear whether such primitive coverage is enough for much harder problems, which require combining these skills into broader solution strategies. We study a more automated approach: \emph{RL-based mid-training} using large corpora of human-written question-answer data. Rather than treating reference solutions as targets to imitate, our method, ExpRL, uses them as \emph{reward scaffolds}: references are hidden from the policy and used only to construct problem-specific grading rubrics for judging on-policy reasoning traces. The policy samples from the original problem prompt, while an LLM judge compares the sampled reasoning trace against the reference solution and assigns outcome-level or process-level dense rewards. This lets ExpRL reinforce partial progress, useful intermediate reductions, and productive reasoning behaviors that sparse final-answer rewards often fail to upweight. On challenging math reasoning tasks, ExpRL yields stronger RL priming than SFT, sparse-reward GRPO, and self-distillation, and provides a better initialization for subsequent sparse-reward RL. Additional mixed-domain experiments further suggest that ExpRL can extend beyond the original math-only setting.

</details>


### [602] [HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17028)
*Alper Yıldırım*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HAMON，一种基于被动衍射光学的时序预测核心，无需可训练的数字序列混合层，在多个基准上超越或接近最强数字基线，并证明了预测来自光学场而非数字头。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明长期时序预测的核心算子往往是低复杂度且近似线性的，而Transformer的密集叠加表示可能并非必要。这引发了一个底层问题：如果预测算子可以是低复杂度的，是否必须用可学习的数字时序混合来实现？

Method: HAMON将历史值编码到光学孔径上，未来位置保持暗场，通过级联可训练相位掩模和自由空间衍射直接在输出场中形成预测。推理时仅需一次被动光学传播，无需可训练的数字序列混合层。

Result: 在ETTm2全部预测长度和ETTh2除最长外的所有长度上超越最强数字基线，MSE提升最高14%；在Weather上具有竞争力；在高通道数的Traffic和Electricity上落后于最强基线。消融实验和交叉模拟验证了预测来自光学场。

Conclusion: 被动光学核心可以成为数字时序混合的有效替代方案，HAMON为光学硬件和被动物理序列混合提供了具体目标。

Abstract: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This raises a substrate-level question: if the core forecasting operator is often low-complexity and approximately linear, does it need to be implemented as learned digital temporal mixing? We introduce HAMON, a passive diffractive optical forecasting core in which historical values are encoded onto an optical aperture, future positions are left dark, and cascaded trainable phase masks with free-space diffraction shape the forecast directly in the output field. At inference, prediction is performed by a single passive optical propagation pass with no trainable digital sequence-mixing layer.
  Across standard benchmarks, HAMON outperforms the strongest digital baselines considered on ETTm2 at all horizons and on ETTh2 at all but the longest horizon, improving MSE by up to 14\% and doing so consistently across horizons rather than at isolated points. It is competitive on Weather and trails the strongest baselines on the remaining ETT settings and on the high-channel-count Traffic and Electricity datasets. Phase encoding, intensity-compatible readout, and phase-scrambling ablations, together with a TorchOptics cross-simulator check, indicate that the forecasts arise from the data-bearing optical field rather than from a digital forecasting head. Because the passive core uses standard Fourier optics, HAMON defines a concrete target for optical hardware and for passive physical sequence mixing.

</details>


### [603] [Your Privacy My Cloak: Backdoor Attacks on Differentially Private Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17035)
*Xiaolin Li,Ning Wang,Ninghui Li,Wenhai Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了“差分隐私(DP)天然增强联邦学习(FL)鲁棒性”的假设，发现DP会掩盖恶意更新的统计特征，使现有防御失效。作者提出RING攻击，利用DP隐藏恶意贡献，在四种数据集上平均攻击成功率达90.3%，比基线提升26.08倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战“差分隐私天然增强联邦学习抗后门攻击鲁棒性”这一普遍假设，揭示DP-FL中存在的根本性安全漏洞。

Method: 提出RING攻击方法，通过协同构造对抗性扰动，在被DP掩盖的情况下重建强后门信号，同时规避异常检测。该方法作为扰动层与底层后门技术无关，可广泛适用并与现有攻击组合。

Result: 在四个图像和文本数据集、非独立同分布设置下，RING在中等隐私预算下对六种先进防御的平均攻击成功率达90.3%，比基线策略提升高达26.08倍。

Conclusion: DP与后门防御之间存在根本性冲突：缓解这种威胁会带来显著的效用折衷，揭示了差分隐私联邦学习部署中的安全鸿沟。

Abstract: Prior research suggests that differential privacy (DP) inherently enhances the robustness of federated learning (FL) against backdoor attacks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption. Through an empirical analysis of two baseline attack strategies, we uncover a fundamental tension in DP-FL: while bypassing DP allows state-of-the-art defenses to detect and filter malicious updates, complying with DP inadvertently masks their distinguishing statistical characteristics. Consequently, existing defenses become ineffective as DP reduces the raw backdoor signal. Building on this masking effect, we propose RING, a novel attack that explicitly exploits DP to conceal malicious contributions while maximizing attack impact. By collaboratively crafting adversarial perturbations, compromised clients reconstruct a strong backdoor signal during aggregation without triggering anomaly detection. RING operates as a perturbation layer that is agnostic to the underlying backdoor technique, making it broadly applicable and composable with existing attacks -- a property that significantly amplifies the threat it poses to DP-FL. Extensive evaluations across four image and text datasets under non-iid distributions show that RING achieves an average attack success rate of 90.3% against six state-of-the-art defenses under a moderate privacy budget, an improvement of up to 26.08x over baseline strategies. Finally, we evaluate potential countermeasures and find that mitigating this threat incurs significant utility trade-offs, exposing a fundamental security gap in the deployment of differentially private FL.

</details>


### [604] [Exact Posterior Score Estimation for Solving Linear Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17048)
*Abbas Mammadov,Ozgur Kara,Kaan Oktay,Iskander Azangulov,Adil Kaan Akan,Hyungjin Chung,James Matthew Rehg,Yee Whye Teh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文推导了线性高斯逆问题在一般高斯插值下的精确后验得分闭式解，提出精确后验得分（EPS）训练目标，该目标保留标准去噪预训练的输入/输出结构，可通过微调或从头训练实现。在五个线性逆问题和两个数据集上，EPS在保真度、感知质量和分布指标上均优于无训练和基于训练的方法，且去噪器评估次数比基于梯度的后验采样器少一个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么使用近似测量匹配修正来引导固定预训练去噪器，要么训练放弃去噪结构的条件恢复模型。缺乏一种能保留去噪结构且精确求解后验得分的方法。

Method: 推导线性高斯逆问题在一般高斯插值下的精确后验得分闭式解，证明后验采样可简化为在算子依赖的偏移枢轴和各向异性噪声协方差下的去噪问题。据此提出EPS训练目标，保留标准预训练的输入/输出结构，可从零训练或从预训练去噪器微调。推理时使用与主干相同的采样器，无需似然梯度或投影。

Result: 在FFHQ和ImageNet上的五个线性逆问题中，EPS在保真度、感知质量和分布指标上均优于无训练和基于训练的基线方法，且去噪器评估次数比基于梯度的后验采样器少约一个数量级。

Conclusion: EPS通过精确后验得分闭式解，成功将线性逆问题后验采样转化为去噪问题，在保留下采样结构的同时实现了更优的性能和计算效率。

Abstract: Diffusion and flow-based models learn powerful data priors by training a denoiser to reverse Gaussian corruption. To use this prior to solve a linear inverse problem, one needs to sample from the posterior, but the score that the prior provides is the unconditional score, not the posterior score. Existing methods either steer a fixed pretrained denoiser with approximate measurement-matching corrections, or train a conditional restoration model that abandons the denoising structure of the prior. We derive the exact posterior score in closed form for linear Gaussian inverse problems under general Gaussian interpolants, and show that posterior sampling reduces to a denoising problem at an operator-dependent shifted pivot under an anisotropic noise covariance. We turn this identity into Exact Posterior Score (EPS), a denoising training objective that preserves the input/output structure of standard pretraining and can therefore be trained from scratch or fine-tuned from a pretrained denoiser. At inference, EPS uses the same sampler as the underlying backbone, with no likelihood gradients or projections. We evaluate EPS on five linear inverse problems across FFHQ and ImageNet, where it outperforms training-free and training-based baselines on fidelity, perceptual, and distributional metrics, while using roughly an order of magnitude fewer denoiser evaluations than gradient-based posterior samplers.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [605] [Faster Code, Deeper Debt? A Multivocal Literature Review on Technical Debt and Its Early Signs in LLM-Assisted Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14796)
*Ramtin Ehsani,Shriya Rawal,Yuanfang Cai,Preetha Chatterjee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过对104篇文献的多声部文献综述，系统分析了LLM辅助开发如何导致技术债务，包括放大传统债务（代码、设计、文档债务）和引入新型LLM特定债务（快速集成债务、提示债务、伦理债务、数据债务、溯源债务），并总结了现有缓解策略、工具及存在的标准化缺失问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM辅助编码的迅速普及，管理由此引入的技术债务变得紧迫，但目前缺乏对该问题的系统性理解与标准化评估框架。

Method: 采用多声部文献综述方法，对104篇来源（31篇正式文献，73篇灰色文献）进行系统分析。

Result: LLM既放大传统技术债务，又引入新债务类型；识别出"快速集成债务"等新类别；现有工具以SonarQube等通用工具为主，缺乏LLM特定标准化基准和指标。

Conclusion: 需要建立LLM特定技术债务的标准化基准与度量体系，以保障LLM在软件工程中的可靠集成。

Abstract: With the rapid adoption of LLM-assisted coding, the need to manage the technical debt these systems introduce has become urgent. In this paper, we conduct a multivocal literature review of 104 sources (31 formal, 73 grey) to examine how LLM-assisted development contributes to technical debt and what strategies, metrics, and benchmarks exist to mitigate it. We find that LLMs often amplify traditional forms of technical debt, particularly code, design, and documentation debts, while also introducing new LLM-specific debts. Notably, we identify fast-integration debt, where rapidly generated code prioritizes speed over quality, triggering a domino effect that leads to governance debt and increased long-term maintenance costs. Additional emerging categories include prompt, ethical, data, and provenance debt, reflecting new challenges unique to LLM adoption. To address these, strategies suggested in the literature include human-in-the-loop frameworks, prompt engineering, and data quality alignment. In practice, tools such as SonarQube are commonly used to detect technical debt indicators, while research prototypes such as CodeSmellEval are emerging to assess how LLMs contribute to debts. However, no standardized benchmarks or LLM-specific metrics yet exist, leaving an important gap. Based on findings, we outline insights and future directions to ensure reliable integration of LLMs into software engineering workflows.

</details>


### [606] [Knowledge-Based Zero-Replay Debugging of Multi-Agent LLM Traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14805)
*Dong Ho Kang,Hyeonjeong Cha,Daein Weon*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出BranchPoint-Latent，一种无需重放即可预测多智能体LLM系统中关键因果事件的轻量级方法，通过构建事件知识图谱和校准预测器，将trace定位性能从0.73提升至0.93（Branch Recall@5），且零重放成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的可靠运行依赖于调试长执行轨迹，但只有少数事件是因果决定性的。现有反事实重放方法成本随候选事件数线性增长，无法大规模应用。

Method: 将trace调试建模为基于知识的决策支持问题：将每条trace编译为结构化事件知识图谱（包含路由、记忆、工具使用、不确定性、潜在证据），训练一个经过校准的排序预测器（gradient-boosted），在零重放成本下预测oracle会标记为高影响的事件。

Result: 在37个trace家族上校准，per-trace定位指标Branch Recall@5从0.73提升至0.93（held-out families），零oracle重放成本。

Conclusion: 该方法不声称普适最优，而是刻画了何时简单图中心性足够、何时需要学习到的证据。最终提供了一个可审计、成本高效的AI可靠性调试决策支持系统，处于成本-精度前沿。

Abstract: Reliable operation of multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems depends on debugging long execution traces, where the few causally decisive events are buried in unstructured logs of messages, routes, memory writes, and tool calls. The standard tool is counterfactual replay (rewind, edit, and re-run the trajectory to measure each event's effect), but its cost grows linearly with the number of candidate events, making exhaustive replay infeasible at scale. We frame trace debugging as a knowledge-based decision-support problem. Each trace is compiled into a structured event knowledge graph over routing, memory, tool-use, uncertainty, and latent evidence, and a calibrated predictor decides where a scarce replay budget should be spent. We do not propose a new replay oracle; we propose a method to predict its results without paying the replay cost. We formulate zero-replay counterfactual-effect prediction: given a trace under a fixed budget, predict which events the oracle would mark high-effect before any replay is performed. BranchPoint-Latent is a lightweight predictor over observable, structural, uncertainty, and latent features of the knowledge graph. Calibrated against a deterministic replay oracle across 37 trace families, a single learning-to-rank gradient-boosted predictor raises per-trace localization (Branch Recall@5) from 0.73 to 0.93 on held-out families at zero oracle-replay cost. Rather than claiming universal dominance, we characterize when cheap graph centrality suffices and when learned evidence is necessary. The result is an auditable, cost-efficient decision-support system for AI-reliability debugging, positioned explicitly on the cost-accuracy frontier with reproducible artifacts.

</details>


### [607] [Pandas for Reproducible Data Analysis: From Spreadsheets to Research-Grade Python Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14924)
*Sidney Shapiro,Daniel Pearson,Emiliano Sebastian Gonzalez Venegas*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文主张将Python pandas库作为Excel表格与可重复、可审计研究工作流程之间的实用桥梁，提供了迁移映射、九类工作流分类、七个端到端案例、故障模式目录和可复用代码配方，适用于需要可重复性、验证和版本控制的表格分析场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子表格密集型分析工作在企业中仍然普遍，但通过公式、手动编辑和复制粘贴更新的工作簿难以审计、复现和规模化治理，亟需一种能保留表格概念但使假设显式化的转换层。

Method: 将pandas作为Excel与研究工作流之间的实用桥梁，而非完全替代品；贡献包括Excel到pandas的迁移映射、九类工作流分类、七个端到端案例、故障模式目录和可复用代码配方。

Result: 提供了pandas在可重复、可审计、可辩护的表格分析中的系统化应用指南，同时保留Excel作为利益相关者熟悉的输入输出界面。

Conclusion: pandas在需要可重复性、可审计性和可辩护性的表格分析中最为有效，而Excel可继续作为利益相关者熟悉的前后端界面，两者互补而非替代。

Abstract: Spreadsheet-heavy analytical work remains common in business analytics, operations reporting, and applied research, yet workbooks that grow through formulas, manual edits, and copy-paste refresh are difficult to audit, reproduce, and govern at scale. When tabular work requires repeatability, validation, version control, automated refresh, or integration with statistics and machine learning, analysts need a transformation layer that preserves familiar table concepts while making assumptions explicit. This paper treats the Python pandas library as that layer: a practical bridge between spreadsheet practice and research-grade workflows, not a wholesale replacement for Excel. The paper contributes an Excel-to-pandas migration mapping, a taxonomy of nine workflow categories, seven end-to-end examples drawn from business analytics and applied research, a failure-mode catalog, and reusable code recipes for governed tabular work. pandas is most useful when tabular analysis must be repeatable, auditable, and defensible, while Excel can remain a familiar input and output interface for stakeholders who need workbooks.

</details>


### [608] [Beyond Correctness: Enhancing Architectural Reasoning in Code LLMs via Scalable Labeling with Agentic Judgment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14948)
*Kirill Vasilevski,Ximing Dong,Benjamin Rombaut,Ruochen Deng,Jiahuei Lin,Arthur Leung,Dayi Lin,Boyuan Chen,Shaowei Wang,Ahmed E. Hassan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出利用强LLM作为可扩展代理进行架构评估的agentic评判流水线，包含两个评判器：ACJ评估任务所需架构理解复杂度，AQJ评估补丁是否符合仓库架构约定。通过微调Qwen3系列模型在SWE-bench上达到27.2%解决率，最高提升540%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件开发中架构理解至关重要，但手动标注成本过高，且仅靠测试无法验证架构质量。需要一种可扩展、自动化的架构评估方法。

Method: 构建agentic评判流水线：ACJ（架构复杂度评判器）评估任务所需架构理解深度，AQJ（架构质量评判器）通过源码驱动的rubric评估补丁架构符合度。使用强LLM作为专家评估的可扩展代理，在3,360个精选实例上微调Qwen3-8B/14B/32B。

Result: SWE-bench Verified上最高达到27.2%解决率，相比基础模型提升540%，相比未过滤微调提升256%。模型展现出强跨语言泛化能力和架构补丁质量的一致性改善。

Conclusion: 基于agentic评判流水线的筛选训练数据可以有效提升LLM的架构理解与补丁生成能力，验证了用强LLM作为架构评估代理的可行性与有效性。

Abstract: LLMs have substantially improved software engineering yet real-world development requires architectural understanding. Such understanding is prohibitively expensive to label manually and impossible to verify through tests alone. We propose an agentic judging pipeline using a strong LLM as a scalable proxy for expert architectural evaluation, comprising two judges: the Architecture Complexity Judge (ACJ), which estimates codebase-specific architectural understanding a task demands, and the Architecture Quality Judge (AQJ), which evaluates patch conformance to repository-specific architectural conventions via source-grounded rubrics. Fine-tuning Qwen3-8B/14B/32B on 3,360 curated instances achieves resolved rates of up to 27.2% on SWE-bench Verified - up to 540% over the base model and 256% over unfiltered fine-tuning. Meanwhile, the trained models achieve strong cross-language generalization and consistent improvements in architectural patch quality.

</details>


### [609] [Specifications for Humans, Agents, and Tooling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15084)
*Mark Marron*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍了 Bosque API (BAPI) 生态系统，这是一个以规范为中心的软件开发生态系统，旨在通过强大的规范语言支持完整的应用开发生命周期，包括测试生成、验证和沙盒，以应对AI代理系统带来的安全与编码挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 规范是软件开发中沟通意图、需求和约束的核心机制，但现有规范工具在表达力、可验证性和对AI代理系统支持方面存在不足，需要更强大的规范生态系统来应对新兴挑战。

Method: 提出了 BAPI 规范语言及其生态系统，支持全多语言环境，提供高表达力规范、测试生成、验证和沙盒功能，覆盖从需求到实现的完整开发生命周期。

Result: BAPI 生态系统能够支持以规范为中心的开发流程，有效应对AI代理系统带来的安全与编码挑战，涵盖API实现与使用两方面。

Conclusion: BAPI 为现代以规范为中心的软件开发提供了综合解决方案，其丰富特性对保障AI代理时代软件系统的安全性和正确性至关重要。

Abstract: Specifications are the central mechanism for communicating intents, requirements, and constraints in software development. When they are explicit, clear, and reliable, they are an effective means for collaboration and cooperation. They allow for stakeholders to specify what they want, developers (or AI agents) to understand and implement the needed functionality, for clients to effectively use the system, and for automated tooling to validate the correctness for each of these steps.
  This tool paper outlines the Bosque API (BAPI) ecosystem, a software ecosystem designed to support modern spec-centered development. The BAPI specification language works in a fully polyglot ecosystem and provides a suite of features, including unparalleled expressivity, test generation, validation, and sand-boxing to support the complete application development lifecycle. These are critical to supporting emerging security and coding (both API implementation & usage) challenges presented by agentic AI systems.

</details>


### [610] [The Hitchhiker's Guide to Program Analysis, Part III: Mostly Harmless LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15122)
*Haonan Li,Tianyang Zhou,Manu Sridharan,Hang Zhang,Zhiyun Qian*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Evident是一个将LLM辅助与程序行为推理分离的缺陷分析系统，LLM仅用于构建分析工具，后端进行形式化验证。在200个真实Android内核驱动告警上，正确分类151例（76%），未误放任何已确认缺陷，并重新发现了一个被人工和LLM方法遗漏的漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在缺陷分析中展现经验有效性，但其生成的推理不足以作为形式化依据，尤其是对于"无缺陷"决策（即判断告警为误报）需要严格证明错误状态不可达，而非仅提供合理解释。因此需要将程序行为推理建立在形式化分析而非LLM直接推理之上。

Method: Evident将LLM辅助与程序行为推理分离：LLM仅用于根据告警信息（位置和数据流）构建告警专用的分析工具（harness），随后验证工具的有效性，再由后端分析工具执行"基于工具的不可达性检查"，判断错误状态在工具及其假设下是否不可达。

Result: 在200个真实Android内核驱动告警上，Evident正确分类151例（76%），其中排除111个误报，且未误放任何已确认的真实缺陷。剩余案例未解决或保守保留为潜在缺陷。Evident还重新发现了一个被先前LLM过滤方法和人工审查均遗漏的已确认漏洞。

Conclusion: 将LLM定位为辅助构建分析工具的角色，而非直接进行程序行为推理，能够在保证安全性（不放走真实缺陷）的同时有效过滤误报，并具备发现被遗漏漏洞的能力。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly used in bug analysis to reason about code and judge whether a potential bug can be triggered in realistic execution contexts, with recent work showing promising empirical results. However, empirical effectiveness does not make a plausible model-generated rationale sufficient for discharging warnings. This distinction is especially important for no-bug decisions: dismissing a report or warning requires establishing that the reported error state is unreachable in the program context being analyzed, not merely offering a plausible explanation for why it may not occur. We argue that program-behavior reasoning should be grounded in formal analysis, rather than performed directly by LLMs.
  We present Evident, a bug analysis system that separates LLM assistance from program-behavior reasoning, delegating the latter to backend analysis. Given a warning specifying the reported location and data flow, Evident uses an LLM only to construct a warning-specific analysis harness. Evident then validates the harness before invoking the backend. The backend performs the harness-relative check: whether the reported error state is unreachable under the constructed harness and its assumptions. We evaluate Evident on 200 real Android kernel driver warnings from two existing static detectors. Evident correctly classifies 151 cases (76%), including discharging 111 false alarms, without discharging any confirmed bug in the dataset; the remaining cases are either unresolved or conservatively retained as potential bugs. Evident also rediscovers a confirmed vulnerability overlooked by both prior LLM-based filtering and manual triage.

</details>


### [611] [AI-driven Software Development: A Pragmatic Path to Agentic Development Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15283)
*Peter Mandl,Paul Mandl*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个从辅助式AI到自主式AI的软件开发转型框架，强调技术、组织与质量保障机制，并通过中型软件公司的案例研究验证其可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI已从局部工具支持扩展到软件开发生命周期的各个环节，但现有研究显示其效能取决于任务类型、代码库特征和开发者经验，且AI生成制品需要额外控制与治理。目前缺乏一个系统性的框架来指导组织如何逐步将AI嵌入软件工程核心活动。

Method: 基于当前研究、实践导向资料、成熟软件工程实践和项目经验，构建了一个从非正式辅助式AI到集成式AI工作流再到受控自主式开发过程的渐进式框架。重点不是单个工具或模型，而是连接项目上下文、工具访问、验证、权限、日志记录和人工审批的"缰绳"（harness）。并以一家中型软件公司作为探索性案例研究评估框架的合理性。

Result: 提出了一个三维度渐进框架：非正式辅助式AI → 集成式AI工作流 → 受控自主式开发过程。识别了嵌入AI所需的技术、组织和质量保障机制。案例研究表明框架在具体组织情境下具有合理性，并展示了前提条件、治理需求、设计实践和转型路径如何具体塑造。

Conclusion: 该框架为AI驱动软件开发的进一步学术讨论和实证研究提供了概念基础，强调了从工具层面到组织流程层面的系统性转型的必要性。

Abstract: Generative AI is transforming software development from localized tool support into development work that is embedded in processes, tools, and organizational structures. Its use now extends beyond code completion to requirements, architecture, implementation, testing, review, operations, and maintenance. Existing research shows a differentiated picture. Productivity gains are possible, but depend on task type, codebase characteristics, and developers' experience. At the same time, AI-generated artifacts require additional control and governance.
  Building on these observations, this paper develops a pragmatic organizing framework for the transition toward AI-driven Software Development. It describes a progression from informal and assistive AI use through integrated AI workflows toward controlled agentic development processes. The focus is not on individual tools or models, but on the technical, organizational, and quality-assurance mechanisms needed to embed AI across central software engineering activities. Particular importance is assigned to a harness that connects project context, tool access, verification, permissions, logging, and human approval.
  The paper draws on current research, practice-oriented sources, established software engineering practices, and project experience. A mid-sized software company is used as an exploratory case study to assess the plausibility of the framework and to illustrate how prerequisites, governance requirements, design practices, and transformation paths can be shaped in a concrete organizational context. The paper provides a conceptual basis for further scholarly discussion and empirical investigation of AI-driven Software Development.

</details>


### [612] [A Scalability Analysis of Quantitative Confidence Assessment Methods for Assurance Cases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15480)
*Simon Diemert,Jens H. Weber*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个模型，用于评估在保证案例中应用定量置信度评估方法所需的决策复杂度和工作量，并基于三个现有方法（BBN、DST、Certus）进行参数化分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明，应用定量置信度评估方法所需的额外工作量是阻碍实践者采用这些方法的主要障碍。因此，需要一种能够估计这些方法决策复杂度和工作量的模型。

Method: 提出一个考虑最坏情况和平均情况的决策复杂度与工作量评估模型，基于已发表案例研究数据进行参数化，并应用于BBN、DST和Certus三种方法。

Result: Certus在最坏情况下的决策复杂度最高，但其平均情况下的工作量低于BBN和DST方法。

Conclusion: 该模型可以帮助研究人员估计其方法的实际应用成本，从而降低定量置信度评估方法的采用障碍。

Abstract: This paper proposes a model to estimate the decision complexity and effort required to apply quantitative confidence assessment methods to assurance cases. The model considers both the worst and average case for these measures and characterizes how these quantities scale with argument size. Prior work has indicated that the additional effort required to apply these methods is a barrier to their adoption by assurance case practitioners. Researchers developing new methods, or improving existing methods, can use this model to estimate the effort required to apply their method. The proposed model is parameterized using data from published case studies and is applied to three existing quantitative confidence assessment methods: the Bayesian Belief Network method, the Dempster-Shafer Theory method, and the Certus method. The results show that, while Certus has the highest worst-case decision complexity, its average-case effort is lower than the BBN and DST methods.

</details>


### [613] [SDVDiag: Multimodal Causal Discovery for Online Diagnosis in Software-defined Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15559)
*Matthias Weiß,Athreya Hosahalli Prakash,Falk Dettinger,Nasser Jazdi,Michael Weyrich*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SDVDiag，一个面向软件定义车辆的多模态因果诊断流水线，融合日志与指标数据构建因果图，并采用异常驱动触发器实现持续在线诊断。实验表明其因果图更稀疏、诊断精度优于单模态基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果根因分析方法仅基于单一可观测性模态（日志或指标），且多为离线、人工操作模式，无法满足软件定义车辆中服务依赖复杂、故障传播多跳的持续在线诊断需求。

Method: 提出SDVDiag多模态因果发现流水线：(1) 将日志和指标服务表示融合到共享嵌入空间；(2) 在嵌入空间上构建因果图；(3) 引入异常驱动触发器，将诊断平台从离线批量工具转变为持续在线系统。

Result: 在自动代客泊车测试平台上：多模态因果图平均134条边（vs. 单模态基线182条）；经60轮人工反馈后，边缘加权奖励比基线提升2.4倍；端到端故障注入实验正确恢复出距可观察症状两跳因果距离的真实根因。

Conclusion: SDVDiag通过多模态融合和在线触发机制，有效提升了软件定义车辆中因果根因诊断的准确性和实时性，为复杂分布式系统的持续可观测性提供了新思路。

Abstract: The transition toward software-defined vehicles concentrates an increasing share of vehicle functionality into distributed software services, where failures propagate through service dependencies and the surface symptom is often several causal hops away from the underlying defect. Existing approaches to causal root-cause analysis in such systems address this only partially: they typically reason over a single observability modality and operate in an offline, operator-driven mode that does not match the demands of continuous vehicle operation. This paper presents SDVDiag, a multimodal causal-discovery pipeline that fuses log-based and metric-based service representations into a shared embedding space before graph construction, coupled with an anomaly-driven trigger that converts the diagnostic platform from a manually operated batch tool into a continuously running online system. Evaluation on an Autonomous Valet Parking testbed shows that the multimodal pipeline produces sparser causal graphs than a metrics-only baseline (134 vs. 182 edges on average) and consistently outperforms it in edge-weighted reward against an expert knowledge graph at every stage of human-feedback refinement, showing a 2.4-fold improvement over the baseline after 60 feedback queries. An end-to-end fault-injection scenario further demonstrates that the integrated trigger correctly recovers a true root cause located two causal hops upstream of the observable symptom.

</details>


### [614] [Minimal Comparison of Octagonal Abstract Domains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15582)
*Kenny Ballou,Elena Sherman*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对Octagons抽象域的虚假约束消除算法，并通过最小化比较发现，Octagons的精度优势在消除虚假约束后显著降低，许多不变量与低精度域等价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在数值抽象域中，更富有表现力的域（如Octagons）能比Interval产生更精确的不变量，但存在虚假约束问题。已有工作解决了Zones域的虚假约束消除，但Octagons域尚未解决。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提出一种针对Octagons抽象域的虚假约束消除算法，然后通过最小化比较方法，对来自不同抽象域的6,930个不变量进行精度对比分析。

Result: 该算法有效消除了Octagons中的虚假约束；最小化比较将许多不变量重新分类为等价，从而降低了Octagons表达力对不变量的精度优势。

Conclusion: 引入的算法能够消除Octagons中的虚假约束，且通过最小化比较发现，Octagons相对于低精度域的实际精度优势被高估了。

Abstract: Numerical abstract domains vary in their expressiveness; more expressive domains like Zones yield more precise invariants than Intervals. A comprehensive approach to selecting abstract domains is a minimal comparison of abstract states. However, to be effective, it requires abstract states to be free of spurious constraints. While previous work developed spurious constraint elimination for Zones, this work introduces a novel algorithm for eliminating such constraints for Octagons.
  We evaluate our approach by comparing the precision of 6,930 invariants from different abstract domains. Our results show that the minimal comparison reclassifies many invariants as equivalent, thus reducing the impact of Octagons' expressiveness on invariant precision.

</details>


### [615] [Teaching testing seriously in academia](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15677)
*Tanja E. J. Vos,Bart Th. Knaack,Beatriz Marín,Niels Doorn,Nikè van Vugt-Hage*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文批判当前软件测试教育过度依赖理性主义范式，主张应转向经验驱动、探究式教学，并提出P4TEST框架（基于4C/ID模型）以培养学生在不确定性下的批判性推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有测试教育与实际专业实践脱节，课程偏重规定性方法和预期结果确认，限制了学生在不确定性情境下的批判性推理能力。

Method: 基于四组件教学设计（4C/ID）模型，提出P4TEST教学框架，明确测试中的核心能力、认知操作和思维习惯，避免规定性流程。

Result: 提出了P4TEST框架，能够指导课程设计、教学支架搭建和评估方式的改革。

Conclusion: 测试应被视为一项经验驱动的、探究性的专业技能，P4TEST为软件测试教育提供了一种更符合实践本质的教学路径。

Abstract: As systems grow more complex and incorporate AI, testing becomes more critical. Yet testing education in academia remains misaligned with both professional practice and the empirical nature of testing. Current curricula predominantly adopt a rationalist paradigm, emphasizing prescriptive methods and confirmation of expected outcomes. This limits students' ability to reason critically under uncertainty.
  In this position paper, we argue that testing should instead be taught as an empirical, inquiry-driven professional skill. We propose an instructional design based on the Four-Component Instructional Design (4C/ID) model to support whole-task learning.
  We introduce P4TEST, a pedagogical framework that makes explicit the core competencies, epistemic moves, and habits of mind involved in testing, while avoiding prescriptive processes. The paper outlines how P4TEST can guide curriculum design, scaffolding, and assessment in software testing education.

</details>


### [616] [Applications of Causality in Software Testing: A Rapid Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15683)
*Tiancheng Ma,Nasir U. Eisty*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过系统分析27篇将因果推理应用于软件测试的研究，发现现有工作集中在因果识别和效应估计阶段，而因果表征和结构发现技术尚未充分探索。研究还指出了模型误设、假设未经检验等跨层挑战，并提出了未来的研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 因果推理为理解干预如何影响软件行为提供了原则性框架，但其在软件测试中的应用分散在不同任务和研究社区中，缺乏系统性整合。本文旨在通过系统分析已有研究，揭示该领域的研究现状并推动统一发展。

Method: 采用快速综述方法，系统分析27篇将因果推理应用于软件测试（如调试、公平性评估、性能评估）的研究。使用分层因果推理管线（包括因果表征、结构发现、识别和效应估计）对文献进行组织与分析。

Result: 研究发现：1）现有研究集中在因果识别和效应估计阶段；2）因果表征和结构发现在测试上下文中探索不足；3）存在模型误设、假设未经检验、实证评估有限等跨层挑战。

Conclusion: 基于分析结果，提出研究议程，强调因果方法在软件测试中未被充分发掘的机会。此结构化视角旨在统一分散的贡献，并指导因果与软件测试交叉领域的未来实证与方法论研究。

Abstract: Causal inference offers a principled framework for understanding how interventions influence software behavior, yet its adoption in software testing remains fragmented across different tasks and research communities. In this rapid review, we systematically analyze 27 studies that apply causal reasoning to software testing activities such as debugging, fairness assessment, and performance evaluation. We organize the literature using a layered causal inference pipeline, spanning causal representation, structure discovery, identification, and effect estimation, to reveal how existing work maps onto fundamental causal reasoning stages. Our analysis shows a concentration of research on identification and estimation, while representation and discovery techniques are underexplored in testing contexts. We also identify cross-layer challenges, including model misspecification, untested assumptions, and limited empirical evaluation, which hinder practical application. Based on these insights, we propose a research agenda that highlights underrepresented opportunities for advancing causal methods in software testing. This structured perspective aims to unify disparate contributions and guide future empirical and methodological work in the intersection of causality and software testing.

</details>


### [617] [Bigger Isn't Always Better: A Comparative Evaluation of LLMs for Automated Code Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15689)
*Shivam Pankaj Kumar,Swati Bararia,Kislay Raj*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 系统评估五个大模型在代码审查中的表现，发现小模型Claude Haiku 4.5优于大模型Claude Sonnet 4.6，合成评估严重高估真实能力，diff大小是主要影响因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同规模、不同成本的LLM在自动化代码审查任务上的实际表现差异，验证小模型是否可能以更低成本获得更优效果。

Method: 在150个代码审查样本（100个合成突变注入bug + 50个真实bug修复PR）上，对5个LLM（Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-5.4 mini, Minimax M2.7, GLM-5 Turbo）进行系统评估，并引入第三方基准验证。

Result: Claude Haiku 4.5在F1（0.365 vs 0.343）、召回率（高18%）和定性评分上均超过Claude Sonnet 4.6，成本低3.2倍；合成评估F1=0.847 vs 真实PR F1=0.066（下降92%）；diff<10行时F1=0.657，>150行时F1=0.043；所有模型对性能bug召回率接近0。

Conclusion: 小模型可以凭借更低成本取得更优代码审查效果；合成评估高估模型能力，真实场景下模型表现大幅下降；diff大小是关键瓶颈；当前模型在性能bug检测上几乎无效。

Abstract: We present a systematic evaluation of five large language models on automated code review, comparing Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-5.4 mini, Minimax M2.7, and GLM-5 Turbo across 150 code review samples - 100 synthetic mutation-injected bugs and 50 real bug-fix pull requests mined from eight major open-source repositories. Our principal finding is that Claude Haiku 4.5, a smaller and cheaper model, consistently outperforms the larger Claude Sonnet 4.6, achieving higher F1 (0.365 vs. 0.343), 18% higher recall, and superior qualitative review scores across all four evaluation dimensions, at 3.2x lower cost per review. This result holds across three independent experimental conditions (n=25, n=100, n=150) and is independently confirmed on the Martian Code Review Benchmark, a third-party evaluation with different repos, golden comments, and judge. We further report three secondary findings: (1) synthetic-only evaluation dramatically overestimates model capability - on real PRs alone, the best model achieves F1 = 0.066, compared to F1 = 0.847 on synthetic samples, a 92% degradation; (2) diff size is the dominant predictor of review quality, with F1 dropping from 0.657 on diffs under 10 lines to 0.043 on diffs over 150 lines; and (3) all models exhibit near-zero recall on performance-related bugs. We release our evaluation framework and dataset for reproducibility.

</details>


### [618] [Imperfect Visual Verification for Code Edition : A Case Study on TikZ](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15693)
*Charly Reux,Mathieu Acher,Djamel Eddine Khelladi,Clément Quinton,Olivier Barais*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究在TikZ视觉代码定制任务中，即使验证器不可靠，迭代精炼方法仍能有效提升代码生成质量，尤其对弱模型帮助更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码生成方法在涉及视觉输出的任务（如TikZ）中面临挑战，尤其是视觉代码定制需要局部、语义保持的编辑，而自动化验证器难以构建，因此需要探索在验证器不可靠的情况下迭代精炼是否仍然有效。

Method: 以TikZ为案例，将视觉代码定制定义为带有不完美oracle的迭代编辑问题；构建分析框架；大规模评估多种LLM和工具增强的视觉验证器在迭代精炼流水线中的表现；对精炼轨迹进行人工标注以分析验证器行为和反馈质量。

Result: 不完美验证器能以中等准确率（F1最高0.815）判断指令是否被应用；反馈对弱模型提升显著（+11~20次成功定制），强模型提升较少（+5）但受益于准确验证避免过早接受；有效反馈需精确定位问题、提供可操作指导、覆盖所有相关问题且忠于原始指令。

Conclusion: 即使在验证器不可靠的情况下，迭代精炼在视觉代码定制中仍然有效，但反馈质量是关键；不完美验证器可作为一种实用方案。

Abstract: LLMs have significantly advanced code generation, enabling the synthesis of functional programs. While recent systems achieve strong performance on many coding benchmarks, tasks involving programs such as TikZ that generate visual artifacts remain challenging, in particular on visual code customization. Unlike generation from scratch, customization requires localized, semantics-preserving edits: the model must locate relevant code, modify it according to the instruction, and preserve the remaining structure and rendering. Approaches based on post-hoc iterative refinement/correction where a verifier provides feedback to guide corrections, have shown promise. However, in the case of programs with a visual outcome such as in TikZ, where correctness is harder or likely impossible to formalize and evaluate automatically, deterministic verifiers do not exist. Hence, developers can only rely on imperfect verifiers. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study to answer:to what extent can iterative refinement remain effective when the verifier itself is unreliable?} We use TikZ as a focused case study that isolates the core difficulties of the problem (weak code structure, fine-grained visual semantics, and difficult feature localization) in a controlled and challenging setting. We define visual code customization as an iterative editing problem with an imperfect oracle, and introduce a framework for analyzing such iterative refinements. We conduct a large-scale study and evaluate multiple LLM-based and tool-augmented visual verifiers within iterative refinement pipelines, and perform extensive manual annotation of refinement trajectories to assess verifier behavior and feedback quality. Our findings show that even imperfect verifiers can determine with moderate accuracy whether visual instructions are applied to code, achieving F1-scores up to 0.815. Feedback improves iterative refinement, especially for weaker models, adding 11--20 perfect customizations for Qwen3-vl-30b-a3b-Instruct, while stronger models like Gemini-3 gain fewer improvements (+5) but benefit more from accurate verification that prevents premature acceptance. Feedback is effective only when it precisely identifies image issues, provides actionable guidance, addresses all relevant problems, and remains grounded in the original instruction.

</details>


### [619] [Configuration Smells in AGENTS.md Files: Common Mistakes in Configuring Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15828)
*Helio Victor F. dos Santos,Vitor Costa,Joao Eduardo Montandon,Luciana Lourdes Silva,Marco Tulio Valente*

Main category: cs.SE
