TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了编码智能体配置文件（如AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md）中的六类异味问题，发现Lint Leakage（62%）、Context Bloat（42%）和Skill Leakage（35%）最为常见，并提出了自动化检测方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管编码智能体配置文件（AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md）被广泛用于指导智能体行为，但关于这些文件定义和维护中的常见问题几乎没有系统性研究，缺乏对配置异味的认知和检测手段。

Method: 首先通过灰色文献综述和仓库挖掘分析识别出六类配置异味，然后提出自动化启发式检测方法，最后对100个流行的开源仓库中的配置文件进行实证分析。

Result: Lint Leakage是最常见的异味（62%），其次是Context Bloat（42%）和Skill Leakage（35%）；多个异味经常共同出现，特别是Context Bloat、Skill Leakage和Conflicting Instructions三者之间。

Conclusion: 编码智能体配置文件中的异味问题普遍存在，且存在协同共现现象，亟需工具支持来帮助开发者维护高质量的配置文件。

Abstract: Coding agents are increasingly used to automate software engineering tasks. To guide their behavior, these agents commonly rely on configuration files, typically named AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md, which provide instructions about architecture, workflows, coding conventions, and testing practices. Despite their growing importance, little is known about common problems affecting the definition and maintenance of these files. In this paper, we present the first catalog of smells for coding-agent configuration files. To identify such smells, we first conducted a grey literature review and a repository mining analysis. As a result, we identified six configuration smells and proposed automated heuristics to detect them. To evaluate the prevalence of the proposed smells, we analyzed 100 popular open-source repositories containing either an AGENTS.md or a CLAUDE.md file. Our results show that configuration smells are widespread. Lint Leakage was the most common smell, affecting 62% of the files, followed by Context Bloat (42%) and Skill Leakage (35%). We further show that several smells frequently co-occur, particularly Context Bloat, Skill Leakage, and Conflicting Instructions.

</details>


### [620] [Graphical-Probabilistic Modeling of Generative Flows in LLM-Native Software Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15943)
*Víctor A. Braberman,Flavia Bonomo-Braberman*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出“生成网络”（Generation Networks）框架，旨在为LLM原生软件开发提供基于图形概率模型的形式化设计推理方法，以弥补当前依赖实验和启发式技术缺乏结构化支持的不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM原生软件开发缺乏类似传统软件工程中模块化与抽象的严谨结构，无法支持设计层面的推理与分析，亟需一种能够刻画LLM随机性、提示依赖行为的形式化方法。

Method: 提出基于图形概率模型的“生成网络”框架，专门针对LLM原生系统中的涌现现象和随机行为进行建模，用于文档化生成流程并描述LLM软件设计的性质。

Result: 论文目前处于初步框架提出阶段，尚未给出具体的实验验证或定量结果，但为LLM原生软件工程的形式化推理提供了潜在理论基础。

Conclusion: Generation Networks有望为LLM为中心的软件架构中生成交互与系统级属性的原则性推理奠定基础，推动LLM原生开发向更严谨的工程范式演进。

Abstract: Engineering LLM-native software remains a challenging and immature field. Current practice is largely exploratory, relying on experimentation and heuristic techniques such as prompting and context engineering. These, however, are low-level and lack the principled structure needed to support design-level reasoning or analysis. In contrast, traditional software engineering leverages modularity and abstraction to communicate and analyze system behavior. To bring similar rigor to LLM-native development, we propose methods for documenting generative flows and for stating properties of LLM-based software designs. Such methods must account for the stochastic, prompt-dependent behavior of large language models while remaining expressive enough to capture emergent phenomena. Our initial approach is based on graphical probabilistic models, tailored to capture phenomena characteristic of LLM-native systems. This framework -- what we term Generation Networks -- aims to provide a foundation for principled reasoning about generative interactions and system-level properties in LLM-centric software architectures.

</details>


### [621] [Green SARC: Predictive Cost and Carbon Governance for Agentic AI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15954)
*Gaston Besanson*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了Green SARC框架，将SARC治理架构应用于FinOps和GreenOps，通过四个执行站点在代理循环中强制约束，实现了对AI系统金融和环境影响的可预测控制。实验表明该方法在成本/碳排放节省47-55%，且策略无关的架构性门控机制在预算约束下零违规。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI代理系统的金融和环境成本控制仍停留在事后监控层面（dashboard评估），缺乏执行过程中可预测、可实施的架构级约束机制。

Method: 将SARC治理架构（代理循环中四个强制执行站点）应用于FinOps和GreenOps，提出"要强制什么"以及"如何预测"的理论。核心包括：(i) 状态雪球复杂度分析；(ii) Normal-σ门控与分位校准；(iii) 软Lagrangian惩罚与架构门控对比；(iv) 预算约束下的门控零违规机制。

Result: (i) 状态雪球复杂度Θ(n²)，在3000个真实计划上100%验证，中位曲率216超过线性预测134；(ii) Normal-σ门控覆盖率92%（名义95%），分位校准达95.2%；(iii) 软Lagrangian惩罚在91.5%种子上超预算，架构门控0%违规；(iv) 预算约束下门控在合成和真实数据上零违规。端到端token/USD/碳排放节省47-55%。

Conclusion: Green SARC通过架构级门控机制实现了对AI代理系统金融和环境成本的可预测控制，在保持策略灵活性的同时确保约束零违规，开源库提供完整可复现实验。

Abstract: Agentic AI systems act through tools and sub-agents, yet the controls meant to bound their financial and environmental cost still sit on dashboards evaluated beside or after execution. Green SARC applies the SARC governance-by-architecture framework -- four enforcement sites in the agent loop -- to FinOps and GreenOps, contributing the theory of what to enforce and how to predict it. We report four policy-independent results. (i) The unconstrained "State Snowball" is $Θ(n^2)$ in loop depth; on 3,000 real multi-step plans (SWE-rebench) it holds on 100%, with median curvature $\hat{c}_2=216$ exceeding the linear-accretion prediction $p/2=134$ -- real plans accrete faster than the model. (ii) On real residuals the Normal-$σ$ gate under-covers (92% at nominal 95%); split-conformal calibration holds (95.2%). (iii) A soft Lagrangian penalty tuned to the budget in expectation breaches it on 91.5% of seeds; the architectural gate breaches 0%. (iv) Under binding budgets the gate's over-budget incidence is 0% on synthetic and real (BurstGPT) arrivals. End-to-end token/USD/carbon savings (47--55%) are real but policy-dependent in magnitude -- set by a scope-cap knob, not by gate rejections. The library is open-source, dependency-free, and ships a regeneration script for every cited number.

</details>


### [622] [Open-SWE-Traces: Advancing Dual-Mode Multilingual Distillation for Software Engineering Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16038)
*Wasi Uddin Ahmad,Nikolai Ludwig,Somshubra Majumdar,Boris Ginsburg*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了Open-SWE-Traces，一个包含207,489条智能体轨迹的大规模数据集，覆盖9种编程语言，来自20,000个真实PR。通过混合推理合成方法生成数据，并微调Qwen3-30B-A3B系列模型，在SWE-bench上取得了优异表现（Verified 61.7%，Multilingual 57.1%，Pro 36.8%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主软件工程的发展受限于多样化、大规模轨迹数据的严重不足，亟需高质量的数据集来训练具备长程推理能力的智能体模型。

Method: 从SWE-rebench-V2中筛选20,000个真实PR（基于MIT、Apache、BSD许可），利用OpenHands和SWE-agent工具，结合混合推理合成方法：Minimax-M2.5生成带有显式"思考"过程的轨迹，Qwen3.5-122B生成高质量"非思考"轨迹，最终构建207,489条覆盖9种语言的数据集。基于此数据微调Qwen3-30B-A3B系列模型（Thinking、Instruct、Coder）。

Result: 微调后的最佳模型在SWE-bench Verified上达到61.7%，SWE-bench Multilingual上达到57.1%，SWE-bench Pro上达到36.8%的解决率。

Conclusion: Open-SWE-Traces是一个高质量、开源的数据资源，能够有效将人类级别的软件工程能力蒸馏到高效的开放智能体LLM中。

Abstract: The path toward autonomous software engineering is currently bottlenecked by a severe deficit of diverse, large-scale trajectory data. We address this by introducing \ourdataset, an expansive dataset of 207,489 agentic trajectories spanning nine programming languages (Python, Go, TS, JS, Rust, Java, PHP, C, C++). Sourced from 20,000 real-world PRs via OpenHands and SWE-agent harnesses, the dataset utilizes a hybrid-reasoning synthesis: Minimax-M2.5 generates trajectories with explicit "thinking" processes, while Qwen3.5-122B provides high-quality "non-thinking" traces. Filtered for permissive licenses (MIT, Apache, BSD) from SWE-rebench-V2, this data facilitates the training of models capable of long-horizon reasoning. We validate the dataset by fine-tuning the Qwen3-30B-A3B series (Thinking, Instruct, and Coder). The best performing model achieves resolve rates of 61.7% on SWE-bench Verified, 57.1% on SWE-bench Multilingual, and 36.8% on SWE-bench Pro. These results establish Open-SWE-Traces as a premier resource for distilling human-level software engineering capabilities into efficient, open-source agentic LLMs.

</details>


### [623] [Binary Decompilation LLM with Feedback-Driven Multi-Turn Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16162)
*Peipei Liu,Jian Sun,Mingzhe Xing,Yicheng Zeng,Zhaoteng Yan,Lixiao Zhang,Li Chen,Dan Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AutoDecompiler，一种基于强化学习的多轮二进制反编译方法，通过编译、执行和I/O测试反馈迭代优化生成代码，显著提升了行为可重执行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的反编译方法多为单轮生成范式，生成的代码虽可读甚至可编译，但行为上与原始二进制存在偏差，误导下游分析。因此需要一种能利用程序反馈进行迭代优化的反编译方法。

Method: 将反编译建模为迭代优化过程，设计反编译专用奖励（代码有效性、可重编译性、执行一致性、语义保真度），构建阶段感知的诊断反馈，引入进度感知轨迹奖励和轮次感知优势重加权，训练基于强化学习的LLM。

Result: 在多种输入设置、模型规模和基准上，AutoDecompiler在相同模型大小和输入设置下一致优于单轮对应版本，在行为可重执行性上取得显著提升。

Conclusion: 利用强化学习学习利用程序反馈是提升LLM二进制反编译功能正确性的有效方向。

Abstract: Binary decompilation is fundamental to security tasks such as vulnerability discovery, malware inspection, and executable-only program understanding. Recent LLM-based decompilation methods have shown promising results, but most still follow a single-turn generation paradigm: given assembly code or decompiler-produced pseudo-code, the model generates one output and stops. Consequently, the generated code may appear readable or even compile successfully, yet still deviate from the behavior of the original binary and mislead downstream analysis.
  This paper presents AutoDecompiler, a decompilation-specialized LLM trained with reinforcement learning for feedback-driven multi-turn binary decompilation. Instead of treating decompilation as one-shot code generation, AutoDecompiler formulates it as an iterative refinement process, where the model revises generated code based on compilation, execution, and input/output testing feedback. To enable this process, we design decompilation-specific rewards that capture code validity, recompilability, execution consistency, and semantic fidelity. We further construct stage-aware diagnostic feedback from compiler errors, execution failures, and failed test cases, and introduce progress-aware trajectory rewarding and turn-aware advantage reweighting to encourage beneficial revisions while suppressing regressions.
  We train the AutoDecompiler family and evaluate it across different input settings, model scales, and benchmarks. Experimental results show that AutoDecompiler consistently outperforms its single-turn counterparts under the same model size and input setting, achieving clear improvements in behavioral re-executability. These results demonstrate that learning to exploit program feedback with reinforcement learning is an effective direction for improving the functional correctness of LLM-based binary decompilation.

</details>


### [624] [Q-READY: Predictive Feasibility Assessment for Hybrid Quantum-Classical Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16201)
*Tao Yue,Man Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出Q-READY，一种基于模型驱动工程（MDE）和模型驱动系统工程（MBSE）的系统方法，用于在混合量子-经典应用开发前评估其可行性，并通过信用投资组合资本评估案例展示了该方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前混合量子-经典应用的工程实践高度临时化，缺乏系统化的方法论，且受限于量子比特稀缺、噪声和连接性有限等硬件约束。在投入高昂成本实现之前，缺乏评估方案可行性的手段。

Method: 基于模型驱动系统工程（MBSE）原则，建立包含需求建模、问题形式化、工作流设计、硬件感知可行性评估的结构化流程，利用可追溯的系统级模型和后端感知抽象实现基于仿真的候选方案评估与比较。

Result: 通过信用投资组合资本评估案例，展示了需求、问题结构、策略选择、工作流行为、后端假设和可行性证据如何被链接成一个连贯的工程决策。

Conclusion: Q-READY预期产出包括混合量子应用设计的系统方法论、配套软件平台、基准数据集和经验设计指南，旨在为混合量子-经典应用的工程化提供系统化支撑。

Abstract: Quantum computing is rapidly evolving into an emerging computational infrastructure and is increasingly being used to tackle real-world problems in domains such as chemistry, materials science, logistics, and finance, as well as software engineering problems such as test optimization and project scheduling. Hybrid quantum-classical applications are particularly important because they provide a practical path for integrating quantum capabilities into existing software systems under near-term hardware constraints. However, the engineering of hybrid quantum-classical applications remains largely ad hoc and constrained by hardware limitations including qubit scarcity, noise, and limited connectivity. In this paper, we propose Q-READY to address the lack of systematic methodologies for assessing the feasibility of hybrid solutions prior to costly implementation. Positioned as a Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) approach grounded in Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles, Q-READY establishes a structured pipeline encompassing requirements modeling, problem formulation, workflow design, and hardware-aware feasibility assessment, enabling simulation-based evaluation and comparison of candidate solutions under realistic constraints through traceable system-level models and backend-aware abstractions. We illustrate the pipeline with a running credit-portfolio capital-assessment example, showing how requirements, problem structure, strategy choices, workflow behavior, backend assumptions, and feasibility evidence can be linked into a coherent engineering decision. Q-READY is envisioned as an environment that supports executable modeling, constraint evaluation, and predictive analysis. Its expected outcomes include a systematic methodology for hybrid quantum application design, a supporting software platform, benchmark datasets, and empirical design guidelines.

</details>


### [625] [UXBench: Measuring the Actionability of LLM-Generated UX Critiques](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16262)
*Wenjie Wang,Yue Huang,Zipeng Ling,Han Bao,Hang hua,Xiaonan Luo,Yu Jiang,Shiyi Du,Yuexing Hao,Xiaomin Li,Yuchen Ma,Dianzhuo Wang,Yanfang Ye,Xiangliang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: UXBench是一个用于评估LLM作为交互式UX评判者的基准，包含10个产品系列的web测试场景。通过自动化修复提升和人工验证两种方式评估8个前沿模型，发现UX评判能力尚未饱和，不同模型在报告可操作性、修复特征、可靠性和不同表面的领导力方面存在显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM越来越多地被用作UX评判者来检查界面、诊断可用性问题并提出修复建议，但目前缺乏可控的基准来衡量这些评判在不同产品表面上的可靠性和可操作性。

Method: 提出UXBench基准，包含10个产品系列的本地可运行web fixture，结合覆盖门控的浏览器探索机制，强制模型在报告前收集交互证据。每个评判模型生成7个评分维度的结构化UX报告，通过固定下游修复代理是否能基于评判改进界面来衡量报告质量。评估了8个前沿模型，使用自动化修复提升协议和盲人人工验证研究。

Result: 发现UX评判既未饱和也不是单一维度的：不同模型在报告可操作性上有显著差异，表现出不同的评分级别修复特征，在不同fixture上的可靠性各异，并在不同产品表面类别中轮流领先。

Conclusion: UXBench为评估LLM的UX评判能力提供了有效的基准，揭示了当前模型在该任务上的多样性表现和尚未饱和的发展空间。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as UX judges that inspect interfaces, diagnose usability problems, and propose repairs. Yet no controlled benchmark measures whether the resulting critiques are reliable and actionable across heterogeneous product surfaces. We introduce UXBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs as interaction-grounded UX judges. UXBench comprises local-first runnable web fixtures spanning ten product-surface families, paired with coverage-gated browser exploration that forces models to collect interaction evidence before reporting. Each judge model produces a structured UX report over seven rubric dimensions; report quality is measured by whether a fixed downstream repair agent can improve the interface based on the critique. We evaluate eight frontier models under both an automated repair-lift protocol and a blind human validation study. Results show that UX judging is neither saturated nor one dimensional: models differ meaningfully in report actionability, exhibit distinct rubric-level repair signatures, vary in fixture-level reliability, and trade leadership across surface categories

</details>


### [626] [AI Supply Chain Galaxy: 3D Visual Analytics for License Compliance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16292)
*Weiru Han,Xuetao Shi,Wenyi He,Wei Wang,Rui Zhao,Moming Duan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AI供应链星系(AISCG)——一个交互式3D可视化分析系统，用于模型溯源和合规审计。通过对Hugging Face上908,449个模型的生态级实证分析，发现55.46%的模型存在合规风险，并识别出特定的风险模式（如56.67%的适配器衍生模型许可缺失率、8.05%微调中的"许可漂移"率）。通过Llama模型家族案例研究展示了该系统如何降低合规审计的认知负荷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统合规工具和静态报告难以应对大规模、多跳依赖的模型供应链网络，亟需一种能够直观展示复杂依赖关系并辅助合规审计的新型可视化分析系统。

Method: 开发了AISCG交互式3D可视化分析系统，将模型映射到3D空间布局，集成显式结构依赖与基于规则的合规引擎，支持从全局社区检测到局部路径追踪的多尺度探索。

Result: 对Hugging Face上908,449个模型的实证分析表明：55.46%的模型存在合规风险或元数据冲突/缺失；适配器衍生模型中56.67%存在许可缺失；微调模型中8.05%存在"许可漂移"现象。

Conclusion: AISCG能够帮助分析师直观地追溯继承性限制条款并识别深层拓扑网络中的根本原因，显著降低合规审计的认知负荷。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of machine learning model reuse has transformed the AI ecosystem into a highly interconnected supply chain. Traditional compliance tools and static reports struggle to navigate these massive, multi-hop dependency networks. To address this, we present AI Supply Chain Galaxy (AISCG), an interactive 3D visual analytics system for model provenance and compliance auditing. AISCG maps models into a 3D spatial layout, integrating explicit structural dependencies with a rule-based compliance engine. It supports multi-scale exploration, from global community detection to localized, path-aware lineage tracing. We demonstrate its efficacy through an ecosystem-scale empirical analysis of 908,449 models from Hugging Face. Our findings reveal a concerning landscape: 55.46% of models exhibit compliance risks or metadata conflicts/omissions. We also identified distinct risk patterns, including a 56.67% license omission rate in adapter derivations and an 8.05% "license drift" rate in fine-tuning. Through a case study on the complex Llama model family, we show how AISCG empowers analysts to intuitively trace inherited restrictive terms and identify root causes across deep topological networks, significantly reducing the cognitive load of compliance auditing.

</details>


### [627] [Understanding Automated Web GUI Testing: An Empirical Study Across Exploration Strategies and State Abstractions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16650)
*Chenxu Liu,Wei Yang,Ying Zhang,Tao Xie*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过实证研究分析了自动化Web GUI测试中探索策略（基于模型、强化学习、大语言模型）和状态抽象（六种抽象方式及历史表示）对代码覆盖率和故障发现能力的联合影响，发现不同策略各有优势，状态抽象是关键因素，且代码覆盖率与故障发现能力弱相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管探索策略和状态抽象对自动化Web GUI测试至关重要，但二者如何共同影响测试有效性尚未被充分研究，现有工作缺乏系统性的实证比较。

Method: 对三类代表性方法（模型、RL、LLM）进行实证研究：比较六种状态抽象对模型和RL方法的影响；分析不同历史表示（作为状态抽象的一种形式）对LLM方法的影响；从代码覆盖率、状态覆盖率和故障发现多维度评估。

Result: 1）无单一策略在所有维度上表现最优，各类策略在代码覆盖、状态覆盖和故障发现上互补；2）状态抽象是关键因素：细粒度抽象适合模型方法，紧凑抽象适合RL方法；3）历史表示显著影响LLM方法，简洁的功能级上下文效果最佳；4）代码覆盖率与故障发现能力弱相关。

Conclusion: 需要多维评估来全面衡量测试有效性，研究结果为选择探索策略和设计有效状态抽象提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Automated web GUI testing (AWGT) relies on exploration strategies that exercise web applications through GUI actions to maximize code coverage, spanning traditional model-based, reinforcement learning (RL)-based, and emerging large language model (LLM)-based approaches. State abstraction, which detects pages with the same functionality to avoid repeated testing, has long been recognized as critical to guiding exploration. However, how exploration strategies and state abstractions jointly affect testing effectiveness remains underexplored.
  We present an empirical study analyzing both factors from the perspectives of code coverage and failure revelation. We compare representative model-based, RL-based, and LLM-based approaches; investigate how six state abstractions influence model-based and RL-based approaches; examine LLM-based approaches under different history representations, which act as a form of state abstraction; and compare the failures exposed by different approaches.
  Our results show that no single strategy excels across all dimensions; instead, categories exhibit complementary strengths in code coverage, state coverage, and failure discovery. State abstraction is a key factor: strict, fine-grained abstractions favor model-based strategies, while compact ones better support RL-based strategies. History representation substantially affects LLM-based strategies, where concise, functionality-level context performs best. We also find that code coverage is weakly correlated with failure-revealing ability, underscoring the need for multi-dimensional evaluation. These findings offer practical guidance for selecting exploration strategies and designing effective state abstractions for AWGT.

</details>


### [628] [Trust by design -- in praise of modularization: a case study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16670)
*Peter Fettke,Wolfgang Reisig*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出三种超越传统形式化方法的措施以确保集体自适应系统的安全、可靠和可信：局部因果运行、利用该运行的时序逻辑验证技术，以及从组件属性组合系统属性，并通过案例研究展示了模块化设计对实现可信的好处。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统形式化方法和验证技术不足以确保集体自适应系统的安全、可靠和可信，需要新的措施来弥补这一不足。

Method: 提出了三种措施：(1) 概念手段：事件的局部因果运行；(2) 时序逻辑验证技术：尊重并利用局部因果运行；(3) 组件属性组合：从组件属性推导系统属性。通过案例研究展示模块化如何助力可信设计。

Result: 通过案例研究初步验证了模块化对于实现"通过设计保证可信"的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的三种措施有望为集体自适应系统建立可信保障，未来工作将发展完整的理论体系。

Abstract: Ensuring that collective adaptive systems remain safe, reliable, and trustworthy requires measures that transcend so far established formal methods, and in particular established verification techniques. In this contribution, we suggest three such measures: (1) conceptual means: runs with locally confined cause and effect of events, (2) temporal logic like verification techniques that respect and exploit such runs, (3) composing system properties from properties of components. This contribution presents a case study which particularly focuses on the benefits of modularization for achieving trust by design. Further work will develop a full-fledged theory for the presented ideas.

</details>


### [629] [Reference Architecture for Metadata-driven Services to Promote Reusability in Software Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16692)
*João F. L. Daniel,Bruno P. Romano,Xiaofeng Wang,Andrea Janes,Eduardo M. Guerra*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于元数据的参考架构（RA），通过模式语言设计，利用元数据机制促进服务复用、减少冗余服务，并采用场景评估与案例研究两种方法验证，结果表明该架构在系统演化中能有效降低变更影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 服务架构中客户端异构性常导致功能相似的服务重复创建，影响系统演化与可维护性，因此需要一种能限制复制服务数量的架构方案。

Method: 提出基于元数据的参考架构，通过模式语言设计实现复用；采用场景评估与真实系统案例研究两种方法进行三角验证。

Result: 在系统演化过程中，该参考架构最常见的变更类型是无变更或影响较小的变更（如配置变更、新增可插拔类）。

Conclusion: 所提出的参考架构能有效提升服务复用性，降低系统演化时的维护成本。

Abstract: Service-based Architectures place reusability among their central design goals, yet structural heterogeneity across clients often drives the creation of services with similar functionalities, undermining system evolution and maintainability. In this work, we address this issue by focusing on validated architectural artifacts that bound to a limit the number of replicated services. We do so by proposing and validating a reference architecture that employs metadata as the core mechanism to promote service reusability, embracing heterogeneous data. The proposed RA is designed based on a pattern language with the same purpose, and it is evaluated by combining two well-established methods for RA evaluation: scenario-based evaluation and case studies with real-world systems. The triangulation of these methods' results demonstrated that, during the system's evolution, the most common change types the RA incurs are either no change or less impactful ones, like configuration changes or the addition of a pluggable class.

</details>


### [630] [Organizational Cohesion in Microservice Architectures: A Multi-Project Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16725)
*Xiaozhou Li,Andrea Janes*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种量化微服务生态系统中组织内聚性（Organizational Cohesion）的方法，通过定义成对团队内聚性（PTC）指标，并在Spinnaker等七个开源微服务系统中进行纵向分析，发现核心服务与外围服务存在系统性差异，且PTC与平均组织耦合（AOC）仅呈弱相关，表明团队内聚性与跨服务开发者活动代表了不同且弱相关的组织动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微服务架构的广泛采用带来了软件模块化与开发组织结构对齐的新挑战。已有研究多关注技术属性（如服务耦合、依赖结构），但很少关注贡献者活动是否反映或偏离了服务边界。因此，本文旨在从组织层面量化评估微服务生态系统的内聚性。

Method: 基于敏感类内聚性度量（SCOM），定义了成对团队内聚性（PTC）指标，用于衡量单个微服务内开发者贡献的平衡性与集中度。通过对Spinnaker微服务平台的纵向案例研究及另外六个开源微服务系统的复制分析，评估组织内聚性的演化。

Result: 核心服务与外围服务存在系统性差异；PTC与平均组织耦合（AOC）仅呈现弱相关，表明团队内聚性与跨服务开发者活动代表了不同且弱关联的组织动态。

Conclusion: 将"高内聚、低耦合"原则扩展到组织层面，本文为评估微服务开发的社会技术结构提供了一种量化视角。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of microservice architectures has introduced new challenges in aligning software modularity with the structure of development organizations. Although prior research has extensively examined technical properties such as service coupling and dependency structures, comparatively little attention has been paid to how contributor activity reflects or diverges from service boundaries. In this paper, we introduce the notion of organizational cohesion in microservice ecosystems and propose a quantitative approach to measure it. Building on the Sensitive Class Cohesion Metric (SCOM), we define Pairwise Team Cohesion (PTC), a metric that captures the balance and focus of developer contributions within individual microservices. We analyze the evolution of organizational cohesion using a longitudinal case study of the Spinnaker microservice platform and replicate the analysis across six additional open-source microservice systems. Our results reveal systematic differences between core and peripheral services and show that PTC and Average Organizational Coupling (AOC) exhibit only a weak correlation across projects. This finding shows that team cohesion and cross-service developer activity suggest distinct and weakly associated organizational dynamics. By extending the "high cohesion, low coupling" principle to the organizational level, our study provides a quantitative perspective for assessing the socio-technical structure of microservice development.

</details>


### [631] [No Resource, No Benchmarks, No Problem? Evaluating and Improving LLMs for Code Generation in No-Resource Languages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16827)
*Alessandro Giagnorio,Alberto Martin-Lopez,Gabriele Bavota*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM在"无资源语言"（几乎无训练数据的编程语言）上的代码生成问题，构建并发布了三个基准测试，实验了提示工程、预训练和微调等方法。发现进一步预训练效果最佳，但会损害指令遵循能力，于是提出从基础模型出发，预训练后通过权重差异迁移注入指令能力，无需昂贵的指令微调即可低成本部署专业模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代码生成研究集中在高资源语言（Python/Java）和少量低资源语言，而"无资源语言"（专有或领域特定语言，几乎无训练数据）在工业界普遍存在但缺乏研究，企业无法使用商业工具如GitHub Copilot，需要自行部署代码推荐器，因此急需探索可行的解决方案。

Method: 1) 构建并发布了三个基于两种新兴编程语言的无资源语言代码生成基准测试；2) 实验了多种方案：基于提示的技术、预训练和微调；3) 提出"权重差异迁移"方法：从基础模型开始，在目标语言上进一步预训练，然后从指令模型迁移指令遵循能力（通过权重差异），避免昂贵的指令微调。

Result: 进一步预训练在无资源语言上取得最大的性能提升，但直接应用于指令微调模型会损害指令遵循能力。提出的权重差异迁移方法有效解决了这一矛盾，显著提升了无资源设置下的代码生成能力。

Conclusion: 无资源语言场景下，通过基础模型预训练+权重差异迁移注入指令能力，企业可以低成本部署专门化的指令模型，无需承受指令微调的计算开销，为工业界专有语言的代码生成提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly advanced the automation of software engineering tasks. One prominent example is code generation, where an LLM produces code in a specified programming language based on a natural language description. Most research in this area has focused on high-resource languages, such as Python or Java, which benefit from abundant training data. A smaller body of work has explored low-resource languages, which are underrepresented in training corpora. In contrast, no-resource languages for which LLMs have seen virtually no training data remain largely unstudied. These languages often emerge in industry, where organizations develop proprietary or domain-specific languages unsupported by commercial tools like GitHub Copilot. This results in the need for companies to deploy their own in-house code recommenders. To investigate possible solutions in this context, we build and release three code generation benchmarks for no-resource languages, based on two recently proposed programming languages for which very little training data is available. Using these benchmarks, we experiment several solutions to teach LLMs about no-resource languages, including prompt-based techniques as well as pre-training and fine-tuning exploiting the little data available. While further pre-training gives the largest performance gains for no-resource languages, applying it directly to instruction-tuned models harms their ability to follow instructions. To address this, we start from a base model, further pre-training it on the target language, and then inject instruction-following capabilities via weight diff transfer from an instruction model. Such an approach significantly improves code generation capabilities in no-resource settings, allowing companies to cheaply deploy a specialized instruct model without dealing with the computational cost of instruction fine-tuning.

</details>


### [632] [Towards LLM Accelerated Rapid Reviews for Software Tool Discovery -- Case for Log Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16839)
*Jesse Nyyssölä,Hamza Bin Mazhar,Alexander Bakhtin,Matteo Esposito,Nana Reinikainen,Yuqing Wang,Ying Song,Davide Taibi,Mika Mäntylä*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用大语言模型（LLM）筛选文献、提取工具并自动运行工具的流水线，并以软件日志异常检测工具为案例验证了可行性。从3233篇摘要中筛选出569篇，最终成功运行了24个工具，整个流程仅需约4小时人工时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程研究中工具成果众多，但研究者和从业者难以判断哪些工具是被维护且能开箱即用的，缺乏系统性评估手段。

Method: 设计了一套流水线：1）设计检索字符串从Scopus获得3233条结果；2）利用两个LLM根据纳入/排除标准对标题-摘要对进行筛选；3）下载论文并提取工具链接；4）使用基于LLM的编码代理自动运行工具。

Result: 从3233篇摘要筛选出569篇，下载470篇，提取206个唯一链接，经人工评估确定83个工具，最终通过LLM编码代理成功运行了24个工具。

Conclusion: 该方法展示了利用LLM进行快速系统综述的显著效率优势（仅需4小时人工+12小时LLM运行时间），未来计划扩展到GitHub和PyPI等平台，并将工作流形式化为LLM Agent Skills以便推广。

Abstract: In software engineering research, the primary outcome is frequently a tool. However, for practitioners and academics alike, it is hard to tell which tools are maintained and do they work out of the box. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to identify relevant studies with LLM screening, extract the tools presented in them, and run them with LLM-based coding agent. To evaluate the feasibility of our approach we focus on software log anomaly detection tools. We begin the study by designing a broad search string that yields 3233 hits from Scopus. We request two LLMs to provide an inclusion probability for each title-abstract pair according to the inclusion and exclusion criteria. From the 3233 exported abstracts, this screening reduced the number of included papers to 569, out of which we could download 470. These papers included 206 unique links and after manual evaluation we determined 83 to be tools. Finally, we ran the LLM-based coding agent on these 83 links, and got 24 successfully running tools. As replicating our approach would require roughly only 4 hours of human effort, of which 3 hours were manual PDF downloading, and 12 hours of LLM running time, this demonstrates promising efficiency when utilizing LLMs in rapid reviews. Because practitioner-built tools often lack academic papers, in the future we aim to expand our analysis to tool-hosting platforms such as GitHub and PyPI. In the future, we plan to formalize our workflow as LLM Agent Skills to make our approach easier to adopt.

</details>


### [633] [Beyond Models: Reflections on Engineering AI-enabled Systems in a Project-Based Course](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16842)
*Amir Mashmool,Kishan Ravindra Sawant,Mojtaba Shahin,Nico Hochgeschwender,Rainer Koschke*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文介绍并评估了不来梅大学一门面向AI系统的软件工程硕士课程，学生通过开发电影推荐系统学习架构设计、部署与监控，研究发现学生在早期架构决策、异构ML集成、需求变更和数据管理方面存在持续性困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI系统开发不仅需要模型构建能力，更需要架构设计、部署与监控等系统工程技能，但现有ML课程多聚焦模型开发，缺乏对系统级工程实践的关注，且对此类课程的实证评估十分有限。

Method: 采用混合研究方法，包括分析学生提交的作业和问卷调查，研究了一门项目驱动的硕士课程（AI算法：理论与实践），学生需在开发电影推荐系统过程中做出架构设计决策以应对可扩展性、部署和需求变更等挑战。

Result: 学生普遍在早期架构决策、异构ML集成、需求变更和数据管理方面遇到持续困难，主要原因在于ML和软件工程专业知识不均衡。从教师角度看，该课程促进了学生的系统级推理能力，并增强了对数据驱动的ML实践在AI系统中的认识。

Conclusion: 系统导向的AI工程课程能够有效培养学生的系统级思维，但需要关注学生ML与软件工程背景的差异，并针对早期架构决策等关键环节提供更有针对性的支持。

Abstract: Teaching Software Engineering for AI-enabled systems entails addressing the integration of AI components within full-scale software architectures under realistic constraints. While machine learning courses emphasize model development, students often lack experience in architectural design, deployment, and monitoring of AI-enabled systems. Empirical evaluations of such system-oriented AI courses remain limited. This paper reflects on the design and implementation of a project-based master's-level course titled AI Algorithms: Theory and Engineering, at the University of Bremen, in which students developed a movie recommendation system while making architectural design decisions to address challenges related to scalability, deployment, and evolving requirements. We conducted a mixed-methods study combining analyses of student submissions and questionnaire responses to investigate integration challenges, learning outcomes, and opportunities for improvement. Our results indicate persistent difficulties in early architectural decisions, heterogeneous ML integration, evolving requirements, and data management, largely due to uneven ML and software engineering expertise. From the educator's perspective, the course fostered system-level reasoning and strengthened awareness of data-centric ML practices in AI-enabled systems.

</details>


### [634] [Neuro-Symbolic Software Verification: Hyper-charging Local Language Models with Symbolic Reasoning at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16886)
*Muhammad A. A. Pirzada,Julian Parsert,Weiqi Wang,Konstantin Korovin,Lucas C. Cordeiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出VerIbmc，一种结合开源本地部署大语言模型与ESBMC验证工具的神经符号循环不变量综合框架，在520个问题中最佳配置解决率达86.4%，无需依赖昂贵的私有云API，实现了隐私保护和能效优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的循环不变量综合工具依赖专有云API，存在隐私泄露风险和成本高昂问题，阻碍了在工业场景中的隐私敏感部署。

Method: 提出VerIbmc管道，包含两个阶段：确定性符号不变量综合阶段 + 迭代LLM精炼循环（由结构化验证器反馈驱动）；提供Chain-of-Thought和Tree-of-Thought两种提示策略管道；使用5种开源模型（7B-120B参数）进行实验。

Result: 最佳配置GPT-OSS-120B在499个问题中解决431个（86.4%）；在与最强云API工具共享的四个基准套件上具有竞争力；符号综合阶段无需LLM调用即可解决75个问题，为最弱模型额外贡献多达35个问题；所有推理均在单台本地机器上完成。

Conclusion: 基于LLM的神经符号方法能够在无需昂贵私有前沿模型的情况下，以隐私保护和能效方式有效完成循环不变量综合任务。

Abstract: Loop invariant synthesis remains a central and pivotal bottleneck in formal software verification. Recent LLM-based Neuro-Symbolic tools have achieved impressive solve rates. However, these tools rely on proprietary, often expensive cloud APIs, which constitute a hurdle for privacy-sensitive industrial deployments where the source code cannot leave the organisation or where cost is a factor. We present VerIbmc, a neuro-symbolic pipeline that pairs symbolic invariant generation with locally deployable open-weight language models with the ESBMC verification tool. Our pipeline combines a deterministic symbolic invariant synthesis phase with an iterative LLM refinement loop driven by structured verifier feedback. In addition, we provide two types of pipelines that differ in their prompting strategy: Chain-of-Thought vs. Tree-of-Thought.
  We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation with five open-weight models (ranging from 7B to 120B parameters) across five benchmark families comprising of 520 problems (499 after excluding 21 with unavoidable overflow). Overall, the best single configuration (GPT-OSS-120B) solves 431 of 499 problems (86.4%). Additionally, on the four benchmark suites shared with the strongest cloud-API tools, VerIbmc is competitive running only on a single local machine. The evaluation shows symbolic invariant synthesis solves 75 problems without any LLM call and yields up to +35 additional problems for the weakest model. Importantly, all inference runs entirely on a single local machine using open-weight models -- no cloud API or proprietary model is required. Overall, we demonstrate that a neuro-symbolic approach based on LLMs can be used effectively for invariant synthesis in a privacy-preserving and energy-efficient manner, without having to resort to expensive proprietary frontier models locked behind APIs.

</details>


### [635] [Agent trajectories as programs: fingerprinting and programming coding-agent behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16988)
*Hamidah Oderinwale*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出通过程序性行为指纹（procedural fingerprints）来区分不同AI agent的解题过程，而不仅仅依赖基准测试的最终得分，并开发了ProcGrep库用于agent程序级审计与评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基准测试只告诉agent答对了什么，但无法揭示其如何得出答案，缺乏对agent行为过程的细粒度理解。

Method: 提出程序性表征（procedural representations）方法，通过新兴词汇归纳技术（emergent vocabulary induction）压缩表面变异、保留过程模式；利用行为指纹（fingerprints）对agent轨迹进行分类和比对。

Result: 10个agent的行为指纹识别准确率达85.7%；蒸馏模型与其教师模型的Jensen-Shannon散度为0.25，约为其他模型对之间距离的一半；同一发布时期的模型行为更相似。

Conclusion: 随着模型在评估中趋于饱和，需要超越成功率，从更整体的维度（如程序性行为）来探测模型差异；ProcGrep库可应用于任务感知模型路由、agent监控和细粒度成本分析等场景。

Abstract: Benchmark scores tell you what an agent got right; they do not tell you how it got there. In this work, we introduce methods for comparing agents procedurally in different contexts, where the model, tasks, and approaches vary. We compare ten agents and find that they are identifiable by their behavioral habits, which we define as fingerprints: a probe over these procedural signatures attributes an unseen trajectory to the correct agent at 85.7% accuracy, controlling for leakage across tasks. We develop procedural representations for agent problem-solving procedures with an emergent vocabulary induction technique that is meant to be maximally compressive to avoid surface-level variation while being expressive enough to unveil the quirks of the models' patterns. We apply our framework to the software engineering evaluation dataset SWE-Bench to study the structural distinctness of agent trajectories and find that behavior is most similar between models from similar release periods and those that are distilled from one another (e.g., a distilled student model and its teacher have a Jensen-Shannon divergence of 0.25, about half the distance between other model pairs). As more models saturate evaluations, we believe that it will be important to probe model behavior along more holistic dimensions than success rates alone. We introduce ProcGrep, a library for auditing and evaluating agents for how they approach tasks at a procedural level given their traces in a top-down fashion. We believe this work has a range of applications to help developers work with and program coding agents, such as task-aware model routing, agent monitoring, and finer-grained cost analysis.

</details>


### [636] [Selection Without Signal, Recovery Through Expression: A Measurement Study of Post-Hoc Falsification Operators for Frozen Small Code Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16999)
*Mehmet Iscan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文发现语义后处理操作器（选择、验证、修复等）在固定计算预算下未能提升冻结小代码模型（≤1.5B参数）的准确率，超过Best-of-N；但表达层恢复（M1）和自适应共识早停（ACE）分别在准确率和计算效率上有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小代码模型（≤1.5B参数）适合离线及隐私敏感场景，但常生成看似合理实则错误的程序。自然解决方案是使用后处理操作器（选择、验证、修复、再处理）无需重新训练，但缺乏系统评估其有效性。

Method: 在确定性执行预言机和无泄漏、计算匹配协议下，评估26种语义后处理操作器（选择、验证、修复、消除、投资组合、否决、生成条件化）与Best-of-N进行对比，在HumanEval+和MBPP+基准上对三个小模型进行测试。

Result: 所有26种语义后处理操作器均未能在保持准确率上超越Best-of-N。原因包括：覆盖墙（系统性的难任务失败）、能力剪刀差（生成器太强使得通过可见测试的样本几乎无法区分）、共识陷阱（可见通过但隐藏错误的样本很少与正确备选共存）。无分布假设的无害Bound要求n≥45才能保证零危害。表达层恢复M1是唯一提升准确率的方法（提升12个任务，p=2.4e-4），自适应早停ACE节省约19%计算量且零危害。

Conclusion: 改进评估框架和测量覆盖率比依赖语义后处理推理更为关键。语义后处理操作器在小代码模型场景下存在根本性局限，而表达层恢复和计算控制是更有效的改进方向。

Abstract: Frozen small code models (<=1.5B parameters, run locally without fine-tuning) suit offline and privacy-constrained use, but often emit plausible-but-wrong programs. A natural remedy is a post-hoc operator that selects, verifies, repairs, or re-processes the model's samples without retraining; in principled form it is Popperian: attack each candidate with a severe test, keep what survives. We measure whether such operators help. Under one deterministic execution oracle and a leakage-free, matched-compute protocol, 26 semantic post-hoc operators (selection, verification, repair, elimination, portfolios, sound vetoes, generation conditioning) are evaluated against Best-of-N (BoN); on the cells and benchmarks tested, none improves held-out accuracy over BoN. The negative is mechanistic: a coverage wall (systematic hard-task failures deeper sampling does not rescue), a capability scissors (a competent generator leaves almost no discriminable error among visible-test passers), and a near-empty consensus trap (the visible-pass-but-hidden-wrong majority a leakage-free selector needs rarely co-occurs with a correct alternative). A distribution-free do-no-harm bound cannot certify a harm rate <=alpha at zero observed harm unless n>=45. Two operators help on a different axis, outside the semantic output space. An expression-layer recovery (M1), the only accuracy gain here, recovers correct programs the standard extractor discards (robust extraction and public-test signature alignment); it does no harm (b10=0), is leakage-free, and lifts DeepSeek-Coder-1.3B by +12 tasks on HumanEval+ (p=2.4e-4). An adaptive consensus early-stop (ACE) is a calibrated compute-saving control (~19% saving, zero harm). M1 and the selection negative replicate on HumanEval+ and MBPP+ across three model cells. The lesson: fix the harness and measure coverage before blaming semantic post-hoc reasoning.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [637] [A Definition of Good Explanations and the Challenges Explaining LLM Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14838)
*Louis Mahon,Elliot Ford,Callum Hackett*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于反事实解释的改进定义，强调解释需考虑对话者对每个事实的先验信念，并探讨了该定义对AI可解释性的影响，尤其解释了为什么大语言模型输出难以产生好的解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可解释性对AI在各领域的应用至关重要，但"什么是好的解释"本身是一个长期未决的哲学问题，需要先明确好的解释的定义，才能指导AI系统产生好的解释。

Method: 以反事实解释概念为基础，引入对话者的先验信念作为核心考量因素，由此定义好的解释。

Result: 提出了一种融合先验信念的反事实解释定义，并由此分析了该定义对AI可解释性的启示，特别是解释了LLM输出难以产生好解释的原因。

Conclusion: 好的解释不仅要提供反事实信息，还需考虑受众的先验知识，这为理解LLM的可解释性挑战提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: How to define a good explanation is a long-standing philosophical debate which has found recent renewed interest in the context of AI outputs. Explainability is crucial for AI adoption in many contexts, but in order to produce good explanations of AI systems, we must first have an understanding of what good explanations are. In this paper we propose a definition inspired by the notion of counterfactual explanations, however we argue that one must also take into account the interlocutor's prior beliefs in each fact that could be offered in an explanation. We explore the ramifications of this definition for AI explainability and, in particular, why LLM outputs are difficult to produce good explanations for.

</details>


### [638] [Dr-DCI: Scaling Direct Corpus Interaction via Dynamic Workspace Expansion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14885)
*Yi Lu,Zhuofeng Li,Ping Nie,Haoxiang Zhang,Yuyu Zhang,Kai Zou,Wenhu Chen,Jimmy Lin,Dongfu Jiang,Yu Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出DR-DCI框架，将检索器作为智能体可调用的动作来扩展本地工作空间，实现大规模语料库上的高效智能搜索。相比原始DCI，该方法在Browsecomp-Plus上达到71.2%准确率（提升8.3点），同时减少工具使用、时间和成本，并能从10万扩展到2000万文档规模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索器中介的接口（如BM25、ColBERT）虽能有效排序相关文档，但只提供排名结果或有限文档视图，限制了智能体重组材料和在文档间验证约束的能力。全语料库终端命令在大规模时变得缓慢和不稳定。

Method: DR-DCI将检索视为智能体可调用的动作，用于扩展局部工作空间。智能体动态地将相关文档拉入不断演进的工作空间，在其中执行DCI操作。结合了检索级别的召回（保证可扩展性）与DCI级别的精度（保证局部操作）。

Result: Browsecomp-Plus上达到71.2%准确率，比原始DCI和消融变体提升最多8.3点，同时减少工具使用、墙钟时间和估算成本。引入工作空间保留的上下文重置后准确率达73.3%。从10万到1000万文档规模保持有效，在2000万文档的Wiki-18 QA设置中平均得分63.0，超越检索基线和训练搜索智能体基线。

Conclusion: DR-DCI通过检索器引导的DCI框架有效平衡了可扩展性与精确性，排名预览和文档间DCI操作是性能的关键因素。

Abstract: Agentic search over large corpora relies on retriever-mediated interfaces (e.g., BM25 or ColBERT) for scalable candidate discovery. While effective at ranking relevant documents, these interfaces expose evidence only as ranked results or bounded document views, limiting agents' ability to reorganize material and verify constraints across documents. Direct Corpus Interaction (DCI) addresses this limitation by exposing shell-executable corpus operations for flexible search, filtering, comparison, and verification. However, full-corpus terminal commands become slow and unstable as the corpus grows, degrading performance and efficiency. We introduce DR-DCI, a retriever-steered DCI framework that treats retrieval as an agent-callable action for expanding a local workspace. Rather than operating directly over the full corpus, the agent dynamically pulls relevant documents into an evolving workspace and conducts DCI operations within it. This design combines retriever-level recall with DCI-style precision: retrieval keeps exploration scalable, while DCI preserves the local operations needed for effective evidence resolution. Experiments show that DR-DCI is both effective and efficient across scales. On Browsecomp-Plus, DR-DCI reaches 71.2\% accuracy, improving over raw DCI and ablated variants by up to 8.3 points while reducing tool usage, wall time, and estimated cost. With workspace-preserving context reset, accuracy further improves to 73.3\%. In corpus-scaling experiments, DR-DCI remains effective from 100K to 10M documents, whereas raw DCI becomes unstable and BM25 performs substantially worse. DR-DCI also scales to a 20M-scale file-per-document Wiki-18 QA setting, achieving an average score of 63.0 across six benchmarks and outperforming retrieval-based and trained search-agent baselines. Ablation analysis further shows that ranked previews and inter-document DCI are key to performance.

</details>


### [639] [Relational Structural Causal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14892)
*Adiba Ejaz,Elias Bareinboim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了关系结构因果模型（Relational Structural Causal Models），将结构因果模型扩展到对象及其关系变化的场景，并证明了在未见过的对象组合上进行因果和 observational 推理需要额外假设。作者定义了关系因果图并推导了符号识别标准，最后提出了关系神经因果模型，在模拟交通场景中优于非关系基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能需要具备因果性（支持干预和反事实推理）和组合性（泛化到未见过的对象组合）的环境模型，但现有因果模型无法处理对象及其关系动态变化的场景。

Method: 1) 提出关系结构因果模型，扩展传统SCM以支持变化的对象和关系；2) 定义关系因果图并推导符号识别标准，实现在存在未观测混杂情况下的因果识别；3) 提出关系神经因果模型，实现可证明正确的学习方法。

Result: 在包含不同车辆、信号灯和行人的模拟交通场景中，关系神经因果模型显著优于非关系基线方法。

Conclusion: 本文从理论上证明了在动态对象关系中学习因果模型的可行性，并提供了可实际部署的学习方法。

Abstract: An artificial intelligence must have a model of its environment that is causal, supporting reasoning about interventions and counterfactuals, and also combinatorial, supporting generalization to unseen combinations of objects. In this work, we formally study when and how such a model can be learned. We develop relational structural causal models, extending structural causal models (Pearl 2009) to settings where objects and their relations vary. First, we show how answers to not only causal but also observational queries about unseen combinations of objects can not be identified without further assumptions. To enable such identification--including in the presence of unobserved confounding--we define relational causal graphs and derive symbolic identification criteria. Finally, we propose relational neural causal models, a provably correct approach that outperforms non-relational baselines on simulated traffic scenes with varying cars, signals, and pedestrians.

</details>


### [640] [Trust Between AI Agents: Measuring Formation, Breakage, and Recovery, with Implications for Governing Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14923)
*Yujiao Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于成本验证的行为度量方法，用于衡量AI代理之间的信任水平。通过协作生存游戏实验，研究了六种前沿模型在团队合作中的信任形成、破裂和恢复机制，发现大型模型能显著减少验证行为（约60-85%），而信任校准比过度怀疑更值得关注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多智能体系统日益普及的背景下，缺乏标准化的方法来衡量AI代理之间的信任程度，这限制了对多智能体协作行为的理解和治理。

Method: 设计了一个协作生存游戏，通过成本验证（checking teammate's work）作为信任的行为度量。比较了有记忆版本与无记忆版本的验证频率差异。在六种前沿模型快照上进行实验，操控队友可靠性来观察信任的形成、破裂与恢复。

Result: 四个大型模型（Claude Opus 4.6、Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.1、Gemini 3.1 Pro）在与可靠队友合作时减少验证约60-85%；两个较小模型几乎没有调整。信任破裂后，模型反应各异：有的针对问题队友，有的对整个团队提高警惕。信任恢复慢于形成，且聚集发生的失败比分散失败引发更长的怀疑期。

Conclusion: 信任倾向可以在部署前被测量；在多智能体AI治理中，核心关注点应是校准（calibration）而非最大化怀疑。形成信任的模型验证更少、决策更快、收益更高；而过度验证与犹豫不决相关，而非安全性提升。

Abstract: As language-model agents increasingly work in teams, each agent must decide how much to trust its teammates. Yet we lack a standard way to measure trust between AI agents. We propose a behavioral measure based on costly verification. In a cooperative survival game, checking a teammate's work consumes resources, while trusting a wrong answer can be fatal. Relative to a memoryless version of the same model, reduced verification provides an observable measure of trust. Using this framework, we study trust formation, breakage, and recovery across six frontier model snapshots. When paired with a consistently reliable teammate, four snapshots (Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.1, and Gemini 3.1 Pro) reduce verification by roughly 60-85%, whereas two smaller snapshots show little or no such adjustment. Failures reverse this discount, but models differ in how they respond. Some concentrate renewed scrutiny on the culprit, while others become more cautious toward the entire team. Recovery is slower than formation, and clustered failures sustain suspicion far longer than the same number of failures spread apart. These differences have practical consequences. Models that form trust verify less, decide more quickly, and achieve higher payoffs in our environment. By contrast, persistent over-verification is associated with indecision rather than safety. Our results show that trust dispositions can be measured before deployment and suggest that calibration, rather than maximal suspicion, should be the central concern in the governance of multi-agent AI systems.

</details>


### [641] [PrologMCP: A Standardized Prolog Tool Interface for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14935)
*Agnieszka Mensfelt,Adarsh Prabhakaran,Adrian Haret,Vince Trencsenyi,Kostas Stathis*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 PrologMCP，一个通过 MCP 协议将 Prolog 推理引擎暴露为工具的服务，使语言模型将推理任务委托给符号求解器，在深度演绎推理任务上达到或超越推理型 LLM 的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿推理型语言模型在深度演绎推理任务上仍会失败，且通过扩展内部推理来提升性能的成本很高。符号委派提供了一种互补路径，但现有的自动化形式化流程大多是针对特定任务或智能体的定制集成。

Method: PrologMCP 是一个任务无关的开源服务器，通过模型上下文协议将 Prolog 暴露为有状态工具。它提供紧凑的工具接口、结构化错误报告和每会话隔离，使"翻译-运行-检查-修复"循环成为 MCP 智能体的可复用原语。

Result: 在 PARARULE-Plus 通用样本上，形式化器匹配或超越推理型 LLM（准确率 1.00 vs 1.00/0.998），相比标准模型增益最大（GPT-4.1 为 0.762）。在更具挑战性的子集上，形式化器保持近乎完美（1.00/0.99），而推理型 LLM 降至 0.95/0.94。

Conclusion: 通过 MCP 将推理委托给 Prolog 是一种鲁棒且可检查的替代方案，比扩展的自然语言推理更有效。

Abstract: Frontier reasoning-tuned language models still fail on deductive tasks at depth, and the cost of improved performance through extended internal reasoning scales poorly. Symbolic delegation offers a complementary route: a language model translates the problem, while a solver performs the inference. However, current autoformalization pipelines for logic programming are typically bespoke integrations tied to particular tasks or agents. We introduce PrologMCP, a task-agnostic, open-source server that exposes Prolog as a stateful tool through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Its compact tool interface, structured error reporting, and per-session isolation make the translate-run-inspect-repair loop a reusable primitive for MCP-capable agents. We evaluate a formalizer agent enhanced with PrologMCP against standard and reasoning LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-4.1, and o4-mini) on two subsets of PARARULE-Plus: a general-purpose sample and a more challenging one targeting a specific failure mode of natural-language reasoning. On the general sample, the formalizer matches or exceeds reasoning LLMs (accuracy 1.00 vs.\ 1.00 / 0.998), with the largest gains over standard models (0.762 for GPT-4.1). On the challenging subset, the formalizer remains near-perfect (1.00 / 0.99) while reasoning LLMs drop to 0.95 / 0.94. These results suggest that delegating inference to Prolog via MCP is a robust and inspectable alternative to extended natural-language reasoning.

</details>


### [642] [Semantics-Enhanced Retrieval-Augmented Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14941)
*Shiqiao Zhou,Zipeng Wu,Holger Schöner,Edouard Fouché,IAG Wilson,Shuo Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SERAF框架，通过双重检索（时间序列相似性+文本描述语义）增强非平稳时间序列预测，在7个数据集上表现优于SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG时间序列预测方法仅依赖时序相似性检索，在非平稳场景下检索效果不佳。

Method: SERAF对时间序列及其自生成文本描述进行双重检索，选择性联合利用互补的历史模式与对应未来信息指导预测。

Result: 在7个真实数据集上，SERAF优于现有最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: 融合数值与语义视角的双重检索能有效提升非平稳时间序列预测性能。

Abstract: Time series forecasting models often benefit from historical patterns. Inspired by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), recent research explored retrieving relevant historical time series segments to enhance forecasting. However, relying solely on time series similarity is often insufficient for retrieval under non-stationarity. To address this, we propose a multimodal approach: a \textbf{S}emantics-\textbf{E}nhanced \textbf{R}etrieval-\textbf{A}ugmented Time Series \textbf{F}orecasting framework, SERAF. Unlike mainstream approaches that depend only on time series similarity, SERAF conducts dual retrieval over the time series and their self-generated textual descriptions. It retrieves two complementary sets of historical patterns and corresponding futures, which are selectively and jointly used to guide future predictions. Experiments across seven real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of SERAF in bridging numerical and semantic views of time series compared with state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [643] [AI Engram: In Search of Memory Traces in Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14997)
*Jea Kwon,Dong-Kyum Kim,Jiwon Kim,Yonghyun Kim,Woong Kook,Meeyoung Cha*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个几何框架来识别深度神经网络中的"AI印记"（AI engrams），通过将神经科学标准（特异性、再激活、充分性、必要性）形式化为约束逆问题，实现了对个体记忆痕迹的隔离和精确操控（线性算术组合/擦除），无需迭代优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究深度神经网络是否保留类似生物记忆单元的、可识别的记忆痕迹，弥合生物记忆理论与人工表示学习之间的鸿沟。

Method: 将神经科学标准形式化为约束逆问题，推导出闭式估计器；该生物学衍生的解等价于参数流形上的自然梯度更新。

Result: 在从简单MLP到大型语言模型的实验中验证了AI印记的因果有效性和可扩展性，支持通过线性算术对记忆子集进行手术式的组合或擦除。

Conclusion: AI印记桥接了生物记忆与人工表示学习理论，为深度网络如何在分布式存储中同时支持功能特异性提供了几何视角。

Abstract: Memory formation is fundamental to intelligence, yet whether deep neural networks preserve identifiable memory traces analogous to biological memory units remains an open question. This work introduces a geometric framework to identify such "AI engrams" by formalizing the neuroscientific criteria of specificity, reactivation, sufficiency, and necessity into a constrained inverse problem. We derive a closed-form estimator that isolates individual memory traces from globally entangled parameters, and show that this biologically-derived solution corresponds to a natural gradient update on the parameter manifold. AI engrams enable surgical manipulation of learned knowledge: any subset of memories can be composed or erased through linear arithmetic, without iterative optimization. Experiments ranging from simple MLPs to LLMs demonstrate the causal validity and substantial scalability of AI engrams. Together, these results bridge theories of biological memory and artificial representation learning and offer geometric insight into how deep networks simultaneously support functional specificity within distributed storage.

</details>


### [644] [Metric Match: A Subset Selection Approach to Evaluating LLM Judge Reliability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15029)
*Alyssa Unell,Natalie Dullerud,Naomi Boneh,Meena Jagadeesan,Tatsu Hashimoto,Nigam Shah,Sanmi Koyejo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出 Metric Match 方法，通过选择代表性样本进行人工标注，从而在有限标注下准确估计 LLM 评判者与人类评分的相关性可靠性指标。该方法在15个数据集、4种相关性指标上取得0.838的胜率，平均估计误差降低18.7%，标注需求减少32.5%，并在医学案例中节省1041.67美元。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM评判者用于替代昂贵的人工评估，但其可靠性高度依赖于与人类评分者的一致性，而评估这种一致性本身又需要昂贵的人工标注。现有方法在有限标注下难以准确估计LLM评判者的可靠性指标，因此需要更高效的样本选择策略。

Method: 提出 Metric Match 方法，通过从数据集中选择子集进行人工标注，使得该子集在合成标签（由LLM生成的伪标签）上的可靠性指标与总体可靠性指标相匹配，从而实现用少量标注准确估计整体可靠性指标。

Result: 在4种相关性指标和15个数据集上，Metric Match 对比随机子集选择的胜率为0.838，平均估计误差降低18.7%，标注需求减少32.5%。在医学案例研究中节省1041.67美元。该方法在可靠性分类任务中也优于随机选择。

Conclusion: Metric Match 是一种高效、可部署的方法，能在有限人工标注下准确估计LLM评判者的可靠性，显著降低标注成本，具有良好的实用价值。

Abstract: LLM judges are used to reduce the need for costly human labor in evaluating open-ended text generation. However, the reliability of these judges depends critically on their alignment with human raters -- a property that itself depends on costly human annotations. In this work, we develop a method (Metric Match) for estimating correlation-based reliability metrics of LLM judges from limited annotations. Metric Match selects a subset of samples for human annotation such that the subset matches the population reliability metric with respect to acquired synthetic labels. We empirically show that Metric Match achieves a win-rate of 0.838 against random subset selection across four different correlation metrics and 15 datasets, with an 18.7% decrease in average estimation error and reduces annotation needs by 32.5%. We provide a cost model and highlight a medical case study where our method saves $1,041.67 compared to random selection for expert annotation. Further, we shift our task from reliability estimation to reliability classification of whether a given judge is above a deployment threshold, outperforming random selection with Metric Match. All project code is publicly available, and we additionally provide an installable package for ease of use.

</details>


### [645] [Synthetic Counteradaptation: A Principle of Human-AI Co-evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15503)
*Ivar Frisch,Jackie Kay,Philip Moreira Tomei*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了"合成逆向适应"概念，描述人类与AI系统在多智能体环境中通过相互适应策略和行为而共同进化的过程，并通过对弈、社会互动和地缘政治模拟等案例进行分析验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对AI与人类之间递归性、共同进化的交互模式缺乏系统性理论框架，作者希望引入"合成逆向适应"来填补这一空白。

Method: 通过分析围棋对弈、混合动机社会互动和地缘政治模拟等不同场景中的典型案例，展示人类与AI之间策略相互适应的动态过程。

Result: 验证了合成逆向适应框架能够有效解释人类与AI在多智能体环境中的递归性和共同进化特征，揭示了AI系统与人类行为之间的相互塑造关系。

Conclusion: 合成逆向适应为理解人机交互中持续演化的动态关系提供了新的理论视角，有助于指导未来人机协作系统的设计和研究。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce the concept of synthetic counteradaptation, a process where human and AI systems co-evolve by adapting to each other's strategies and behaviors. Synthetic counteradaptation occurs when AI systems develop novel strategies or social protocols, prompting humans to extract insights and adapt their own behaviors in response, leading to the emergence of new agent interaction dynamics. To illustrate these dynamics, we analyze examples from various contexts, including the game of Go, mixed-motive social interactions, and geopolitical simulations. By exploring these cases, we demonstrate how synthetic counteradaptation provides a framework for understanding the recursive and co-evolutionary nature of human-AI interactions in multi-agent environments.

</details>


### [646] [OSGuard: A Benchmark for Safety in Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15034)
*Mina Mohammadmirzaei,Jeffrey Flanigan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OSGuard是一个双粒度基准测试套件，用于评估计算机使用智能体在安全方面的表现。它包含动作级基准（局部护栏决策）和风险增强执行套件（端到端评估），实验表明当前多模态护栏在孤立动作判断上表现良好，但风险增强执行暴露了局部监督与可靠端到端安全之间的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的计算机使用智能体评估主要关注任务是否成功完成，但忽略了智能体可能通过不安全捷径达到名义目标的情况，缺乏对安全性的系统评估。

Method: 提出了OSGuard双粒度基准：(1) 动作级基准——对上下文化提议动作标注为允许、无关或不安全；(2) 风险增强执行套件——在OSWorld任务基础上修改环境引入潜在风险（如破坏性覆盖等），并配增安全不变量评估器以区分安全与不安全的完成。

Result: 当前多模态护栏在孤立动作判断上表现良好，但风险增强执行暴露了局部监督与可靠端到端安全之间的差距。

Conclusion: 双粒度设计能够更精确地诊断模型是否能识别不安全提议动作，以及在作为护栏部署时能否提升整体任务安全性。

Abstract: Computer-use agents are increasingly evaluated by whether they complete realistic desktop and web tasks. However, task success alone can miss failures in which an agent reaches the nominal goal through an unsafe shortcut. We introduce OSGuard, a dual-granularity benchmark suite for evaluating safety in computer-use agents under benign, unchanged user instructions. OSGuard contains an action-level benchmark for local guardrail decisions and a risk-augmented execution suite for end-to-end evaluation. The action-level benchmark consists of contextualized proposed actions labeled as allowed, unrelated, or unsafe, each judged relative to the original instruction and current interface state. The execution suite contains manually constructed OSWorld-derived task variants in which the original task remains achievable, but the environment is modified to introduce latent hazards such as destructive overwrites, etc. Each variant is paired with augmented evaluators that retain the original task-success criterion while adding explicit state-based safety invariants, allowing us to distinguish safe completions from unsafe completions that satisfy the nominal task objective. Our experimental results on OSGuard show that current multimodal guardrails can perform well on isolated action judgments, while risk-augmented execution exposes remaining gaps between local oversight and reliable end-to-end safety. This dual-granularity design enables more precise diagnosis of whether models can both recognize unsafe proposed actions and improve full-task safety when deployed as guardrails.

</details>


### [647] [An Integrated System for Real-Time Student Assessment and Career Guidance Using Neural Networks in Computing Disciplines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15831)
*Sakir Hossain Faruque,Md. Jubair Hossain,Sharun Akter Khushbu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究提出一个结合职业指导专家系统(CGE)和基于Web的学生评估平台(WBSA)的AI驱动系统，使用多层感知机模型(MLP)预测学生职业路径，验证准确率达94.71%，并包含实时聊天、评估、指导等功能，旨在帮助计算机科学和软件工程本科生找到合适的职业方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多计算机科学和软件工程专业本科生在学术表现、能力和兴趣不完全匹配时，难以找到合适的职业路径，现有方法缺乏个性化和系统化的指导。

Method: 提出AI驱动的学生评估与职业预测系统，集成CGE（使用MLP模型，通过滚雪球抽样收集真实学术和课外数据训练）和WBSA平台（基于Node.js、Next.js、PostgreSQL的现代Web应用），并采用安全云基础设施。

Result: MLP模型在预测个性化职业路径上达到94.71%的验证准确率；系统部署前后分别进行了预调查和包含师生反馈的后期调查以评估有效性。

Conclusion: 该系统能有效帮助IT领域毕业生选择合适职业路径，通过AI增强的个性化推荐、师生互动平台和安全实时通信等功能，提升了职业指导的准确性和用户体验。

Abstract: Many undergraduate students in Computer Science (CS) and Software Engineering (SWE) struggle to identify suitable career paths, particularly when their academic performance, abilities, and interests do not fully align. To address this issue, this study proposes an AI-driven Student Assessment and Career Prediction System that integrates a Career Guidance Expert (CGE) system with a Web-Based Student Assessment (WBSA) platform. Within the integrated framework, CGE enhances personalized career recommendations using AI while also assisting students after graduation in identifying suitable jobs, research domains, and higher study opportunities aligned with their skills and interests. The WBSA platform further strengthens interaction between students and faculty through assessments, personalized tasks, mentorship activities, and a secure real-time chat application. The CGE system employs a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) model trained on real-world academic and extracurricular data collected using the snowball sampling method from the students of universities, achieving a validation accuracy of 94.71% in predicting personalized career paths. A pre-survey was conducted across universities to evaluate the proposed model before deployment. The WBSA system was developed as a modern web application using technologies such as Node.js, Next.js, and PostgreSQL to ensure scalability, responsiveness, and secure data management. The overall system is supported by a secure cloud-based infrastructure, the platform provides reliable performance while assisting graduates to select suitable career path in IT sector. In addition, a post-survey involving both students and faculty was conducted to gather feedback and further improve the overall effectiveness and usability of the system.

</details>


### [648] [Fusion is not one-size-fits-all: Cross-Modal Representation Alignment for Time-to-Event Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15038)
*Zhemin Zhang,Weijie Chen,David Le,Amara Tariq,Alex Wallace,Matthew Stib,Juan Maria Farina,Chadi Ayoub,Reza Arsanjani,Imon Banerjee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于基础模型的跨模态表示对齐框架，用于融合CT影像和纵向EHR数据进行时间-事件预测。通过四种融合策略（晚期融合、对比对齐、交叉注意、协同注意）在共享潜在空间对齐两种模态，并在肺栓塞死亡率和心血管疾病结局两个任务的大规模多机构队列上验证。结果表明融合策略在模态贡献均衡时一致提升一致性指数1.5-5.4%，其中对比对齐融合表现最稳定，且任务感知的多模态对齐是实现鲁棒泛化的必要设计原则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态临床数据（CT影像+纵向EHR）的时间-事件预测面临模态不平衡和分布偏移两大挑战，现有方法缺乏跨任务、跨机构的泛化能力。

Method: 使用领域特定的基础模型分别编码CT和EHR模态，通过四种融合策略（晚期融合、对比对齐、交叉注意、协同注意）在共享潜在空间对齐，在肺栓塞和心血管疾病两个任务上评估。

Result: 融合策略在模态贡献均衡时提升一致性指数1.5-5.4%；对比对齐融合（尤其是CLMBR表示）在PE任务上最稳定；交叉注意在MACE内部性能最优，影像引导的协同注意在外部测试最优。

Conclusion: 任务感知的多模态对齐是可泛化临床部署的必要设计原则，提供了跨模态融合行为在模态不平衡下的首次系统分析。

Abstract: Accurate time-to-event (TTE) prediction from multimodal clinical data remains challenging due to modality imbalance and distribution shift. We introduce a foundation model-driven framework for cross-modal representation alignment between CT imaging and longitudinal EHR data, designed to generalize across tasks and institutions. CT and EHR modalities are encoded independently using domain-specific foundation models and aligned in a shared latent space through four principled fusion strategies: late fusion, contrastive alignment, cross-attention, and co-attention. We evaluate two clinically distinct TTE tasks: pulmonary embolism (PE) mortality and cardiovascular disease (CVD) outcomes, on large-scale multi-institutional cohorts (PE: N=3,099 train; 1,098 internal; 435 external; CVD: N=2,951 train; 837 internal; 682 external). Fusion consistently improves concordance index by 1.5-5.4% over unimodal baselines when modalities contribute comparably. Overall, contrastive multimodal fusion, particularly with CLMBR representations, provided the most consistent and statistically robust improvements, especially for PE mortality prediction. For MACE, cross-attention (one-hot) achieved the highest internal performance and image-guided co-attention achieved the best external performance. We therefore introduce a generalizable foundation model-based cross-modal alignment framework and provide the first systematic analysis of fusion behavior under modality imbalance in TTE prediction. Our results establish task-aware multimodal alignment as a necessary design principle for robust generalization and scalable clinical deployment.

</details>


### [649] [Risk-Aware LLM Agents for Geospatial Data Retrieval: Design and Preliminary Adversarial Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15077)
*Kyle Gao,Joel Cumming,Jonathan Li,Linlin Xu,David A. Clausi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的框架，通过自然语言查询从云地理空间目录中检索遥感数据。系统将用户意图转化为结构化的API调用，集成了三个智能体（Guardrail、General-QA、Recommender-Analyst）实现安全、语义对齐的交互，具有跨平台可移植性，初步实验表明提示级安全指令可提升鲁棒性，但仍需系统级防御。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的遥感数据检索方式依赖专业API和复杂查询语法，非专业用户难以直接使用。需要一种能够将自然语言意图自动转化为结构化API调用的方法，降低遥感数据获取门槛，同时保证安全性和语义一致性。

Method: 提出一个LLM驱动的三智能体框架：（1）Guardrail智能体负责安全和策略执行；（2）General-QA智能体进行意图解释；（3）Recommender-Analyst智能体根据模式感知生成API调用。通过API模式替换实现跨平台可移植性，在对抗性多轮对话设置下进行实验评估。

Result: 初步实验表明，提示级安全指令在一定程度上提升了系统的鲁棒性，但在API操纵场景下仍然存在少数高影响失败案例，说明仅靠提示级防御不足。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了用户意图与地理空间基础设施之间的可扩展接口，实现了自动化的地球观测工作流。但需要在安全性、可用性和成本效率之间取得平衡，提示级防御不足以应对API操纵攻击，建议采用拦截级的Guardrail智能体作为系统级防御方案。

Abstract: We present an LLM-driven framework for retrieving remote sensing data from cloud-based geospatial catalogues using natural language queries. The system converts user intent into structured API calls, enabling efficient access to satellite imagery and environmental datasets. The architecture integrates three agents: Guardrail for safety and policy enforcement, General-QA for intent interpretation, and Recommender-Analyst for schema-aware API call generation. This coordinated design ensures reliable, semantically aligned interaction with external data services. The modular framework is portable across platforms through API schema substitution and supports applications in environmental monitoring, disaster response, and climate analysis. It establishes a scalable interface between user intent and geospatial infrastructure, enabling streamlined and automated Earth observation workflows. Preliminary experiments under adversarial multi-turn settings show that prompt-level safety instructions improve robustness, although rare high-impact failures persist in API manipulation scenarios and highlight the need for adaptive, system-level defenses that balance safety, usability, and cost efficiency, which motivates the use of our intercept-level Guardrail agent.

</details>


### [650] [Cognitive Debt: AI as Intellectual Leverage and the Dynamics of Systemic Fragility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15078)
*Shuchen Meng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了"认知债务"的形式化理论，研究个体用AI替代而非补充自身认知时积累的未验证推理义务。模型引入认知资本和认知债务两个状态变量，建立了六个命题阐述认知债务的产生机制、危机形成及社会福利影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释为什么理性个体会过度依赖AI替代认知（而非互补），以及这种行为的系统性风险和社会成本。

Method: 构建形式化理论模型，包含认知资本和认知债务两个状态变量，采用乘法生产技术，其中认知资本作为决定AI采用回报的抵押品。

Result: 六个命题：1)理性个体会主动积累认知债务；2)平静期降低风险感知，导致"认知明斯基时刻"；3)危机损失呈凸性；4)危机后产生"虚假纠正循环"；5)分散均衡过度采用替代性AI；6)高认知资本个体可能最终侵蚀自身认知能力低于低技能者。

Conclusion: 认知债务的积累存在系统性风险、认知公共品和军备竞赛外部性，导致分散均衡偏离社会最优。

Abstract: We develop a formal theory of cognitive debt: the stock of unverified reasoning obligations that accumulates when individuals use AI as a substitute rather than a complement for first-principles cognition. The model features two state variables per agent, cognitive capital and cognitive debt, and a multiplicative production technology in which cognitive capital functions as collateral that determines the return to AI adoption. We establish six propositions. Rational agents incur positive cognitive debt because the costs are deferred, partially external, and masked by short-run productivity gains. Tranquil periods lower subjective risk assessments, raise AI substitution intensity, and compound leverage, generating a cognitive Minsky moment in which subjective risk falls while true systemic fragility rises. Expected crisis losses are convex in aggregate leverage. Post-crisis, output-target pressure can produce a false-correction loop in which agents patch AI failures with more AI. The decentralised equilibrium over-adopts substitutive AI relative to the social optimum because of systemic risk, cognitive public goods, and arms-race externalities. In a two-type heterogeneous-agent economy, high-cognitive-capital agents adopt AI more intensively and may eventually erode their unaided cognitive capital below that of initially lower-skilled agents.

</details>


### [651] [VGPT-RSI for RH-Adjacent Formal Progress: Boundary Certificates, Verified Finite Lagarias Inequalities, and Explicit Failure Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15096)
*Zhixin Hu,Tao Xu,Xiaodian Sun,Li Jin,Momiao Xiong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文利用VGPT-RSI系统，对与黎曼猜想相关的两个任务生成可验证的正式证明：一是构建有限RH边界证书，二是启动形式化的Lagarias路径证书，并明确指出现存的数学障碍，而非声称证明了RH本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 黎曼猜想是数学核心难题，现有方法难以产生可验证的可靠进展。作者希望探索AI辅助推理系统能否在明确识别未解决问题的情况下，产生形式上可检查的部分进展。

Method: 使用VGPT-RSI（可验证增长物理变压器递归自改进系统），结合向外舍入区间算术、Arb/FLINT球算术和Rocq/CoqInterval等工具，对RH邻近任务构建数值边界证书和Lagarias路径证书。

Result: 成功构建了有限RH边界证书和Coq检查的有限Lagarias证书；明确了三个数学瓶颈：形式化Lagarias等价性、全局尾部定理的证明、归约到极值整数的反例。

Conclusion: VGPT-RSI能够生成可验证的RH邻近形式化进展，组织证明依赖关系，并在剩余障碍本质上是数学问题时避免过度声称，展示了AI辅助数学证明的负责任路径。

Abstract: The Riemann Hypothesis remains one of the central unsolved problems in mathematics. Rather than claiming proof, we investigate whether a verifiable AI-assisted reasoning system can produce reliable, formally checked partial progress while explicitly identifying the remaining mathematical obstructions. We apply the Verifiable Growing Physical Transformer with Recursive Self-Improvement (VGPT-RSI) to two RH-adjacent certification tasks. First, we construct and verify a finite RH-boundary certificate for inequality on a parameterized safe lower curve over a region. The numerical boundary curve is converted into a certificate-backed lower curve, audited using outward-rounded interval arithmetic and Arb/FLINT ball arithmetic, and then checked in Rocq/CoqInterval for the parameterized theorem. Second, we initiate a formal Lagarias-route certificate. Lagarias criterion states that RH is equivalent to the global inequality. We formalize the finite quantity and produce a Coq-checked finite certificate. The final system identifies the exact unresolved mathematical bottlenecks: formalizing the Lagarias equivalence, proving the global tail theorem beyond any finite cutoff, and potentially reducing counterexamples to colossally abundant or related extremal integers. These results demonstrate that VGPT-RSI can produce certified RH-adjacent formal progress, organize proof dependencies, and avoid overclaiming when the remaining obstruction is genuinely mathematical.

</details>


### [652] [Towards Verifiable Agentic Data Science: Solving Irregular TSQA Via Tool-Grounded Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15107)
*Sanhorn Chen,Xiaoyang Chen,Boyu Liu,Roy Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文指出现有时间序列问答基准大多假设规则采样，忽略了现实部署中普遍存在的不规则数据（异步观测、信息性缺失、变采样频率）。为此提出IRTS-ToolBench，包含1700个问题、10种任务类型、13个领域，为不规则时间序列分析提供标准化输入和可复现评估方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的时间序列数据本质上是不规则的（异步、缺失值具有信息性、采样频率动态变化），但现有TSQA基准几乎都假设规则采样，导致无法评估LLM和AI智能体在不规则条件下的真实表现，存在根本性评估缺口。

Method: 构建IRTS-ToolBench基准数据集，包含1700个问题、10种任务类型、覆盖13个领域，提供标准化输入和可复现的评估协议，供研究人员独立使用。

Result: 公开了包含1700个问题的跨领域基准，代码已开源在GitHub。

Conclusion: 填补了不规则时间序列问答评估的空白，为LLM在不规则时序分析中的研究提供了标准化评估工具。

Abstract: Time series data in real-world deployments is overwhelmingly irregular. Observations are asynchronous, missing values are informative rather than random, and sampling frequencies vary across sensors and operational windows. However, existing Time Series Question Answering (TSQA) benchmarks mostly assume regularly sampled inputs, leaving a fundamental gap in understanding how large language models (LLMs) and AI agents perform under irregular conditions. To bridge this gap, we introduce IRTS-ToolBench, a benchmark of 1,700 questions spanning 10 task types across 13 domains. IRTS-ToolBench is designed to be used independently by any researcher working on LLM-based irregular time series analysis, providing standardized inputs and a reproducible evaluation protocol. Code can be found in https://github.com/SanhornC/IRTS-ToolBench.

</details>


### [653] [CONCORD: Asynchronous Sparse Aggregation for Device-Cloud RAG under Document Isolation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15179)
*Xuedong Hu,Zhiqing Tang,Zhi Yao,Tian Wang,Weijia Jia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CONCORD提出一种异步稀疏聚合框架，用于文档隔离的双端RAG场景。通过等待债务控制和证据引导的最小补充机制，在云端作为异步证据源的情况下，大幅提升吞吐量并减少通信量，同时保持答案质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有双端RAG方法在设备-云协同推理场景中依赖频繁的远程同步和密集的证据传输，在真实延迟和带宽条件下吞吐量受限。隐私和策略约束禁止原始文档交换，导致文档隔离的双端RAG设置面临挑战。

Method: 提出CONCORD框架：(1) 等待债务控制机制，根据等待的观察回报决定解码步是否继续等待远程参与；(2) 证据引导的最小补充机制，仅请求确定当前贪婪决策所需的远程证据。

Result: 在Natural Questions和WikiText-2上，CONCORD相比基线分别提升1.66倍和2.15倍端到端吞吐量，每个token通信量降低两个数量级以上，同时保持可比的答案质量和困惑度。

Conclusion: CONCORD通过将云端视为异步到达的证据源而非连续同步的协同生成器，有效解决了文档隔离双端RAG的通信瓶颈问题，实现了高效的设备-云协同推理。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has emerged as a pivotal technique for improving language models by incorporating external knowledge at inference time. As device-cloud collaborative inference makes it feasible to deploy small language models on edge devices, a new setting arises in which private documents remain on the device and public knowledge resides in the cloud. Privacy and policy constraints often forbid raw document exchange, creating a document-isolated dual-end RAG setting. However, existing methods rely on frequent remote synchronization and dense evidence transfer, limiting throughput under realistic latency and bandwidth conditions. To address this issue, we propose CONCORD, an asynchronous sparse aggregation framework for dual-end RAG under document isolation. CONCORD treats the cloud as an asynchronously arriving evidence source rather than a continuously synchronized co-generator. Specifically, we introduce waiting debt control to decide whether each decoding step should continue waiting for remote participation based on the observed return of waiting. We also design a certificate-guided minimal supplementation mechanism that requests only the remote evidence needed to determine the current greedy decision. Steps that consult the cloud preserve the same greedy token as dense dual-end aggregation, while the remaining steps commit locally without remote evidence. Experiments on Natural Questions and WikiText-2 show that CONCORD improves end-to-end throughput over baselines by $1.66\times$ and $2.15\times$, respectively, while reducing per-token communication by over two orders of magnitude and maintaining comparable answer quality and perplexity.

</details>


### [654] [CogGuard: Cognitive and Operational Profiling for Proactive Warning in Edge Intelligent Services](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15199)
*Zhi Yao,Weihao Chen,Zhiqing Tang,Hanshuai Cui,Qianli Ma,Weijia Jia,Wei Zhao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CogGuard是一个面向边缘智能服务的主动预警框架，通过解耦离线LLM画像构建与在线SLM评分预测，结合前缀对齐KV缓存复用和长度感知分布式微调策略，在教育与操作任务中分别将画像构建时间降低48%、分布式微调时间降低19%，并在百分制预警任务中实现13.4和5.9的MAE。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘智能服务需要在严格的延迟和隐私约束下预测任务完成情况，现有方案存在两个问题：(1) 画像方法领域特定，缺乏跨场景可复用的抽象；(2) 在异构边缘集群上微调对齐模型时，因输入序列长度差异大导致同步开销高。

Method: 提出了CogGuard框架：(1) 解耦架构：将离线LLM画像构建与在线SLM评分预测分离，通过共享的静态-动态画像到评分流水线实现；(2) 高效画像构建：设计场景特定画像方法，结合前缀对齐的KV缓存复用减少重复编码开销；(3) 边缘端模型对齐：提出长度感知的分布式微调策略，结合对比正则化缓解异构集群上的负载不均衡。

Result: 在教育与操作数据集上，CogGuard将画像构建时间降低最多48%，分布式微调时间降低19%，在百分制预警任务上分别达到13.4和5.9的MAE。在最大教育场景中，预测误差相比最强基线降低15.4%。

Conclusion: CogGuard通过LLM-SLM协同的主动预警框架，有效解决了边缘智能服务中跨场景可复用性和异构集群训练效率两大核心挑战，展示了在教育和操作预警中的显著性能提升。

Abstract: Proactive warning is an important capability for edge intelligent services, where the system predicts whether a subject will successfully complete an incoming task under strict latency and privacy constraints. Such prediction depends on both long-term static attributes and short-term dynamic states derived from historical interaction logs. Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) offer strong long-context reasoning for constructing structured profiles from these logs, but existing solutions face two challenges for edge deployment: (1) profiling methods are typically domain-specific and lack a reusable abstraction across service scenarios, and (2) fine-tuning alignment models on heterogeneous edge clusters incurs high synchronization overhead due to the variance in input sequence lengths. To address these challenges, we propose CogGuard, a proactive-warning framework for edge intelligent services. CogGuard decouples offline LLM-based profile construction from online Small Language Model (SLM)-based score prediction through a shared static-dynamic profile-to-score pipeline, and instantiates it in two representative scenarios: educational performance warning and operational task outcome warning. For efficient profile construction, we design scenario-specific profiling methods with prefix-aligned KV-cache reuse to reduce repeated encoding overhead. For edge-side model alignment, we propose a length-aware distributed fine-tuning strategy with contrastive regularization to mitigate workload imbalance on heterogeneous clusters. Experiments on education and operation datasets show that CogGuard reduces profile construction time by up to 48% and distributed fine-tuning time by 19%, while achieving MAEs of 13.4 and 5.9, respectively, on 100-point-scale warning tasks. In the largest educational setting, CogGuard reduces prediction error by 15.4% compared with the strongest baseline.

</details>


### [655] [Attribute Inference from Interactive Targeted Ads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15209)
*Peihao Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究定向广告中用户行为曝光导致的属性推理隐私风险，建立了将广告定向、曝光、交互与信息披露分离的噪声预言机模型，并通过可复现的合成数据基准评估了多种攻击方法，发现披露策略是最有效的控制手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 定向广告系统允许广告主选择目标受众并暴露用户可见行为，当互动与活动链接时，广告主可获取与用户关联的观测数据。这种机制可能被用作属性推理的噪声预言机，从而带来隐私风险。现有研究缺乏对此类信道的形式化建模和系统化评估。

Method: 建立分离定向谓词、曝光、交互和披露边界的噪声预言机模型；使用合成人口数据（校准自公开数据）构建可复现基准；生成广告语义层提供主题变体和响应先验；模拟器生成真实标签、事件轨迹、披露观测和指标；对比贝叶斯、监督、正无标签和自适应攻击方法。

Result: 在4个主题变体、7个模拟种子、2种交互设置下，160次重复广告活动后贝叶斯和监督攻击在主设置下AUC约0.64，高交互设置下约0.65。披露策略是最强控制手段，聚合报告可消除与用户关联的预言机输入，类型过滤和随机化披露可降低泄露信号。

Conclusion: 提出了一个用于交互式定向广告隐私保护的模型、工具和防御评估方法。披露策略是控制推理风险的最有效手段，聚合报告和类型过滤等防御措施能有效降低用户层面的属性泄露。

Abstract: Targeted advertising systems can pair audiences selected by advertisers with ad units that expose visible user actions. When an interaction remains linked to the campaign that elicited it, the advertiser may receive an observation tied to a user rather than only an aggregate report. We model that channel as a noisy oracle for attribute inference. The model separates targeting predicates, exposure, interaction, and disclosure. These boundaries capture the gap between eligibility and delivery, and the gap between interaction and advertiser visibility.
